clean_body: COVID Mandates are un-American | Friends, I recently joined Dr. Robert Malone, inventor of the mRNA technology, on Tommy’s Podcast! Watch here: Dr. Malone and I chatted about all things COVID, including the left’s hypocrisy and their efforts to impose never-ending vaccine and mask mandates on us. We all know that vaccine mandates are un-American, un-Constitutional, and un-Scientific. But, without your help, we won’t be able to spread our message. We need your help to elect proven conservative leaders who will fight for our FREEDOMS and the TRUTH. | I’m running for the U.S. Senate because Career Politicians haven’t fought for Alabama or for America. They’ve kowtowed to whatever the Left wants and haven’t stood up for our freedom. I won’t be another Career Politician. I’ve fought for our country before, and I’ll gladly do so again. I’m a former Prisoner of War, a 22-year Army veteran, a successful business owner, and a father. I won’t stand for government tyranny. I won’t stand for endless mandates. Together, we can stand up for our freedoms and END the Left’s COVID hypocrisy. Join my fight for America today: Thank you and God Bless, Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. DURANT FOR SENATE PO Box 11548 Huntsville, AL 35814 Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years. name: Team Beto
subject: Beto O'Rourke vs. Greg Abbott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
A top Abbott strategist told reporters that Abbott plans to spend over $100 million attacking Beto and our people-powered campaign.
#
It's officially Beto O'Rourke vs. Greg Abbott. Here’s where things stand:
**FIRST:** Our massive organizing program got voters to turn out, advancing Beto into the general election matchup with more than 90% of the vote.
**THEN:** A top Abbott strategist told reporters this morning that Abbott plans to spend OVER $100 million attacking Beto and our people-powered campaign.
**NOW:** We need your support to fight back against every single attack Abbott and his corporate mega-donors throw our way from now until Election Day.
We can’t delay. Abbott already has over $50 million in the bank. Going up against Greg Abbott means we'll need the resources to defend against attacks AND spread Beto's positive vision for Texas to voters all across the state.
**[Will you donate $3 or more right now to help power Beto's campaign to be the next governor of Texas? Now that it's officially the general election, it's time to kick this campaign into high gear.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53634?refcode=ema20220302-178645&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=178645%2E444211%2EcId3D0)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53634?refcode=ema20220302-178645&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=178645%2E444211%2EcId3D0)**
**Yesterday's primary election proved that the people of Texas are ready to elect Beto.** With votes still being counted, over 964,000 Texans have voted for Beto. And Beto expanded his support — winning votes in more of Texas' 254 counties than in the 2018 Senate primary.
Our organizing power is unmatched. In January, we set a goal to contact 3 million voters before March 1st — and we ended up contacting over 4.5 million! But to defeat Greg Abbott in November, we'll have to compete with him not only on the ground, but everywhere including the airwaves.
Together, we can ensure that Beto is able to spread the word about Abbott's failed leadership far and wide. But Beto needs _all_ of our support to make it happen. **[Please, will you chip in $3 or more right now to help capitalize on our momentum and prepare for the fights ahead?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53634?refcode=ema20220302-178645&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=178645%2E444211%2EcId3D0)**
In solidarity,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220302-178645-footer&t=22&refcode2=178645_444211_cId3D0&akid=178645%2E444211%2EcId3D0)**

**Last night’s State of the Union was the worst I’ve seen in my lifetime. **

President Biden had nothing to offer but excuses for all the damage he’s done to our country.

* _He has_** _NO plan_** _to fix our economy._
* _He has_** _NO plan_** _to secure our border._
* _He has_** _NO plan_** _to keep Americans safe._

**Now more than ever, we need strong Republican governors to stand up to this illegitimate President and steer our country back in the right direction.**
[**TAKE BACK NEVADA**](http://links.deanhellerforgov.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=df7579ec04164dcd92ba50e87dd806c5&_e=J0_SGj-QEYdGD3YHc8Ehme0ZK16RDwyiFkVw5nbv2WXGh--iVKi4U1yZflgq1Uut-lthPjm09ZjG97v-YYhOQJek1KumJ3aJYON_bo0yia8BBfXlyxtwes3NkDrz74h81wel3IcL5Up_75iAWhwAL-blIyQ3y1mMTJ8dzmEwlSMOuvjwptQUHDjQfjRKRa5mRVH64kWO66Uhn6Pu8jU_Z5fauagwtLuYgI-07c4TNCjtUzeZ_FmMJUF29ujQBAQP78TPQkLsSKXLk5xHOHjt5hJqn2nPKt8d9bKBfi4K2tEx8lb90S3msac6oDMJoNmUbtJi3jmT1VoMIzS9lVQPDmv074jH5bL6OHpqkzp93nX3VvuGfg_sZZXiQXDqlmBi5EhBgPFjuClLhJLLsuNtv7TEmcQmL2-jpM4Q8GEuaG504sflKmzH043GqpJScx_u_mXwYNT4cuY2VC1sEBCYOXQ0UeiG1HERPxCxfBD8AfwcxiG8ekBlYHH5vpiApcve)
Steve Sisolak is doing to Nevada what Joe Biden is doing to America by:

* _Ignoring crime._
* _Endangering our freedoms._
* _Bowing to the woke, radical Left._

**We’re better than this.**

A stronger future for our state –– and our country –– is within reach, and it starts with patriots like you taking a stand.

clean_body: President Biden’s address last night proved why America needs more Republican governors | | | Peter, Last night’s State of the Union was the worst I’ve seen in my lifetime. President Biden had nothing to offer but excuses for all the damage he’s done to our country. He has NO plan to fix our economy. He has NO plan to secure our border. He has NO plan to keep Americans safe. Now more than ever, we need strong Republican governors to stand up to this illegitimate President and steer our country back in the right direction. Steve Sisolak is doing to Nevada what Joe Biden is doing to America by: Ignoring crime. Endangering our freedoms. Bowing to the woke, radical Left. We’re better than this. A stronger future for our state –– and our country –– is within reach, and it starts with patriots like you taking a stand. Defend my lead in the polls Hold Sisolak accountable for his failures * Spread our campaign to every corner of Nevada Thank you, \- Dean Heller | | | Paid for by Dean Heller for Nevada Governor | | 18124 Wedge Pkwy #1044, Reno, NV 89511 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Cora Neumann
subject: Our February in review [PHOTOS]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Because of your continued support, we were able to meet our end-of-month goal. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490782/333152123/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=) Friend,

Thanks to your generous contributions, we met our fundraising goal for the month of February. I can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve shown my campaign, and I’m looking forward to taking this momentum with us into March.

There's a lot going on in the United States and the world right now. But your commitment and resolve through these challenges is a strong reminder of why I got in this race to begin with. Your support is why I'm confident we can build a better future for Montana families for generations to come.

I wanted to take this moment to show you what we’ve been up to the last few weeks. We’ll be on the road quite a bit this month, and I look forward to seeing and meeting some of you on the trail.

I hope you enjoy the updates, and thanks again!

Cora
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490783/333152124/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)**
---

* * *
**Our team had the opportunity to volunteer at the food distribution center for the _Ō ́yō ́•ṗ ́ Pantry_ at FAST Blackfeet. This organization works tirelessly to combat food insecurity on the Blackfeet reservation here in Montana.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490784/333152125/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)

**We made a stop to volunteer at the food pantry serving working families in Arlee at the Arlee Community Development Corporation. Due to inflation, hunger is on the rise – which means food insecurity is becoming a larger issue in our district.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490785/333152128/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)

**I was fortunate to get to speak and spend the weekend with women farmers and ranchers at the Montana Farmers Union Women's Conference.**
****[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490786/333152129/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)****

**I also got to speak at the Montana Professional Firefighters Conference. These brave men and women risk their lives to protect our state from devastating fires, and I’m committed to doing more to support their efforts.**
********[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490788/333152130/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)********

**We had the opportunity to host a meet and greet with local community leaders to talk about public lands and hunting access, wildland fire management, and outdoor recreation.**
********[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490789/333152131/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)********
**It’s been such a gift to meet so many people across Montana and learn how I can best represent us in Congress. Events like these give us an opportunity to bring more voices to the table and create a better Montana that works for all of us.**

**[With the Montana primary just a few months away, I’m more determined than ever to kick this campaign into high gear and build more momentum toward Election Day. Will you donate $3 to my campaign today so we start March on strong footing?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490791/333152132/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)**

As always, I so appreciate your continued generosity and support.

_Cora_

** ** ********[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490792/333152133/655314317?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=)********
---

Paid for by Cora for Montana
---
Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490793/333152135/-1800721441?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=&emci=05444531-879a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=46c54d49-899a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=37373330) Consider supporting Cora's campaign [by making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42490794/333152136/1820125544?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/05444531-879a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/46c54d49-899a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1NGQ0OS04OTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98pziSPa6Vx-RrJByUGbgxE23WRFqAroMJh9IfnG87U=&id=143536037).

President Biden delivered the BIGGEST speech of his entire presidency last night.

And now, we're fired up like NEVER BEFORE.

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBemg28t_)

Like President Biden said last night, our Democrats already have so much to be proud of:

**They 've PASSED the American Rescue Plan, INVESTED in America's infrastructure, and REDUCED child poverty by historic numbers.**

And yet, President Biden also outlined bold plans to continue making progress on so many other pressing issues.

So at this pivotal moment for Joe Biden and our country itself, we need to know that you stand behind our President.

| | | Friend, You saw a lot of posturing and grandstanding in Joe Biden’s speech last night. _But I wanted to touch on what this career politician FAILED to cover..._ Nowhere did he mention the fact that **HIS POLICIES** were the reason for rising energy prices. We heard **NOTHING** about the drugs and cartels pouring across our Southern Border. **And there wasn’t a peep in reassurance for the American families being crushed by a****7.5 PERCENT SPIKE****in inflation!**__

---

| | | When the supposed leader of the free world can’t speak to the issues _that he himself is causing_ , it’s a clear sign that we have to go in a different direction. And according to the numbers, Granite Staters agree - **count me among the**** __60 PERCENT__****of us who disapprove of Joe Biden’s job performance so far!** Yet even in spite of all of this, Maggie Hassan is sticking with her party boss... _She’s making sure the Biden agenda continues to hold back our great state by following it to a T._ If you’re not satisfied with what you heard last night - or if you’re not satisfied with what you’ve been getting from Biden puppet Maggie Hassan - [then I hope you’ll join my mission to replace this D.C. status quo with the 603 Way. >>](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODk3NDY0Nzg5OTYyMDcwMzMzJmM9dzBoNCZlPTAmYj05MzAxMzUwNTYmZD11MmIwdDd1.Z1K5zZpfa6n1V73kwfwUiKgucfzLqjXF-n_i3t9_Luk) When Biden and Hassan won’t focus on the issues that are important to _US_ , then it’s time for a reset - one that will get our state represented in Washington, and not the other way around!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue=20Trail=20Update?=
subject: Kemp let us down
body:
| | | |
---
| | | _**Brian Kemp let us down.**_ He sold us out. And it has become a pattern.
* Kemp sold us out with the **consent decree**. He turned our elections over to Stacey Abrams and gave her everything she wanted.

* Kemp sold us out **after the election** as well. He refused to get to the bottom of what happened.

* Kemp sold us out on **Buckhead City**. Crime is out of control in Atlanta, but Kemp is refusing to allow the people of Buckhead a vote to determine how they want to be governed.

* Kemp sold us out when he changed the law to create his **unconstitutional, unlimited slush fund** for himself. We sued him and beat him in court.

* And now, Kemp has sold out Georgians to **George Soros** , giving him our tax dollars with this insane Rivian deal.

**Yesterday, David Perdue stood with members of the Rutledge community in opposition to Kemp’s bad deal with Soros-funded Rivian. ** _“You guys want to be heard, but your Governor
is refusing to listen. I’m here to tell you that
I hear you, I see you, and I stand with you.”
– David Perdue_ We can grow the economy without selling out and giving our tax dollars to George Soros. We can create jobs without buying them. We can invest in rural Georgia without kicking our local communities to the curb.

When David is Governor, we’ll create good paying Georgia jobs, without lining Soros’s pockets with our tax dollars.

– Team Perdue

_P.S. clean_body: | | | | | | | Brian Kemp let us down. He sold us out. And it has become a pattern. Kemp sold us out with the consent decree. He turned our elections over to Stacey Abrams and gave her everything she wanted. Kemp sold us out after the election as well. He refused to get to the bottom of what happened. Kemp sold us out on Buckhead City. Crime is out of control in Atlanta, but Kemp is refusing to allow the people of Buckhead a vote to determine how they want to be governed. Kemp sold us out when he changed the law to create his unconstitutional, unlimited slush fund for himself. We sued him and beat him in court. And now, Kemp has sold out Georgians to George Soros , giving him our tax dollars with this insane Rivian deal. Yesterday, David Perdue stood with members of the Rutledge community in opposition to Kemp’s bad deal with Soros-funded Rivian. “You guys want to be heard, but your Governor is refusing to listen. I’m here to tell you that I hear you, I see you, and I stand with you.” – David Perdue We can grow the economy without selling out and giving our tax dollars to George Soros. We can create jobs without buying them. We can invest in rural Georgia without kicking our local communities to the curb. When David is Governor, we’ll create good paying Georgia jobs, without lining Soros’s pockets with our tax dollars. – Team Perdue P.S. Did you see Don Jr. is holding rallies for David in and on Monday, March 7? RSVP today and invite your friends and family! | ### | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Perdue for Governor, Inc., All rights reserved.

subject: Election-year gimmicks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We see through the political gamesmanship, and we’re hoping every freedom-loving American will too. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb5ff01f9f2b4dfa95e99704c86bba9e&_e=QAdw_iGIE84wjSbJGS2WDbbx1buNodxSbR5Y_T6gMBMUVUSTfMggRERSbLikdwdw5HH7vIG6hvZXYoZQXkys2YwGf6hm7GJjfeXg1il-y09pfk-8CmQ4wzBuKUBnsKj0yZq7LGGtFVL2xhj-AOTpN0bqz5ON1VYE935q1Bn2chXNCKisjE3-n40Nnf53DuKYGLIK-tloy8MD9ghH0AzB3xUaDQwsaICPJ9PkkvkUo9iCQzOuvW6bshQQSp8gXMvDdohaAqLOPUy06Y4_VZ2kfAicGhA_TJV-FvThTGmyzUxclOs5uxc5JbjeNLVoqesc0Pl-0zpXOpaUXqPRJDDjcwofg-XD-7lCNm1BzNlVzTyKYg_j9uCSbHnCAg1JIK21JIvyzqLwbvlqF7Cy0UuE7plwIhZYFcWI0vP8oWpryxbljOiyhNc5bZ_N5KbeE2u3cj9fqWqABNgh_cftVTPktB8_PInOUmhHe8wyIHRpWEGvNpEI7dauIJj0jAN6b3vB)

---
Peter,

Recently we saw a tweet from a political reporter at a not-so-middle-of-the-road publication in Atlanta highlighting our Democrat opponent's efforts to provide election-year relief for constituents feeling the "pinch" at the gas pumps.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb5ff01f9f2b4dfa95e99704c86bba9e&_e=QAdw_iGIE84wjSbJGS2WDbbx1buNodxSbR5Y_T6gMBMUVUSTfMggRERSbLikdwdw5HH7vIG6hvZXYoZQXkys2YwGf6hm7GJjfeXg1il-y09pfk-8CmQ4wzBuKUBnsKj0yZq7LGGtFVL2xhj-AOTpN0bqz5ON1VYE935q1Bn2chXNCKisjE3-n40Nnf53DuKYGLIK-tloy8MD9ghH0AzB3xUaDQwsaICPJ9PkkvkUo9iCQzOuvW6bshQQSp8gXMvDdohaAqLOPUy06Y4_VZ2kfAicGhA_TJV-FvThTGmyzUy5QpQXsFGR_dbj_06BUSz-JlMrobbZPll5_62QnGy-ZmuV3ZogGeH1Y4fQJraOFEgjdVzsj8KC1ACEQEnQYSEtCA-C-UUFOLUytjyeMSnTPbYpBy_fGF5Et77GBd9OWzUQqr8zeAE5NjcMSq54G8osxhMJYFSXiYhLkBd9L4VNLbG80OwoD22z1HOC29j5e2qBwVVCGYh5tdkWhvgH5j1V)
And just like that it seems we've entered the stretch of the campaign when the talking heads at news outlets lose all sense of political impartiality and throw in with whichever Democrat is running for office.

If our opponent truly wanted to provide relief at the gas pumps, then he would have supported the Keystone XL Pipeline.

**But he didn't. He voted against it FOUR times!**

Now, with his re-election race in a dead heat in a terrible political environment for Democrats, _**my opponent is trying to drum up support for an election-year bill that would bring about a federal fuel tax holiday.**_

We see through the political gamesmanship, and we're hoping every freedom-loving American will too.

**[If you want a United States Senator who will put Americans' needs before political gimmicks, then please make a gift of $7 to our campaign today. The political games have got to end.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb5ff01f9f2b4dfa95e99704c86bba9e&_e=QAdw_iGIE84wjSbJGS2WDbbx1buNodxSbR5Y_T6gMBMUVUSTfMggRERSbLikdwdw5HH7vIG6hvZXYoZQXkys2YwGf6hm7GJjfeXg1il-y09pfk-8CmQ4wzBuKUBnsKj0yZq7LGGtFVL2xhj-AOTpN0bqz5ON1VYE935q1Bn2chXNCKisjE3-n40Nnf53DuKYGLIK-tloy8MD9ghH0AzB3xUaDQwsaICPJ9PkkvkUo9iCQzOuvW6bshQQSp8gXMvDdohaAqLOPUy06Y4_VZ2kfAicGhA_TJV-FvThTGmyzUxy3pF_WcmTlU7zuxixagoSSoGJl7wdfnQL0TGGnxxkdjoczrDrB8V91NsT3Yd6Q-SikDuw5VMwcg6l4DNd8nDgqLrk4VJn8T2duiU31Fu6dqfV47agGVeUHKeQ-9zA2joOel4BX6aj-W05o5ZP1kvjdWvezO-NEM_m5appKxUby7AR7PIB-4gQ1WRe_yudN5yg6-WhXaCfh6pjuQ6sldF3)**

Thank you,

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
We’re headed to a runoff in 83 days — everything is on the line. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4n2t0CnUutZldIa0uzpANRqZXI1_0Jhz0kqEVL7ZFDITZjhoz6c1aMnsDa_d_3Go2z0iMLI5ngiC_F1S90xdGS4YcZkL3Iv5CWwQDdWF8JLaX0gdiYKBJIeCOyS15YbC_aHdLlhor07OZUGVZo9dVrcI_ldIiRkN0GhkifAZ9HbbETh5Ubvt5vCH_mn90q5SaINj8SBRsxZlvdnq9YWB03V/3k1/LDjcYGUUSACKZ3u7zBAPZA/h0/0DJhr3TYUUotHvG0insi5LcwY1FRwCuTsBbZN5E4U_w) Peter, last night Henry Cuellar **did not earn** 50% of the vote — which means half of the district is ready for new leadership in Congress.

And in 83 days, we’re headed into a runoff election and on May 24th, I expect to be the Democratic nominee for this district.

Why? Because this district is ready for change — what we saw last night only showed that Cuellar has lost support from the district. **After years of failed leadership, and an active FBI investigation, South Texas is ready to oust Cuellar, an anti-choice, corporate, Big Oil-funded incumbent.**

[**_What we raise in the next 24 hours will fund our next steps and winning strategy for May. And we’re ready for the fight. There is no better time than now to contribute. clean_body: We’re headed to a runoff in 83 days — everything is on the line. | | | Peter, last night Henry Cuellar did not earn 50% of the vote — which means half of the district is ready for new leadership in Congress. And in 83 days, we’re headed into a runoff election and on May 24th, I expect to be the Democratic nominee for this district. Why? Because this district is ready for change — what we saw last night only showed that Cuellar has lost support from the district. After years of failed leadership, and an active FBI investigation, South Texas is ready to oust Cuellar, an anti-choice, corporate, Big Oil-funded incumbent. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m running for Congress to fight to ensure healthcare is treated as a human right, protect reproductive freedom for all, and work to bring economic, social, and environmental justice to communities who need it the most. Our campaign is rooted in the fight for our dreams, not corporate interests. All of our neighbors in South Texas deserve the same chance to thrive — by expanding healthcare, economic recovery from the pandemic, and breathing quality, non-polluted air. And we’re ready to fight with everything we’ve got to make that a reality. Let’s bring it home, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Jesse (iPhone)
subject: Pathetic Performance from Joe Biden.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
America needs Presidents like Abraham Lincoln and Ronald Reagan, not Joe Biden. Peter, _**D**_** _o you remember what a Commander-in-Chief is supposed to look like?_** For **YEARS** America looked to our Presidents for reassurance in turbulent times. **It didn’t matter if the nation was in a Civil War or a Cold War, we had strong leaders to look to. ** But after seeing the State of the Union, it’s abundantly clear that right now, we simply don’t have that. Instead we have Joe Biden and a whole list of troubles: 🛒 Barren Shelves ⛽️ Skyrocketing Gas Prices 🚫 Chaos in Europe and Afghanistan 🧱 Open Borders 🚔 Spikes in Crime across America 📈 Highest Inflation Rate in the 21st Century! **I could go on, but** I need to know what YOU think! **[Did you like Joe Biden’s State of the Union address? Or do you have a different vision of America?>>](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=8210bd1f45d3460ba2a008f0f3875171&_e=fuMrct3fXkDkT6eLiRKUiR8jhmwA_-t9f2OgaDF2vXw1PZcXapPdC49E1c_Ex29vOmBzd2MXnW8AVDm7QpKqLZ3jTc-DUBFg_QPrvOWe7OITeTCBsGjgEVgqbI9lk18xmAWYwkrL3WS_Jh7Mf8y91Mu5EknvcZh2tFHEzjq-GZ7cfzW1u-vtPR2aEzBTI_jPv4JA7LEL1NHMxK5YHC-3zUFiEbozQIiY1DgyTCnXkYvX5ONuaDWWnYpVHROQmA-wCC-KnKSibdqNP4zrheEsOwdP9h2A4WOUo7axse7QIpCI5hhVr8iTA0QeWSMFIKi4_lQBcRGwDv8_fUDFkKjQMsUmXLu8TPcGZ08CYL7a0e50O1MS37FOzAMxiEegogrbfv9vSmATlSZDVOX-w2a1FU-P6sNMXjdCIkSWIezirihv_JDjSbHB-mo17erl1vJC)** [**RESPOND NOW**](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=8210bd1f45d3460ba2a008f0f3875171&_e=fuMrct3fXkDkT6eLiRKUiR8jhmwA_-t9f2OgaDF2vXw1PZcXapPdC49E1c_Ex29vOmBzd2MXnW8AVDm7QpKqLZ3jTc-DUBFg_QPrvOWe7OITeTCBsGjgEVgqbI9lk18xmAWYwkrL3WS_Jh7Mf8y91Mu5EknvcZh2tFHEzjq-GZ7cfzW1u-vtPR2aEzBTI_jPv4JA7LEL1NHMxK5YHC-3zUFiEbozQIiY1DgyTCnXkYtI2kC24_t8DuD-t3FR6kEa5IWJ19jrvld14Z-2ue6qKl0z0ntIhbMsVkRqjT_kvOKhzDiSTKSHiuG5Q79npeca4XGBya-RDOXs46jI9wQd6FzHO8Gsof6cWhfEl-Xk8P4Pmv7M9ypN94pcFnYZnaA2M9zsks7P9pRk92vWs-mWg6uhSiCptH8w3OxBlXDUmGR_eY1TDTuILFO3WEUBW2Ir) Thank you for reading, [](http://links.jessejensen4congress.com/u/click?_t=786fb8edbf8a46a08085e4b6fadd3f18&_m=8210bd1f45d3460ba2a008f0f3875171&_e=fuMrct3fXkDkT6eLiRKUiR8jhmwA_-t9f2OgaDF2vXw1PZcXapPdC49E1c_Ex29vOmBzd2MXnW8AVDm7QpKqLZ3jTc-DUBFg_QPrvOWe7OITeTCBsGjgEVgqbI9lk18xmAWYwkrL3WS_Jh7Mf8y91Mu5EknvcZh2tFHEzjq-GZ7cfzW1u-vtPR2aEzBTI_jPv4JA7LEL1NHMxK5YHC-3zUFiEbozQIiY1DgyTCnXkYtVngZjpn0MwssQ4KnuwcHleLowM-WBaFeKA-LZMbiXt5po3L4MVVlRCyeXBElOT9FVco3xmxoINd2UYp73baaoV5ITsotdZ-k_6PaQgDpa6oI4zG1qXsbRTsrGKZyUqatSH6XevkBqr2eH3gROSmzoqUkGscQJwP8OiHv6kbVkwzH1odD77050VWYBYKkgmLS5_kaj4VoCp0lf273FNEbl) Jesse Jensen _Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. I could go on, but I need to know what YOU think! Thank you for reading, Jesse Jensen Jesse Jensen is an Army Ranger, small-businessman, father, and husband. In the Army, he led troops in combat and took out high-value targets. Now, he’s taking on the politicians in D.C. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB, TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY. Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress

clean_body: I’ll make this quick... Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this Peter – Americans take issue with progressives’ Build Back Broke agenda. We’re tired of spending more to fill up our tanks, heat our home, and feed our families. We’re tired of government mandates being rammed down our throats at every turn. But most of all... we’re tired of losing. Joe Biden and his progressive cohorts have proven one thing: we need the America First agenda! And I’m determined to make that vision a reality. I’ve been outspoken about the crazy policies coming out of the Biden administration and Congress. ...and my commitment to the America First agenda and MAGA principles are why the National Republican Congressional Committee named me an “On their Radar” candidate. It means our campaign has the momentum and grassroots support in a competitive race. But I’m working to achieve “Young Gun” status so I can work with other principled conservatives to That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Catalina Lauf andI’m running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative in Illinois’ 11th Congressional District against Pelosi puppet Bill Foster. I was born and raised in this district – and I KNOW what issues matter to my friends, family, and neighbors. We care about a thriving economy, protecting individual liberties, and making it possible for our children to achieve the American Dream. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi continually throw this GARBAGE socialist agenda at us, and Bill Foster is complicit! Foster’s an out-of-touch tax-and-spend politician who is a secure vote for EVERY Biden/Pelosi bill wreacking our economy and our country. We can’t afford to continue on this disastrous path that Biden and Pelosi have put our country on. It’s time to take our country back from crooks like Nancy Pelosi. It’s time to protect the American Dream from the Left’s socialist nightmare. It’s time to defend our individual freedoms before Washington consumes them. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. It’s time to Make America Make Sense Again. Together, we can accomplish that! In liberty, Catalina Lauf | | | | Paid for by Catalina for Congress | | P.O. body:
Join the ranks | I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email. While millions of Americans are...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59717143:6EdAb4ENG:m:1:3253819041:57CA835E709FA0322710B0DEE73D6D94:r)

Peter,

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59717143:6EdAb4ENG:m:1:3253819041:57CA835E709FA0322710B0DEE73D6D94:r)**_

The select few in my Inner Friend Circle will be exposed to confidential information _\- information that I trust will not be shared with anyone else -_ and are the ones I will rely on to tell me the TRUTH.

I am only inviting a very small number of Patriots to join. Invitations do not come around often, Peter, so please do not take this lightly.

**[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY and you'll instantly join the ranks in my Inner Friend Circle.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59717143:6EdAb4ENG:m:1:3253819041:57CA835E709FA0322710B0DEE73D6D94:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59717147:6EdAb4ENG:m:1:3253819041:57CA835E709FA0322710B0DEE73D6D94:r)**

It's important you know that our movement is far from over. In fact, it's only just begun.

I'm going to send important information to my Inner Friend Circle very soon. Make sure you join IMMEDIATELY, or you'll miss it.

_**[Contribute RIGHT NOW to join my Inner Friend Circle and get on the official roster.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59717143:6EdAb4ENG:m:1:3253819041:57CA835E709FA0322710B0DEE73D6D94:r)**_

This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

One can only imagine why; with record inflation, rising gas prices, open borders, empty grocery shelves, war in Ukraine and the Taliban once again in control of Afghanistan. Biden took no responsibility for any of it. Americans can't afford another two years of total Democrat domination in Washington. It's time for the great state of Wisconsin to stand with me to win back the House.[ _**A donation of $20.22 today will make sure we oust these radical Democrats.**_](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qchra-yuhdluddtl-y/) [<< DONATE $20.22 >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qchra-yuhdluddtl-j/) We don't need lip service, we need leadership. But we aren't getting it from Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. All eyes are on the swing state of Wisconsin this midterm, and Democrats are already pouring in resources to turn Wisconsin blue in 2022. We can't let them get away with it! A victory in the House will be key to ending these radical policies crumbling our great nation. | | Friend,

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: What Laura Ingraham said
body:
Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she’s a “boy” and hid it from her mother... So, we
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk7tlal2lideqdh3augghjo7edfd2i01mef6dhi0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u3ib2cdl62ob2sjlcor38srh69ojfcb461onbdln6urj6odgepg76dtmmji39ptnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchmcoo7ecr46upb6phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cdj60pb2cpj649fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztroduvcqnpmplfmd6icipp8n20mqrvfd9n541jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) Dear Fellow Conservative, Radical activist teachers brainwashed a 12-year-old girl to think she’s a “boy” and hid it from her mother... So, we’re dragging the teachers and school into court to make them pay for their disgusting actions and stop this from happening to other children. [**But to win this critical case I need your help today. That is why I’m asking you to join me by donating to make sure these radical teachers can’t brainwash any more children.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1rsqd8mabnpkptcp7nedlqil2p4vssdhhkkrfrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) In case you missed the details of our case when I announced it with Laura Ingraham on her great **Fox News** show **The Ingraham Angle** let me recap it for you. One day Jessica Konen, a mother of a young 12-year-old girl in middle school was called in and told by the school that her daughter was now a “boy.” What she found out was that over the past several months teachers indoctrinated her sixth-grade daughter into believing she was transgender and bisexual. Her daughter didn’t even know what those two words meant until these sick activist teachers infected her daughter with their twisted beliefs... The teachers recruited Jessica’s daughter to join their “Equality Club” where she was told she may be transgender and bisexual. The teachers then helped her to create a totally new identity with new names, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom. They even created a “Gender Support Plan” for her and instructed the faculty to use her new male name and pronouns -- ALL without her mother’s knowledge. And worse than that -- **these radical teachers told Jessica’s daughter NOT to tell her mom because she couldn’t be “trusted**.” The actions of these teachers and the school are sickening... They intentionally hid their radical indoctrination from Jessica -- even though the Supreme Court has consistently ruled that parents have the right to control their children’s education. Left-wing activist teachers, administrators and schools are out-of-control... It’s disgusting. It’s awful. And we have to stop them. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. [**Will you join me to make these Left-wing activist teachers and the school pay for their illegal actions?** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpn4e1v54g40594k2q2h1vbk1ug2lnm5i3398fko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) You see, we are suing the school AND the teachers for their illegal actions... Because the only way we’re going to stop these activist teachers and administrators is to drag them into court. The fact is that we have no idea how many other children this is happening to across the country -- Jessica’s daughter is just one example. We know the California Department of Education and the teachers’ associations train schools and teachers to keep secrets from parents... Who knows how many other young children are being poisoned? Left-wing radicals are using our classrooms to brainwash our children and grandchildren with their sick-and-twisted views. And we have an opportunity to stop it. This lawsuit puts every single activist teacher, administrator and school on notice -- if you mess with our children, **we will see you in court**! They should be teaching our children math, reading and history -- not pushing them to become transgender or bisexual. But, to stop this from happening -- we need to win this case... That’s why I’m asking for your help immediately today. [_**Will you please step up and make a generous donation to help us drag these radical activists to court?** _](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmf3mefa912kjqq6k54ksaqur6ki6a8b1l95fdd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) And please know here at the Center for American Liberty we don’t just file lawsuits -- we **WIN****** them!! My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on **Newsmax** and **Fox News** with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson, Shannon Bream** and **Fox and Friends**. I’ve been on a lot talking about our numerous legal battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We’ve already won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court. We’re also taking the fight to big tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop activist teachers from corrupting and hurting our children and grandchildren is so important -- it’s one we cannot afford to lose. [**That’s why, I’m asking if you can give today -- $35, $50, $100, $250 or more. I will use it to protect our children and grandchildren from the radical Left.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zapjsvusirvn5c6gg361h6eevk6anv0b1f2f2v30_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) So, the next time a radical teacher wants to poison another child with their sick beliefs they’ll know that we’re watching and are ready to drag them into court... That is the only way we’re going to stop them -- they have to fear the consequences of their actions! With your help, we’ll hold these teachers accountable for brainwashing and grooming their young students- and we’ll put all radical leftist teachers on notice that they won’t get away with their plot to indoctrinate our kids and erase our parental rights. Thank you in advance for your support. **God Bless,** **Harmeet K. Dhillon** **Founder & CEO,** **The Center for American Liberty** [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl0is8rb24f4au81c4p32lsspsf9fr6o3vet6vso_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) P.S. Radical activist teachers in California tricked a 12-year-old girl into believing she was transgender and bisexual. They helped her change into a “boy” with a new identity a new name and new pronouns -- **and told her to hide it from her mother.** Now we’re dragging these activist teachers and the school into court to pay for their abuse of her young daughter, and I need your help to win. [That’s why I’m asking you to give an emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 to stop these radical liberals from poisoning our children. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5bopvod713qvdm7jjm9680u8k8okttsu8676k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) We must win this case and put every single Left-wing teacher and school on notice -- if you infect our children with your radical values we will drag you into court too! [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z288mqh08g8d2ifk16is2nh71b36m3e8aq19thko_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfa1a78sik5d3std4dtm2lr1ukct713sa8tm0co_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) [**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgq43fpag5mc0lkj2pnut6a78sbgr10fpqklc6ng_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
© The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zse2bjgad79jgdvcp68a8d4d5crdeijbsttcq79g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6cph2bs) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Shepherd - Father - King
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zm3mo8gmdrbrb6traltmbsunltl80tgr97prcfbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sdks2rm8t1lm5hj3cjjelpbedplcurb3d9mc1pndd9n6moe2dthmspmat5jekoefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphgespm8dtimdj39o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqn16t4jiuvg7f8sarcchv55lm30aaavsbpran40_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zuct6hsq8f0nrlt4e21r5i43gp3mhndgn41e73gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6c9h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7ue988p23mqa4b5g2a54rmk64phafcnt8roq9n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2tbsssg52t685stg1jagtjjddk0s7co0lf9jhg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg6aoj6c9h2bs)**
---

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfkuedgnshi8opmkrqltaidhlrv1iphv1ova9ii0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cdj60pb2cph649fg)

body:

Peter,

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719595:6GS6o4EfN:m:1:3317145305:38F217F27C8FF4EC33F94E0EA568C00C:r)**_

The select few in my Inner Friend Circle will be exposed to confidential information _\- information that I trust will not be shared with anyone else -_ and are the ones I will rely on to tell me the TRUTH.

I am only inviting a very small number of Patriots to join. Invitations do not come around often, Peter, so please do not take this lightly.

This is horrible news,

It’s regarding your credit card purchase records.

They’ve been exposed.

As of March 3rd, 2022, over 13 government agencies have full access to your entire credit card purchase history.

Here’s why this is very bad for you,

Even if you think you have nothing to hide...

All it takes is for them to find ANY purchases they deem as “suspicious”... and they could easily:

Investigate you for “extremist activity”

Freeze your assets

Even throw you in jail!

So if you’ve purchased any guns, ammo, survival supplies, or anything like that in the past 10 years...

You need to know 3 simple steps to become invisible to this disgusting surveillance of your finances.

You can see exactly what they are in the new and FREE book “Avoiding the Eye” by Richard Marshall.

Which part of your car talks to Big Brother... and how to shut it up.

How common appliances spy on you

- and how to blindfold them for good.

Even though they can listen to your phone... you can do this simple thing to block them.

And more!

The CIA openly admitted before Congress all of this is happening.

And that’s why the author of “Avoiding the Eye”, Richard Marshall, wants you to have his new book for Free

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

!

Marshall is one of the top survivalists in the nation and claims to have extensive government connections – wants to keep Americans informed and protected.

So he’s decided to give a few copies of his incredible book away for Free.

And while Richard's nice... he ain’t rich. Which means supplies are limited to just 200 copies - and a ton have already been claimed.

To keep the government’s nose out of your business click here and get your Free copy before the rest are gone.

[http://c4network.go2cloud.org/aff_c?offer_id=275&aff_id=1072&aff_sub=ILMG_1634]

Thank You.

name: American Defense News
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—espe
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeqtaqdl9iokneh0trln74pg3puq7jcfj9oh8tpo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq76chjcpg70pbmm1hj2o9jm6or6o3mc6rb6d5m6grrfd3jmsojddb4e1i32tb7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj30tpjchjreor66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hmco30s3j60oh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9j3sb6mugep26jtu6vem72qrogionfmt94ogmt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg61o76c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhadj67gma281fvgj48t9g1vhjtqi5jiieaq3qmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg61o76c1h2bs)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziao5s04qh9e834o957248p7ituevmtuubdv4gl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg61o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj1c6u1pv69r1b61mhifdkduhh9rt2su44ap4vmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg61o76c1h2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zk599rqnf5s8svcim093bq4hnnaplu1omvh480ho).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5o3ckg30iim38gb0p5r1rh2phqtce4usg699o40_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpg61o76c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
| | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719605:6u-3G4EN0:m:1:3317145305:BFDA9668FA6207808D6C008F5528CCAB:r)
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719605:6u-3G4EN0:m:1:3317145305:BFDA9668FA6207808D6C008F5528CCAB:r)
---
| | | Peter,

Every word from Joe Biden tonight in his State of the Union speech was a lie.

When Biden talked about flag draped coffins I couldn't help but call him out for causing the deaths of 13 brave members of our military who lost their lives because of his gross incompetence during the withdrawal from Afghanistan.

We expected bad, but the #SOTU is worse than we ever could've imagined.

Let's take our country back in 2022 --[donate today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719606:6u-3G4EN0:m:1:3317145305:BFDA9668FA6207808D6C008F5528CCAB:r) and help us ensure victory!

[**> >> WATCH VIDEO: SOTU RESPONSE <<<**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719605:6u-3G4EN0:m:1:3317145305:BFDA9668FA6207808D6C008F5528CCAB:r)

[**laurenforfreedom.com/sotu**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719605:6u-3G4EN0:m:1:3317145305:BFDA9668FA6207808D6C008F5528CCAB:r)

Watch my [personal Rapid Response video](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59719605:6u-3G4EN0:m:1:3317145305:BFDA9668FA6207808D6C008F5528CCAB:r) to Biden's speech and let's end his AMERICA LAST Agenda.

Thank you and God Bless America,

Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA RELEASES NEW AD HIGHLIGHTING EFFORTS, RECRUITING VOLUNTEERS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MARCH 3, 2022
GREATER GEORGIA RELEASES NEW AD HIGHLIGHTING EFFORTS, RECRUITING VOLUNTEERS
ATLANTA - Today, Greater Georgia released a new ad encouraging volunteers to join its existing volunteer base - and highlighting the organization's efforts to fight for conservative values, restore voter confidence, engage diverse communities, and register new voters ahead of the 2022 election. The ad, which features 15- and 30-second versions, is part of a statewide buy across digital and SMS platforms.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sT82a3rBvsaHJ78oo_KwObJ7QYjvr-fM59Yy_RIRvTK4-O6g30mSAD5rr2yHYfAj42QyGyrey9TFwie-3R2Q6v6qez-6fcCFjZI0B6XEFFdxD7QilVTIHoYtfxpReoMHJJz6QtB_aoPAUrNEHXa42g==&c=suSXoSzWY3i-2Q2U2COSD8hN0iWGXr-43687XLxWJ51ueFnSUOA71w==&ch=JbKI_6MAFLEKOhmwczzof_chbe5apZyKcqkOk1VKSf7QDL7ZrJ8GhQ==) or the image below to watch the full ad:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sT82a3rBvsaHJ78oo_KwObJ7QYjvr-fM59Yy_RIRvTK4-O6g30mSAD5rr2yHYfAj42QyGyrey9TFwie-3R2Q6v6qez-6fcCFjZI0B6XEFFdxD7QilVTIHoYtfxpReoMHJJz6QtB_aoPAUrNEHXa42g==&c=suSXoSzWY3i-2Q2U2COSD8hN0iWGXr-43687XLxWJ51ueFnSUOA71w==&ch=JbKI_6MAFLEKOhmwczzof_chbe5apZyKcqkOk1VKSf7QDL7ZrJ8GhQ==)
---
| View the transcript of the ad below:
[VOLUNTEER]: Greater Georgia: it is all about giving Georgians a voice.
[GG OUTREACH COORDINATOR]: Let's talk about why we need you back out there. A lot of people are just waiting till the last minute to really say, "Oh, I'm going to get involved," when it's November -- No, people need you now.
[GG OUTREACH COORDINATOR]: What Greater Georgia's doing is, we're keeping that infrastructure year-round. If nobody feels like their vote counts, why go out and vote and why trust democracy?
[VOLUNTEER]: You see everything that's going on in our country today? That's what you get when you stay at home.
---
| ###

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: TPPA Weekly Call to Action: Mar. 3rd: Keystone Pipeline
body:
| |
---
The “State of the Union” was two nights ago, but it wasn’t an honest accounting of the current state of America.

We were hoping there would be a reversal on many policies, and particularly on the issue of energy independence (which is also a national security issue). We didn’t really expect it, but we hoped. Alas, there was no reversal of Biden’s disastrous energy policies, and so it is time for a hard push to reopen the Keystone Pipeline as the first step back towards American energy independence.

**In this week’s call-to-action**
* Reopen the Keystone Pipeline!
* Election Integrity Pennsylvania Tour

* Other active AlignAct campaigns

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwNjItMGIyNTY3NTZjMGFhNDI2ZTk3OTU3MzI1OGEyMGEyNzAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3Jlb3Blbi10aGUta2V5c3RvbmUtcGlwZWxpbmU_bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/UWjhlV-3W53oltJj1klQ3g)
**Reopen the Keystone Pipeline!**

Under President Trump, America was energy independent, exporting energy to other nations, and we (and the world) were safer as a result. One of the pieces of our energy independence was the Keystone Pipeline.

Within hours of being sworn in, Joe Biden cancelled the permits for the pipeline, killing the project. Now we see, in real time, the consequences of his actions, as we import energy from Russia, and in effect, are helping to fund their invasion of Ukraine.

Furthermore, Biden and the radical left that owns him want to exploit current events to stop Americans from using oil and gas full stop. Remember their motto, never let a crisis go to waste.

[**Use our newest AlignAct campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwNjItMGIyNTY3NTZjMGFhNDI2ZTk3OTU3MzI1OGEyMGEyNzAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3Jlb3Blbi10aGUta2V5c3RvbmUtcGlwZWxpbmU_bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/pAnLkSKJh8TWHHmRswEeUg) to contact the White House and your own Representative and Senators with just a click of a button, and tell them all to **reopen the Keystone Pipeline!**
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIwNjItMGIyNTY3NTZjMGFhNDI2ZTk3OTU3MzI1OGEyMGEyNzAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL3Jlb3Blbi10aGUta2V5c3RvbmUtcGlwZWxpbmU_bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/99yTol_r96mFpev8g7wZ6A)
|
---
The Democrats and the Biden administration are attempting to cover up pandemic relief fraud estimated at $80 billion, [charges](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) Rep. Kevin Brady (R-Texas), ranking member of the House Ways and Means Committee.

Meanwhile, in one of the most under-reported stories of the week, Biden [extended](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._H_2n94c_A) the national COVID-19 emergency pandemic indefinitely. Biden’s move comes even as a number of Democrat governors are ending some of their COVID mandates, including [New York](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/6UcL9nwgNGt0YrR6KYPkyg), [New Jersey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), [Connecticut](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), and [Illinois](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/DxIYQP_avAUfpwFRwenH7w). The administration has already abused the emergency powers to extend eviction moratoriums and delay student loan repayments. [Extending his own “emergency” powers](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) provides the president with undue power to cause mischief.
|

[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/NJXlTIx9KbcUATK5oRIi6A)
**Pennsylvania Tour**

If you live in Pennsylvania (or know people who do), this is a reminder that our Election Integrity tour starts next week, on March 7th! Please use the links below to RSPV as soon as possible, and share with friends!
[RSVP](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/EcGK46CYnnHeh75xzCsgHg)
|
---
Democrats are [willing to do whatever it takes](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to win in 2022 and in future elections. The party's popularity is cratering because of Biden's disastrous leadership, but they see a way out. Democrats want to pass the "Freedom to Cheat" Act, allowing them to rig elections.

According to David McIntosh and Scott Perry, "the left's plan for winning elections going forward is to rig the rules and undermine our republic. Democrats have pinned their reelection hopes on trashing Americans' photo ID safeguards, allowing illegal aliens and non-citizens to vote in our elections, and a host of other rules to tip future elections in their favor. They hypocritically pursue their self-aggrandizing agenda - even though voter ID enjoys the overwhelming support of 81% of voters, according to an Honest Elections Project poll."

Conservatives need to stand against these measures and make sure Democrats can't take over our electoral system.
|
---
**Other AlignAct Campaigns & Action Items**

The following campaign are still active because we are still forced to fight these battles. Please consider adding them to your activism this week, even if you already used them before. The way AlignAct is set up, you can do it again and again. So, with the click of a button, you can send another round of emails to companies who are still masking employees and to the White House.

[**Companies: Let your employees breathe**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ1MDE3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/QMKT5F7wS9Xd6L7DM2JW3g)

****
[**Biden must cease all mask & vax mandates**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-qO748xbVHpmnH1Sht5BZA)
|
---
Joe Biden recently held an event to position himself as leading efforts to repair America's dysfunctional supply chain. During the event, he promised [$35 million to a Las Vegas-based company, MP Materials](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). Alarmingly, the White House is either unaware of, or is ignoring a U.S. Department of Energy warning to government scientists[ not to collaborate with MP Materials](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-RFV0B00pfT7H0A), because the company is almost a tenth-owned by a Chinese investor, Shenghe Resources Holding, and is disturbingly dependent upon Chinese sales and technical expertise.

_The Washington Free Beacon_ reports:
"Shenghe Resources Holding, which is partially owned by the Chinese government, owns 8 percent of the company. Shenge spearheaded the deal in 2017 to help MP Materials purchase a mine at Mountain Pass, Calif., out of bankruptcy. The Chinese company is also MP Materials' largest customer, accounting for nearly all of its $100 million annual revenue."

Setting security concerns aside, the White House [has yet to explain](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) how investing taxpayer dollars in the Chinese Communist Party will somehow make the United States more self-sufficient and _less_ reliant upon China.
|

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Harriet Hageman for WY-AL
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 3, 2022
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Harriet Hageman for Wyoming At-Large
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Harriet Hageman for Wyoming's At-Large Congressional District.
Protect Freedom PAC has had independent expenditure campaigns totaling $11.5 million since 2018.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Liz Cheney is a RINO that turned her back on freedom-loving conservatives and the people she swore to protect and fight for in DC. The people of the great state of Wyoming deserve better. Harriet Hageman is a proven leader with a solid record of fighting for liberty and freedom. She's ready to take the fight to Washington and to stand firm for the people of Wyoming."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal offices in 2018 and 2020 and looks to expand its reach for the 2022 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 3, 2022 | Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014 | | | Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Harriet Hageman for Wyoming At-Large | | Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Harriet Hageman for Wyoming's At-Large Congressional District. Protect Freedom PAC has had independent expenditure campaigns totaling $11.5 million since 2018. Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated: "Liz Cheney is a RINO that turned her back on freedom-loving conservatives and the people she swore to protect and fight for in DC. The people of the great state of Wyoming deserve better. Harriet Hageman is a proven leader with a solid record of fighting for liberty and freedom. She's ready to take the fight to Washington and to stand firm for the people of Wyoming." Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal offices in 2018 and 2020 and looks to expand its reach for the 2022 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President. | | | | Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: We must engage them aggressively
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWOgAMBHMN

Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But
recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of
American life.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWOgAMBHMN

Dear
fellow American,

Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But
recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of
American life.

Today it
asserts itself in many forms-including critical race theory-in
our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the
media, in sports, and even in our military.

The
recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American
K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national
conversation.

The
breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed
patriotism-without which self-government is impossible-is not
something we can allow to continue.

While
there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done
to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead.

Education
is where this attack on America began-and it is the battlefield
on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and
limited constitutional government.

Hillsdale
College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We
are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who
agree with Hillsdale's mission, to redouble our efforts at this
crucial time for our nation-no matter the cost.

That's
why we are expanding our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by
Reaching and Teaching Millions in 2022.

You can
support this vital project through this link:
https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations

The
Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching
Millions will give informed patriots across the country the
effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we
need your help.

The
project has three key objectives:

Expand the circulation of Imprimis, our digest of liberty, to
reach millions more Americans.

Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans)
enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101:
The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American
Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "American
Citizenship and Its Decline" with Victor Davis Hanson.

Launch additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter
schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, our American
classical K-12 curriculum (including the new Hillsdale 1776
Curriculum) to thousands more American teachers and
homeschoolers.

And your
generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

Hillsdale
College conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty-as it does all of its work-while refusing to accept one
penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of
federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to
expand this effective program, we will need thousands of gifts
between $25 and $100. This is the range in which most supporters
give. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000
donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

We
urgently need your help.

You can
safely and securely renew your support using this link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/preserve-freedom-for-future-generations

As the
forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to
undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and
to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage
them ever more aggressively-including on the central battlefield
of education.

That's
why I hope you'll make your most generous gift in this critical
year for America.

Every
dollar you can give will help expand our Project to Defend
Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions in 2022.

Thank you
for your generosity. I hope you'll stand with us. Together, we
will work to preserve freedom for future generations of
Americans.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:

Hi Peter, it's Abby. Do you have a minute? I'm emailing you to talk about why my race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is so critical. You see, if we flip Iowa blue, Democrats will be virtually _guaranteed_ to maintain Senate control – and right now, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **He's facing record-high disapproval ratings.**
**[The Senate is split 50-50, so winning in Iowa could be the one race that keeps the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands. That's why I'm reaching out to you again. We have the momentum, but we need grassroots resources to win: Can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42498347/333194469/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk732-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjE4ZjRlOS1mYTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGkJNJY_EDMChD5yzTpQQIJ9MrlKKs59L3yxmoZqj7Q=)**
Sen. Grassley hasn't seen warning signs like this before, and the GOP knows it too. That's why the Senate Republican campaign arm has already attacked me, and it's why Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Des Moines to endorse Sen. Grassley. I'm more than ready to take on Grassley, McConnell, Trump and the rest of the GOP establishment – _bullies don't scare me. _

**But Republicans across the nation will be spending MILLIONS to take back the Senate and stop Democratic challengers like me. So, I'm going to need grassroots supporters like you to get this campaign across the finish line – $10, $20, $50 at a time.**
**With nearly two-thirds of Iowans ready for new leadership and Sen. Grassley facing record-high disapproval ratings, we have an unprecedented opportunity in Iowa. We cannot let it pass us by. [So please, can you rush a donation of $5 or more right now to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and flip this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42498348/333194470/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk732-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjE4ZjRlOS1mYTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGkJNJY_EDMChD5yzTpQQIJ9MrlKKs59L3yxmoZqj7Q=)**
Thanks for all that you do,
Abby

Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. 6890 E. Fellow Patriot,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

Our grassroots movement has been building for two weeks and now it’s go time. The amazing support from patriots all across the country has allowed us to get this far, **[but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu49m27g91qofd9uu81bob9f2ufeg7t9kl8qhgo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpi66o31cth2bs "but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.")**
**_[FILL A GAS TANK](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2gou57pc8ei0q7o6hi240n3jdh0a6pf0lng0gog_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpi66o31cth2bs "FILL A GAS TANK")_**
This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

**[We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo3cs3i1qkjklsemj8hdavj0iq7u1ao3rvcdlm6g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpi66o31cth2bs "We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.")**

The more trucks we get to the Freedom Rally, the more the politicians in DC will listen to our leadership delegation when they go meet with lawmakers.

In Freedom,

American Truckers Freedom Convoy

Friends, Just wanted to throw a reminder at you this crazy week. Our team has fought hard on the streets of Anaheim and Santa Ana and found that **44% of voters surveyed support Mike. Only about 12% support Lou Correa. **The rest - **~43% are still undecided.** We need to reach them, and the rest of the district. This is our race to lose - but we need your help to cover the costs of California administrative costs i.e. candidate filing fees. This is a sort of barrier to working-class candidates like me that don't take corporate money. Let me be clear - we're not asking for you to make up for the thousands of dollars that they demand. [We're asking you to chip in $10, $27, or $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42501647/333208275/-1631718953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA0YjIyMC1mZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OxwFK-KMFyhqn9JO5MZa5_-0hwaIdTR9GXEUfGYvK50=) -_and more importantly_ \- to **fight with us** to help raise the money we need to keep fighting for real progress for working people on a national stage. The way to do that: **reply to this email to get plugged into our efforts** [(or click here to sign up)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42501649/333208277/-1018217036?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTA0YjIyMC1mZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OxwFK-KMFyhqn9JO5MZa5_-0hwaIdTR9GXEUfGYvK50=&emci=e165d431-809a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8504b220-fe9a-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=12523946)\- _we know it will work_ , we just need **you****r** help. We're asking people to go through their rolodex and call or text 10 friends or family members to do the same - $10, $27, or $50, to help keep this dream alive. I know you will come through, because so much hinges upon it.

clean_body: We need your help to keep marching towards victory | = Friends, Just wanted to throw a reminder at you this crazy week. Our team has fought hard on the streets of Anaheim and Santa Ana and found that 44% of voters surveyed support Mike. Only about 12% support Lou Correa. The rest - ~43% are still undecided. We need to reach them, and the rest of the district. This is our race to lose - but we need your help to cover the costs of California administrative costs i.e. candidate filing fees. This is a sort of barrier to working-class candidates like me that don't take corporate money. Let me be clear - we're not asking for you to make up for the thousands of dollars that they demand. = -and more importantly \- to fight with us to help raise the money we need to keep fighting for real progress for working people on a national stage. The way to do that: reply to this email to get plugged into our efforts \- we know it will work , we just need your help. We're asking people to go through their rolodex and call or text 10 friends or family members to do the same - $10, $27, or $50, to help keep this dream alive. I know you will come through, because so much hinges upon it. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Para la próxima generación, Mike Ortega | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can.
