clean_body: Peter, I’m so excited to share that my name is OFFICIALLY on the ballot for U.S. Congress in California’s 23rd district! Earlier this week, I filed my paperwork for candidacy. An oath, a few signatures, hundreds of volunteers, and countless donors all made this moment possible. Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve maintained our momentum and successfully stayed the ONLY Democratic in the race, holding other primary challengers at bay. How did we do it? We raised hundreds of thousands of dollars and showed the strength of our movement from the beginning. Thousands of supporters like you have invested in our campaign, demonstrating our widespread support across California and the country. We are only THREE short months away from our primary and it’s crucial that we turn out every Democrat we can in preparation for the general election. =# = Together, we have shown that California’s 23rd doesn’t have to continue to elect a Republican who doesn’t serve them just because it’s been done before. We have built a movement thousands of people strong. We will take this race all the way to victory in the June primary and beyond to the general election in November because we have what my opponent doesn’t: people power. =# Let’s win this thing. For a Green New Deal. For Medicare for All. For affordable housing. For LGBTQ+ rights.For the people. In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdq9tdc4qq3mqfio8tnrh968nbm115t3df5f9r70_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj60ob6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfdc3n68r72pj5ekpb8cb2c6r3adjjc2qbappk6qr74dph6ipjecbjmppb5cj1c1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1ddm61pb0phlcapm4ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrq3l79t9vh1k1l04r9grat8cn281p7f4mhhmhc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj60ob6c5h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z30hqj6s7ji7iq788qgt1lc31u0th0tbgj6uulsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj60ob6c5h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9kf7iun74knba6qfr3p2qfrlj4clmip12f0n9i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj60ob6c5h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3qln03qgvr3ubabdpi0rnt02qp2dam1iufr7ds0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj60ob6c5h2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zthtkfcgchhbfg3d7lmstiaiq2b9tuuhcr4prks8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj60ob6c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

**Pennsylvania Township Supervisors Elen Snyder, Dan Wood, Jennifer Herring, and Beth Staab just endorsed Ashley for Congress.**
Ashley is honored to have the support of local leaders across PA-01 who believe in our vision of change for working families. Here’s what they all had to say about Ashley:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522126/333268519/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220303SupervisorEndorsements_e4c_full_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWIxZDZlZS0xYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8ohHiA3PTEIdgB4Oil2HXAVLBHLL4Z9jr5wKhf5kPI=)
---
_"As Newtown Township Supervisor, it's essential to me that we have a representative in Congress who will work hard for our community, and who will protect future generations from the devastation of climate change. I am supporting Ashley Ehasz for Congress because she is an outspoken advocate for keeping our water supply safe and clean, and she will look for common sense solutions to build a green economy and a climate resilient workforce"_ _— Elen Snyder, Newtown Township Supervisor_
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522132/333268528/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220303SupervisorEndorsements_e4c_full_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWIxZDZlZS0xYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8ohHiA3PTEIdgB4Oil2HXAVLBHLL4Z9jr5wKhf5kPI=)
---
_"Ashley Ehasz, like so many young people and young parents here in Bucks County, has had to fight to get to where she is: from joining the Army at age 17 so that she could afford a college education, to graduating from West Point, commanding in the Army, and then being the first in her family to get a Master's degree from Oxford University of all places. Ashley has shown she has what it takes to flip PA-01 blue and represent us in Congress."_ _— Dan Wood, Doylestown Township Supervisor_
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522136/333268543/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220303SupervisorEndorsements_e4c_full_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWIxZDZlZS0xYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8ohHiA3PTEIdgB4Oil2HXAVLBHLL4Z9jr5wKhf5kPI=)
---
_“As a Democratic elected official, and as a woman, I believe it’s time to have a woman elected to Congress here in PA-01, and that is why I am so proud to endorse Ashley Ehasz for Congress. Her 13 years of military experience, including commanding over several hundred soldiers overseas, and the work she did at the county government level to implement the CARES act during the pandemic, makes me confident that she has what it takes to win against Brian Fitzpatrick, and the leadership we need to represent us in Washington!”_ _— Jennifer Herring, Doylestown Township Supervisor_
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522140/333268553/-1832414505?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220303SupervisorEndorsements_e4c_full_xx_img4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWIxZDZlZS0xYzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t8ohHiA3PTEIdgB4Oil2HXAVLBHLL4Z9jr5wKhf5kPI=)
---
_“Montgomery Township, and the people of Pennsylvania's First District, are ready for true leadership. Ashley Ehasz has led soldiers into battle, and now she is taking the fight to Washington. I am proud to endorse Ashley Ehasz, who I trust to stand up for reproductive rights, protect our environment, and fight for our democracy in Congress.”_ _— Beth Staab, Montgomery Township Supervisor_

clean_body: | = Folks, Coming off of last week’s endorsement by Bucks County Young Democrats, we are excited to announce the list of endorsers are growing! = | = Pennsylvania Township Supervisors Elen Snyder, Dan Wood, Jennifer Herring, and Beth Staab just endorsed Ashley for Congress. Ashley is honored to have the support of local leaders across PA-01 who believe in our vision of change for working families. Here’s what they all had to say about Ashley: = "As Newtown Township Supervisor, it's essential to me that we have a representative in Congress who will work hard for our community, and who will protect future generations from the devastation of climate change. I am supporting Ashley Ehasz for Congress because she is an outspoken advocate for keeping our water supply safe and clean, and she will look for common sense solutions to build a green economy and a climate resilient workforce" — Elen Snyder, Newtown Township Supervisor = "Ashley Ehasz, like so many young people and young parents here in Bucks County, has had to fight to get to where she is: from joining the Army at age 17 so that she could afford a college education, to graduating from West Point, commanding in the Army, and then being the first in her family to get a Master's degree from Oxford University of all places. Ashley has shown she has what it takes to flip PA-01 blue and represent us in Congress." — Dan Wood, Doylestown Township Supervisor = “As a Democratic elected official, and as a woman, I believe it’s time to have a woman elected to Congress here in PA-01, and that is why I am so proud to endorse Ashley Ehasz for Congress. Her 13 years of military experience, including commanding over several hundred soldiers overseas, and the work she did at the county government level to implement the CARES act during the pandemic, makes me confident that she has what it takes to win against Brian Fitzpatrick, and the leadership we need to represent us in Washington!” — Jennifer Herring, Doylestown Township Supervisor = “Montgomery Township, and the people of Pennsylvania's First District, are ready for true leadership. Ashley Ehasz has led soldiers into battle, and now she is taking the fight to Washington. I am proud to endorse Ashley Ehasz, who I trust to stand up for reproductive rights, protect our environment, and fight for our democracy in Congress.” — Beth Staab, Montgomery Township Supervisor = ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** **= ** **** | **= = ** | **= = By bringing people together, we can fight for a better future for all by bringing good-paying jobs, well-funded schools, affordable healthcare, and resources back to our state. Thank you for everything, we could not do this without you. Team Ehasz | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District: to provide our communities with the services and opportunities they need to thrive, to create positive change, and to ensure the next generation will have a better future ahead of them. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. clean_body: Can we count on you to rush a donation to help Governor Tony Evers win in Wisconsin? | | | = | | , Wisconsin Republicans are at it again: using Trump’s Big Lie as an excuse to shred our voting rights and give themselves the ability to more easily overturn future elections. Their package of new bills attacking our democracy would limit access to absentee ballots and give a Republican-controlled committee the ability to cripple election funding if they don’t get their way. The bottom line is this: Governor Tony Evers' tough reelection fight isn't the only thing on the ballot in Wisconsin right now. Making sure Tony wins is fundamental to protecting the right to vote in Wisconsin and our nation. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Onward, Team Tony Evers for Wisconsin Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click. name: Arne Duncan
subject: My friend John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
I know that John will make a difference as governor — he has comprehensive, progressive plans to address the issues facing Marylanders, the experience to make his vision a reality, and the drive to get it all done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522689/333271017/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220303&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=AD_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2247bd89-1e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ3YmQ4OS0xZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJgOJsCV51TPBzBhGWoiNaNm-P7MlssTI22aZLTdyFE=)

| Peter, I want to take a moment of your time to talk about a former colleague and a great friend who is running to be the next Governor of Maryland — John King. I have been a supporter of John since long before he got into this race. He was my successor as Secretary of Education under President Obama, and he did an incredible job carrying out and building upon the ambitious agenda that we developed during my tenure. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522690/333271018/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220303&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=AD_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2247bd89-1e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ3YmQ4OS0xZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJgOJsCV51TPBzBhGWoiNaNm-P7MlssTI22aZLTdyFE=) Anyone who meets John can tell you that he has the heart of someone who spent their life teaching and caring for others, and the determination and grit of someone who defied all odds to get where he is today. You can see it in his work — John has seen where Black and brown students are routinely underserved, and he has made it his mission to close opportunity gaps. I know that John will make a difference as governor — he has comprehensive, progressive plans to address the issues facing Marylanders, the experience to make his vision a reality, and the drive to get it all done. All he needs from the rest of us is the support to get him to Annapolis. _**[Can you pitch in to make John the next Governor of Maryland?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522691/333271019/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220303&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=AD_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2247bd89-1e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ3YmQ4OS0xZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJgOJsCV51TPBzBhGWoiNaNm-P7MlssTI22aZLTdyFE=)**_ I once said that education can be the difference between life and death. That was certainly true for John. As you may know, he lost both parents by the age of 12 and was moved around between family members and schools. And he always says that his public school teachers are the reason he made it through and is here today. Now, he wants to make sure that every child in this state has the same opportunities and support that he did. _**[If you are able, please give whatever you can to help support John’s campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42522692/333271020/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220303-b1_fr_actives-AD_S2_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220303&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=AD_S2_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2247bd89-1e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjQ3YmQ4OS0xZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJgOJsCV51TPBzBhGWoiNaNm-P7MlssTI22aZLTdyFE=)**_ I am proud to call John a friend — I hope that soon, I can also call him governor. Thank you, Arne Duncan
_Former Secretary of Education_

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Combating climate change
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
Climate change is one of the greatest existential threats to our way of life. With many of our communities living on or near the Chesapeake Bay, our state is especially vulnerable to the effects of rising sea levels and extreme weather events. That’s why as Maryland’s next Governor, I will take urgent action to make Maryland the first net zero state in the nation and a net supplier of renewable energy.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/av-HXh7bTUqHxGlKrUls9A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/av-HXh7bTUqHxGlKrUls9A2]Because Maryland’s government is a major consumer of power, the state has an opportunity to lead the private energy sector’s transition to renewables by creating and sustaining demand for renewable energy infrastructure. That’s why on Day One, I’ll sign an executive order requiring all energy consumed by state government to be created by 100% renewable energy where possible, with a mandate for full conversion to renewable energy by the end of my first term. Additionally, I’ll convert the entire fleet of state vehicles to electric.
I’ll also sign an executive order requiring more renewable energy to be created within Maryland than all energy consumed within the state. This would help motivate significant private sector investment in renewable energy infrastructure, and create more jobs for Marylanders.
If you agree that Maryland needs a Governor who will take climate change seriously, then will you add your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor to my plan to make Maryland the first net zero state in the nation? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/av-HXh7bTUqHxGlKrUls9A2]
We do not have the luxury to pass the buck on climate change to the next generation. The actions we take today will have enormous consequences for our future, which is why spearheading the transition to a new, green economy will be a top priority for my administration.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Fox News called Zelensky “pathetic”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42523548/333275590/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDY5OTUxZi0yNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdHJx6snfuHSyI_DjKTTg9FRcifXNMAcAqP6WWA7oZo=&emci=00e327b0-1a9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b469951f-249b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42523550/333275592/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDY5OTUxZi0yNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdHJx6snfuHSyI_DjKTTg9FRcifXNMAcAqP6WWA7oZo=&emci=00e327b0-1a9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=b469951f-249b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Last week, as bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise another $50,000 before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our fundraising deadline at midnight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42523552/333275596/-42398318?refcode=em20220303mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDY5OTUxZi0yNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IdHJx6snfuHSyI_DjKTTg9FRcifXNMAcAqP6WWA7oZo=)

Fox News’ propaganda cannot go unanswered. But it takes significant funding to run a full-scale campaign and take on all of Grassley’s and McConnell’s lies.
I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so whatever you can give today will go a long way.
I am so thankful to have you on the team,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Our Founders admired these heroes
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1gmjd41jm6f5b18tbt6nmpvi2gaojit5rrv5elo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3h6ppr6otkejgj8d1ie9q77d3mcpg77cj0ehprcpb7c9hb4cr569grapbletjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ao5lmoo75d366hib6o37m2qmash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1jesur97ec1eijtk4d8n57t0rn8fk5q6in9oi48_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zta8g3r7mmuq434c46fbaovm5pe1b29r279prteo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c1h2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo27fl6k2trd46cqomdr4j4kt12hlrci6tf9sot8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c1h2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Did you know Maryland is one of the few states that ties the gas tax to inflation?
**So when inflation goes up, so does the gas tax! **
We are paying more at the pump, and life is even more unaffordable.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znr1qmkan09kcephdrp0m7ie9de0jh5f7p7q4h78_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4olkmmr6ecb0euobcspjc6qb3c5nc8rr7d1j69gedc3n61o7fdr5c3j3ac70e3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cc3imdh6fdj1coqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgm6pj6c5g68oj24no)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfjj2oot2kvhrgjvjjrkgs4g19gfj878l3pp5sr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c9h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znppa5bul2qlfjnmjobnmsek760vbc7nsjfbo270_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c9h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zird42q4ocq7ersmv9ue407itbvsstm3r2meif8o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c9h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb1f3kuqj2e9m6hm0mv5q9r60km9due2erkh8rkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj62o34c9h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Will you sign your name to say you endorse our campaign for U.S. Congress? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4nFK2jkXtN31E5aAROevqgXEVdoxzVh7TA0k4YJtT4Oi5oftI-yhiVGz5YgmUhiRFV-nRmgAlGhasPlWkkhbA7TnAV2fbCp7zktlrluBmO171fz-lTqXl9FPKUzoKsHY8INauq_xQgu4Oixz_kRN-d-erOdZXO4RoUoEgYakJI88836kvFwnruzl3UNDsNBSZ4/3k1/brlkaQ7-TNayexmJLctEsA/h0/WwZT3gJwCtvlK033hWJoBzHvyFoZxxYNZ64qGXSVQLk) Peter,

Yesterday, we let you know the latest results from the primary election. And it’s official — we’re heading toward a runoff on May 24th against Henry Cuellar.

I’m running for Congress to represent Texas’ 28th District in Congress. The response since primary night is overwhelming — seeing everyone raise their hands to volunteer and donate since Tuesday night has me filled with gratitude for this movement.

I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart. Supporters like you are truly the backbone of our campaign to challenge the status-quo to bring bold, progressive change to South Texas.

I’m emailing right now because we’re asking for more official campaign endorsements, and I wanted to humbly request yours.

[**_Will you sign your name to say you endorse our campaign for U.S. Congress? Your endorsement right before our runoff election would say a lot about the strength and size of the grassroots movement we’re building to win in TX-28._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl3srzS2aasDUN4o9qZhlqiHvtfBnYVvfX_khYfIdhr-7zKLoQBEgxUrTHkel5aK306LWNdqlKJhcnES4-FcKDrgvf-FB8dPShTIH4aI54n-NCd4kK9k42LngTiMz5nA8UnNoT46RfRkh5qHMJQSgfRPTZ6qdqYPHVg9dFKKHiMJoWrxeB68L6TdHl2I3EtXrdlLUyMZIFg4WCAc0dEDSUL8Mtc1X-irRSLuNasYYauM5ZPMgBLXri4t5xWhj0cl48/3k1/brlkaQ7-TNayexmJLctEsA/h1/tP5UvRMlmckcyiJaXneXxZ93Zt3Xh8yn4SzYu9eoXMI) [Add your name »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl3srzS2aasDUN4o9qZhlqiHvtfBnYVvfX_khYfIdhr-7zKLoQBEgxUrTHkel5aK306LWNdqlKJhcnES4-FcKDr-bMcio9PcHCUhzgqkKcUywpv1LtBt52asetb798CBl8Xf6lzdk9bzXO-Ryj5pdbbCloH3IDSPb1QELvevXkowT8aduQjUenFfSrwEcejjjkg5LFN8EQ7_GE-A3mVmQw8hC35hg2et-S6amD36p9rrxYt2klfyBntKe0tt30zIq8/3k1/brlkaQ7-TNayexmJLctEsA/h2/7ldiKVXT7oyUAhSWLN01qSv1tvvRrUhkN8hFDObW8wM) The truth is that our opponent has a lot of powerful backers behind him. You and I both know the only way someone like me can win a race like this is if we completely outnumber all those rich and powerful people with tens of thousands of grassroots supporters fighting for a progressive agenda.

name: Team Greitens
subject: ICYMI: Eric Greitens Rallies with Freedom Trucker Convoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Eric Greitens Rallies with Freedom Trucker Convoy
---
| Cuba, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens joined the People's Convoy earlier this week to rally with freedom-loving patriots who are on their way to Washington, DC to take a stand against overbearing mandates. Here are a few pictures and local news stories from Governor Greitens' visit.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Hundreds of truckers and their supporters stop in Missouri on way to D.C. KMOV CBS-4
The former Missouri Governor said he's advocating for freedom of choice to mask and vaccinate. We asked him how trucker's licenses and seat belt laws were different from mask mandates.
"I think the difference is very clear. The left has abandoned science. This is simply an imposition of tyranny. They're not even pretending at this point to look at and follow the data," Greitens said.
[Read the entire article here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GODGD08x6IiB4RHfw317m4y4rpR7HFVpVPk8IdDi9cGtMe8HoWL09Scy5vwN_LDgdvTvJZSB3zzmDNbxf1hCFuFC4F0QoiszaKhypjETG4DYhRcryx51P-vLZknT_LT4bqoaUMga_S8RayY2KXhAaTJnGnKrm0Rfun_NR9BuYAipRdf-fZ5BjNVtxwIUPY8y-6Sg0h0Cq0ZNl98D3eF5Cn1zZMpBpYvrq1eooVSsbxQSMEBx6NmxRQ==&c=M3L0VMqTCB63riqAKRztOQOAiUiy5ctR5rXOLinZeLkpA7v8avHU0w==&ch=h9v6Ho0MbPKt4PljG8R1NnVMYiHr_mh6pHAS-fDUu4K-7TbLTsWWDQ==)

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GODGD08x6IiB4RHfw317m4y4rpR7HFVpVPk8IdDi9cGtMe8HoWL09Scy5vwN_LDgpr-ciHVZC8ITCm6vyzcB_5jVU2byWrGgC1x9E_PW9LiPvCKF9ffygvvwaG7SzUovJAHRUewIQwFyDdLdjWY1YQ==&c=M3L0VMqTCB63riqAKRztOQOAiUiy5ctR5rXOLinZeLkpA7v8avHU0w==&ch=h9v6Ho0MbPKt4PljG8R1NnVMYiHr_mh6pHAS-fDUu4K-7TbLTsWWDQ==)
---
| Cross-country trucker protest against vaccine mandates rolls through Missouri St. Louis Post-Dispatch
"You know what scares the Left?" [Greitens] immediately asked the crowd. "You do. You know what scares tyrants? You do. You know what scares the mainstream media with all their lies? We do. Let everybody know that we are here to take our country back."
Asked in an interview about his speech, Greitens said the Left, which tries to silence people, is beyond party affiliation.
"We are talking about Leftism as a tyrannical movement," he said. "And that's why all these people are here. It's freedom vs. tyranny."
[Read the entire article here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GODGD08x6IiB4RHfw317m4y4rpR7HFVpVPk8IdDi9cGtMe8HoWL09Scy5vwN_LDgN8Dn0QRYiKACEP_OgmDpn_gmvrsiwauahX5QhpqaUCNHtUW_GQGPfjHYiZf5XVFpMSEPaIHaGt8ORYK-2RABIEB5U85JcUSWn8dHQyR2GYuRHimZr5gpsrzG0Bssqdct1lM5FT8k3oE9nNIM0_zV_0j_u9q9hEY0kYtIJwHfviYrvcP3f7Lw9Bmdm73o1FuTttEl1sCUkZJ0nZVJBCCw-LT3gfCVzAAb_pjJo1ir3qtsX2N-CQvWzrmys7EGHxpKIm9RFDM-jN3iN_Kp37bn_lzpx3-jXnoLKg5pXO82VX8=&c=M3L0VMqTCB63riqAKRztOQOAiUiy5ctR5rXOLinZeLkpA7v8avHU0w==&ch=h9v6Ho0MbPKt4PljG8R1NnVMYiHr_mh6pHAS-fDUu4K-7TbLTsWWDQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | | | ICYMI: Eric Greitens Rallies with Freedom Trucker Convoy | Cuba, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens joined the People's Convoy earlier this week to rally with freedom-loving patriots who are on their way to Washington, DC to take a stand against overbearing mandates. Here are a few pictures and local news stories from Governor Greitens' visit. | | | | Hundreds of truckers and their supporters stop in Missouri on way to D.C. KMOV CBS-4 The former Missouri Governor said he's advocating for freedom of choice to mask and vaccinate. We asked him how trucker's licenses and seat belt laws were different from mask mandates. "I think the difference is very clear. The left has abandoned science. This is simply an imposition of tyranny. They're not even pretending at this point to look at and follow the data," Greitens said. == | == | Cross-country trucker protest against vaccine mandates rolls through Missouri St. Louis Post-Dispatch "You know what scares the Left?" [Greitens] immediately asked the crowd. "You do. You know what scares tyrants? You do. You know what scares the mainstream media with all their lies? We do. Let everybody know that we are here to take our country back." Asked in an interview about his speech, Greitens said the Left, which tries to silence people, is beyond party affiliation. "We are talking about Leftism as a tyrannical movement," he said. "And that's why all these people are here. It's freedom vs. tyranny." == | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

name: Pat Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: Take action: Ask lawmakers to renounce Trump for praising Putin.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Please stand up against two authoritarians who are laser-focused on destroying democracy: Putin and Trump.

You just have to send this message like below to Senator Pat Toomey and other Trump disciples today.

Dear lawmaker,

Will you disavow Trump for his collegial support of Putin?

Trump called Putin a "genius" as the latter attacks a free and democratic Ukraine, an act that the former U.S. president actually referred to as "pretty savvy." Putin's troops are killing civilians in an immoral invasion of a sovereign nation. We can never accept this type of aggression and violence.

Are you willing to disavow Trump's continual brown-nosing of the worst types of dictators?

We need to know: Are you for democracy or Putin?

Speak up NOW to defend democracy by renouncing Trump's comments on Putin!

SEND A MESSAGE [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/tell-them-to-disavow-trump/]

It's a simple nonpartisan choice. We all need to stand together on this.

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

| | Friend,

Last weekend, I went down to Orlando, Florida for CPAC 2022. All of America’s top Conservatives who are committed to putting America First, fighting for medical freedom, and stopping radical-leftists from taking over our schools, were in attendance.

I was able to speak to hundreds of those in attendance and during our conversations, what I heard was inspiring.
_**AMERICAN WANTS CHANGE**_
They are sick of Joe Biden, they despise the radical Democrats failed policies, and they despise RINOs like Chris Smith. This past year, not only have we had to deal with mask mandates, but we also are dealing with a border crisis, a supply crisis, and the government pushing Critical Race Theory.
The people need a fighter, someone who will stand up and not back down.
_**I am that FIGHTER!**_

We can turn our country around and bring back an America First mindset. The elites don’t care about you and me, which is why the Swamp is backing Chris Smith. But I listened to the people in NJ and heard so many at CPAC. We are ready for change!

**Please share this message on social media or by forwarding it to friends and family.**

Thank you and God Bless,

[](https://MikeBlasiForCongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed3ab556783898df4fb1eb6a1&id=86430df88e&e=5c7b109522)
Mike Blasi
America First Candidate
NJ-4 Congressional District

subject: Our one year anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42501985/333209538/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM1NjE2OC1mZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8-RkFF8UEW5imDnqPbSUlYqp81wRzb4Ijh2Aa3_2Ig=)

| | Peter, One year ago today, I officially launched my campaign for Congress, to defeat Madison Cawthorn, and bring real leadership to NC-11. The truth is, I had no idea what sort of response to expect. I knew I had the support of my wife Meghann, our family, and our friends, but I was under no illusions that it would be easy. To mount a winning campaign, I would need significant resources and since I made the decision to reject corporate PAC money, I would need to rely on everyday people believing in my message of love, hope, and empathy. Then, something incredible happened. Minutes after we announced our campaign, grassroots donations began pouring in from across Western North Carolina and the country. Over 30,000 donations later, we’re a clear frontrunner in this race with more cash on hand than Cawthorn. Not only do we have the resources to take on Cawthorn, but we have the grassroots momentum, too. We’ve knocked doors and organized all across the district and hosted seven days of action, mobilizing hundreds of volunteers to meet voters where they are. A lot may have changed this year, but our message stays the same – **I’m running for NC-11 to make insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn a one-term representative and to work with Western North Carolinians on how we can pave a new path forward rooted in love, hope, and empathy.** [**Your support is what helped our campaign outraise every GOP candidate in the field last quarter, and it’s what will help us win this race and defeat Cawthorn once and for all. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to celebrate how far we’ve come?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42501986/333209539/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220303_FR_OneYear_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM1NjE2OC1mZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8-RkFF8UEW5imDnqPbSUlYqp81wRzb4Ijh2Aa3_2Ig=) | | | [Donate $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42501987/333209540/-600355290?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220303_FR_OneYear_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM1NjE2OC1mZTlhLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d8-RkFF8UEW5imDnqPbSUlYqp81wRzb4Ijh2Aa3_2Ig=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, One year ago today, I officially launched my campaign for Congress, to defeat Madison Cawthorn, and bring real leadership to NC-11. The truth is, I had no idea what sort of response to expect. I knew I had the support of my wife Meghann, our family, and our friends, but I was under no illusions that it would be easy. To mount a winning campaign, I would need significant resources and since I made the decision to reject corporate PAC money, I would need to rely on everyday people believing in my message of love, hope, and empathy. Then, something incredible happened. Minutes after we announced our campaign, grassroots donations began pouring in from across Western North Carolina and the country. Over 30,000 donations later, we’re a clear frontrunner in this race with more cash on hand than Cawthorn. Not only do we have the resources to take on Cawthorn, but we have the grassroots momentum, too. We’ve knocked doors and organized all across the district and hosted seven days of action, mobilizing hundreds of volunteers to meet voters where they are. A lot may have changed this year, but our message stays the same – I’m running for NC-11 to make insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn a one-term representative and to work with Western North Carolinians on how we can pave a new path forward rooted in love, hope, and empathy. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In this together, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. Fellow American,

We're now eight months away from one of the most pivotal elections in recent American history.

* Inflation is the highest it's been since the Carter presidency (1977-1980).
* Violent crime is out of control.
* Illegal border crossings have increased some 325% since January 2020.

_Yet the main newspaper in Atlanta doesn't want to talk about any of that._

So, what in the world are they writing about? The "independent streak" they believe our Democrat opponent is exhibiting in the U.S. Senate in the "battle for a second term."

Yep, they want their readers to believe that our Democrat opponent - who votes a whopping 95% of the time in lockstep with Joe Biden - is somehow _**"the independent."**_

_**You can't make this stuff up.**_

While we're disappointed with the media's glowing coverage of our opponent, we're not surprised.

[** Fight the Media's bias
Send $8 to Team Herschel Today -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c1a072b406d047c3afc8e73709ea6863&_e=pAPgrc0KadTLhRy6uFrdeT7ibYiWLWK0iMzcpbsaPBFl_rnyo4MIDxILpwtX-L9CxWsTVguxIiwW37G0WolHL6u6S2-QEC07Rb9hFxFf3QLR_vLEAw4rYPb9DLKkNOes49OoAxFWQTWW3ORZmlTUzauV6rse4X8-pJbiGDb2hlAMRaegssrWkZxo-ADexQMidhGdgJO5EeJe1qLW6ySZZIZxSzszTmVSzGDYTYxZGLF76tGOOaoKT3emol31bKzppKejR2ZszLvwEqxAn_79juD47OIXRBPxi836PUUHufnBP7jysrDTSRE0k54pxAQ40frLWHvdjfQtVQYnwcWCO1q6XQ5OOyPQIPZrdVZ_WsesGPJD4Kg46dfBzKKmSzq3-_WRO88Un38Em-VOs-897TeJF-pvH0uW79n60rgFPvuCKY08At_gnOEX1gD4HwywXJyjYhX13uuwiz3PSJ9FJg%3D%3D)

body:
I guess Biden saw his disastrous poll numbers in between naps because he decided to back down from mandates right before his State of the Union.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-B_fLCzbjM4OiM1YwGgEP7KwIBfJtzG4T6OK1yfR4n54aWg1rawW_vXePs6EgL2qQExdpWegV0CMFXYh0rbIQr0Iv9wD-seVpX7EkHRofU_UjVu3bG4wX-VyFyR0q2a3J2CbGCLIQLXYyxgZpMUN_1jYKDkORCUKbqojGVCv9tdw5X7y0swU-18bmp-tAjjuXdvWfiFgUOI=&c=36u_E_2uDTvtZW4c1740k6QOZmFoZ5b1wW6Z82l3hEhYZsmkt3nFbQ==&ch=74qvlRVHZOItSq4tyIbq-A9TWN5dHejVf-WfsnUYmaONR2fnehVa4g==)
---
| Friend,
I guess Biden saw his disastrous poll numbers in between naps because he decided to back down from mandates right before his State of the Union. However, that doesn't change the fact that the Left has spent the past two years pushing unconstitutional mandates affecting our lives and our children.
This was never about "following the science" or protecting Americans. It was nothing more than shameful political theatre.
Biden is more focused on holding the majority in the House of the Representatives than he is doing what's actually right for our country. America needs to focus on economic recovery and protecting your rights, but we can't do that while Big Government Leftists still hold power.
---
| | | [KICK OUT THE FLIP-FLOP LEFTISTS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-B_fLCzbjM4OiM1YwGgEP7KwIBfJtzG4T6OK1yfR4n54aWg1rawW_vXePs6EgL2qQExdpWegV0CMFXYh0rbIQr0Iv9wD-seVpX7EkHRofU_UjVu3bG4wX-VyFyR0q2a3J2CbGCLIQLXYyxgZpMUN_1jYKDkORCUKbqojGVCv9tdw5X7y0swU-18bmp-tAjjuXdvWfiFgUOI=&c=36u_E_2uDTvtZW4c1740k6QOZmFoZ5b1wW6Z82l3hEhYZsmkt3nFbQ==&ch=74qvlRVHZOItSq4tyIbq-A9TWN5dHejVf-WfsnUYmaONR2fnehVa4g==)
---
| The Left is in a revolving cycle of chasing poll numbers. Their constant back and forth on their failed policies are directly related to their crashing approval ratings.
America is done dealing with flip-flop Biden and the poll-chasing Left. Our nation deserves leaders that are firm in their convictions in defense of liberty. November is our chance to make the change for the better.

However, that doesn't change the fact that the Left has spent the past two years pushing unconstitutional mandates affecting our lives and our children. This was never about "following the science" or protecting Americans. It was nothing more than shameful political theatre. Biden is more focused on holding the majority in the House of the Representatives than he is doing what's actually right for our country. America needs to focus on economic recovery and protecting your rights, but we can't do that while Big Government Leftists still hold power. | | | == | The Left is in a revolving cycle of chasing poll numbers. And yes, the opioid crisis is a national endemic, but racism and xenophobia won't solve this problem. We need treatment and rehabilitation services for those suffering from addiction. That is the best way to tackle the rising drug problems in our communities, not a border wall.

Bryan Steil has a way of getting it wrong **every single time.**

**[Our district needs a leader who will address our most pressing issues and not take the stance that benefits his corporate donors the most. The bipartisan infrastructure bill will allocate $5.5 billion for Wisconsin to improve our highways, roads, and more (and don't forget the jobs that repairing those roads creates). This is the same bill that Bryan Steil **voted against.**

name: Rick Scott
subject: Defend YOUR religious freedom!
body:
Peter,
The Democrat Party and their Big Tech allies are not merely secular; they have virtually created a new religion of “wokeness” that is increasingly hostile toward people of faith

_And the woke Left is determined to drive out people of faith from their new narrative for America. _

**We will not be silenced, canceled, or told what words to use by the politically correct crowd. **

**Americans should NEVER be required to go against their core values and beliefs to conform to culture or government. **

I put together an 11-point plan to **RESCUE AMERICA** , and defending YOUR freedom of religion is one of our top priorities.

We want to know if YOU think freedom of religion is under attack in the Democrats’ America, so we put together a survey for every patriot to fill out.

| | | President Joe Biden took the podium earlier this week and worked to spin his entire Presidency as a success, yet the facts show it has been nothing but failure after failure.
_**Inflation has hit a 40 year high.
72% of Americans say skyrocketing gas prices are hurting their pocketbooks.
Over 2 million people have illegally crossed the Southern Border since Biden took office.
Over a dozen U.S cities have set homicide records.
Only 29% of Americans say they’re happy with the direction our country is headed right now.**_
Biden’s first year in office has been a disaster, Fellow Conservative, but his State of the Union seemed to leave most of the failures out. So, we want to hear from you: **what grade do you give Biden?**

Freedom Truckers are ROLLING!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztq04c0ig1nvg0b7htds2i54nd15cmt6vbvo20i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj6eor1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2spj61hb6dbk6kr3fddnm2om5dhkmtgb6odgmhp60tdjc9hmepdnmti38thiesrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm1ddm61pbephh6sqr0ptgmlin49fg)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaf4i1gft3jrve90otm60311jtpoeqco33u7sgog_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj6eor1c1h2bs)
---
| | |
Fellow Patriot,

The American Truckers Freedom Convoy is UNDERWAY! Two of our convoys have launched and more are set to get rolling in the coming days.

Our grassroots movement has been building for two weeks and now it’s go time. The amazing support from patriots all across the country has allowed us to get this far, **[but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4736cf7732u8tajdicqcm7turrjk0fmgclp7vc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj6eor1c1h2bs "but we urgently need more gas sponsors to get our Truckers across the country.")**
**_[FILL A GAS TANK](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z692qca7k9g1fcsf82ntj1v6sh9b32sqh9n2qf1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj6eor1c1h2bs "FILL A GAS TANK")_**
This movement is critical in the face of the politicians quietly trying to sweep COVID under the rug while they maintain their emergency powers. **Our message is clear: End every mandate. End every restriction. End the Emergency.**

**[We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z97tslpkehdo0v58jrf313rni292036p3hgn55m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpj6eor1c1h2bs "We’re humbly asking you to help us get every truck that wants to join the convoy to our freedom rally in Virginia by chipping in today.")**

The more trucks we get to the Freedom Rally, the more the politicians in DC will listen to our leadership delegation when they go meet with lawmakers.

In Freedom,

American Truckers Freedom Convoy

---
Paid for by Great American Patriot Project

---

subject: BURT JONES RELEASES NEW STATEWIDE TV AD
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA, INC
body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MARCH 3, 2022
BURT JONES RELEASES NEW STATEWIDE TV AD
JACKSON, Ga. - Today, conservative candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia Burt Jones released his third statewide television advertisement. This six-figure ad buy will run statewide beginning today, March 3, and will feature a 30-second spot highlighting President Trump's [endorsement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017IKXEWZAAv32qjpAJEVSWcJcJ5keg7jc-Tzz1sl0Zp9puaMtLTDjht56fww0hf5Wa9y087hXNKtLdIRgVqlOm2G1BZSy_r_EeDitQfzAw1goeEhx7CkNWtsdjvV6VAEoiQhK-WOO4nB-AsOw2VsoTKDcESpweOpPpX70FDAQppq45FxFl26-qBXpjmQLeO78_n50d0SaA4M=&c=jft_NVEWQ-7Gn3fL25s1_F7bSsRdjeXBw1AJTPKgAg3TEOdtlwM_lg==&ch=zaYquS69JS1t7X8FffjievBU9YMtdehVRwqWpHTRI8GAOdhEu3O45A==) of Burt and his background as a job creator, former UGA football captain, and reformer who will fight to eliminate the state income tax and create more opportunities for Georgia families as their next Lieutenant Governor.
The spot will air on cable, OTT, and other streaming platforms.
Click the image below to watch the [30-second television spot](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017IKXEWZAAv32qjpAJEVSWcJcJ5keg7jc-Tzz1sl0Zp9puaMtLTDjhgkjzjCe0uxWIJvk_6jAlv8fzOFJLl5oe_cNSeBxV2jUx7Y6lyGfb5QwHx_noPHIBQyCiT1KAgZk9KwfttFk7lBL124-nmKAGBdhMnylkv1IaVjjnDPnNxd8zRy81RVtgQ==&c=jft_NVEWQ-7Gn3fL25s1_F7bSsRdjeXBw1AJTPKgAg3TEOdtlwM_lg==&ch=zaYquS69JS1t7X8FffjievBU9YMtdehVRwqWpHTRI8GAOdhEu3O45A==).

name: Austin Chenge
subject: MI Consensus Gov Candidate. So we don't split the vote, I hereby withdraw from the race...
body:
Austin Chenge, Veteran and First Republican Governor Candidate for Michigan
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/44NzELulM/c?w=Rn8O1w-k6SKGO1HaG3u-rglWHTBK7MWG6HjbtuIWFAU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzQ0TnpFTHVsTT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZDQwODBhLTEyOGQtNDlmZi1iZTVkLTExM2QyNTk5NmExNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | MI Consensus Gov Candidate. So we don't split the vote, I hereby withdraw from the race... "So we don't split the vote, I am withdrawing my now 19,000+ ballot signatures and standing down from the race for Governor of Michigan, effectively immediately. I will continue to fight on many open fronts, for the ordinary people of Michigan to win this election. The change we need in Michigan is bigger than any personal ambition. Make no mistake, the people of Michigan are determined to do what it takes to take back control of our home... " Austin Chenge, Veteran and First Republican Governor Candidate for Michigan.
---

name: Tobias Read
subject: Early Childcare platform
body:
As Governor, I’ll measure my success, and Oregon’s, by how our children and working families are doing. Access to high-quality, affordable childcare is essential if we’re going to make progress.
---
| | Dear Peter, **As Governor, I’ll measure my success, and Oregon’s, by how our children and working families are doing. Access to high-quality, affordable childcare is essential if we’re going to make progress.** Thousands of Oregon parents are staying out of the work force or working reduced hours because they can’t find or can’t afford childcare. Most communities in Oregon are classified as “child care deserts” with too few daycare spots for the kids who need them. **[My plan aims to solve this problem and support Oregon families. Read about it here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42526233/333291401/-1726789300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTgxMWFmNi0yZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw0vMXZGz4V07YCHyO_vCgzNkprwDPwWLpIdJ4vYGg0=&emci=7962ebe7-2e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=99811af6-2e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)** **I’m taking a multi-faceted approach to the problem.** The first plank of my plan is to establish free universal pre-k education for every child in Oregon. I’ll also seek to broaden state child tax credits for low and moderate income families to help them support their children without an undue financial burden. The second area of focus is on the childcare workforce and access to daycare for families anywhere in Oregon. I’ll establish public-private partnerships to help childcare centers improve programming and facilities to ensure the highest standard of education for our young learners. I’ll work with local government leaders and nonprofits to convert unused spaces into childcare and community centers, and offer pandemic bonuses to our childcare workforce. There’s more to my plan. **This issue is so important, and there’s a lot to cover.[Please take a look through my full plan here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42526239/333291405/-1726789300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTgxMWFmNi0yZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw0vMXZGz4V07YCHyO_vCgzNkprwDPwWLpIdJ4vYGg0=&emci=7962ebe7-2e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=99811af6-2e9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)** Thanks,

---

---

* * *
| [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42526241/333291409/1542981758?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTgxMWFmNi0yZTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw0vMXZGz4V07YCHyO_vCgzNkprwDPwWLpIdJ4vYGg0=)

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: How we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kx5N3TWwvVJEJ-5UJI1N_kY-jQMgpFDM5vw9yFIYq6Ygm8Xfph9w9v8ggwpQiEJsw04RR1j1NbIJLLZ0OkLjREHoTL1WYCNGPvAqZSMApFxHd0yQmfMQS0iXTdK7yX3qdNvJt21HdalP3-T-cLi-5j39a5372Bbk1e12C1bjiAI-kHzsJxlyz3y7qF7PpnXu05JngKqUH9qAa24NWYMj3hCmnKKM5RtRxB06U6SJJNsGSTFLiEWD61YctitFVkHw3WpUWakU5lJoZbCTgzK0dXeeleR7SQICexsiy5FsFY37iFB5NkayDFRD3WcbLayF&c=QTFVod24aIGKfv07WR9cqgEV_VGmVaiBFjF8R9qsd2kIohnTDtOVBA==&ch=ZsC--8wcLnlptAsqLMrs7be3fG6kAiV-c8Q_burl3Zef-VfaoLZRFw==)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,
Tara and I want to express our sincere gratitude for your support during this election cycle. Because of you, we won the primary election in a landslide on Tuesday night. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts. And that's not all. Morgan Luttrell and Wesley Hunt crushed it in their primaries too - no runoffs required. You'll be seeing them in Congress next year. A special thank you to every donor who contributed to Texas Reloaded and helped make that a reality. And thank you to the voters who put their trust in these two veterans. The point of electing people like Morgan and Wesley is to send representatives with real experience to Congress. People who know how to make better, more thoughtful arguments for conservative policies and principles than just some cheap, off-the-shelf talking points. There are many other serious candidates like Morgan and Wesley in Texas and throughout the country. They are making persuasive arguments and winning more voters to our side - reinvigorating and strengthening our Republican Party. And they are running in blue and purple districts that we will win in November if we fight hard enough. My ask is this: [Please donate any amount you can afford to fund my mission to elect a record number of new Republicans to Congress this November.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kx5N3TWwvVJEJ-5UJI1N_kY-jQMgpFDM5vw9yFIYq6Ygm8Xfph9w9v8ggwpQiEJsw04RR1j1NbIJLLZ0OkLjREHoTL1WYCNGPvAqZSMApFxHd0yQmfMQS0iXTdK7yX3qdNvJt21HdalP3-T-cLi-5j39a5372Bbk1e12C1bjiAI-kHzsJxlyz3y7qF7PpnXu05JngKqUH9qAa24NWYMj3hCmnKKM5RtRxB06U6SJJNsGSTFLiEWD61YctitFVkHw3WpUWakU5lJoZbCTgzK0dXeeleR7SQICexsiy5FsFY37iFB5NkayDDH97D1-362TnIgqnDkji-0=&c=QTFVod24aIGKfv07WR9cqgEV_VGmVaiBFjF8R9qsd2kIohnTDtOVBA==&ch=ZsC--8wcLnlptAsqLMrs7be3fG6kAiV-c8Q_burl3Zef-VfaoLZRFw==) I want Democrats to see the results on election night and realize it will be many, many years before they could even dream of taking back Congress again.
---
| | | [DONATE. HELP DAN DEMOLISH THE DEMOCRAT MAJORITY.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kx5N3TWwvVJEJ-5UJI1N_kY-jQMgpFDM5vw9yFIYq6Ygm8Xfph9w9v8ggwpQiEJsw04RR1j1NbIJLLZ0OkLjREHoTL1WYCNGPvAqZSMApFxHd0yQmfMQS0iXTdK7yX3qdNvJt21HdalP3-T-cLi-5j39a5372Bbk1e12C1bjiAI-kHzsJxlyz3y7qF7PpnXu05JngKqUH9qAa24NWYMj3hCmnKKM5RtRxB06U6SJJNsGSTFLiEWD61YctitFVkHw3WpUWakU5lJoZbCTgzK0dXeeleR7SQICexsiy5FsFY37iFB5NkayDOktJ2xFW8NR&c=QTFVod24aIGKfv07WR9cqgEV_VGmVaiBFjF8R9qsd2kIohnTDtOVBA==&ch=ZsC--8wcLnlptAsqLMrs7be3fG6kAiV-c8Q_burl3Zef-VfaoLZRFw==)
---
| We are proving to more voters every day that Republicans have serious, commonsense policies to protect our southern border, boost domestic energy production, solve our country's healthcare challenges, and preserve our constitutional liberties.
That's how we win. And your renewed commitment to the fight today gives me the resources I need to make taking back Congress a reality in November.
Thank you again for your continued support. Tara and I are blessed to have you on our side.
In Service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
|

If you prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable to: Dan Crenshaw For Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | | | Dear Peter, Tara and I want to express our sincere gratitude for your support during this election cycle. Because of you, we won the primary election in a landslide on Tuesday night. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts. And that's not all. Morgan Luttrell and Wesley Hunt crushed it in their primaries too - no runoffs required. You'll be seeing them in Congress next year. A special thank you to every donor who contributed to Texas Reloaded and helped make that a reality. And thank you to the voters who put their trust in these two veterans. The point of electing people like Morgan and Wesley is to send representatives with real experience to Congress. People who know how to make better, more thoughtful arguments for conservative policies and principles than just some cheap, off-the-shelf talking points. There are many other serious candidates like Morgan and Wesley in Texas and throughout the country. They are making persuasive arguments and winning more voters to our side - reinvigorating and strengthening our Republican Party. And they are running in blue and purple districts that we will win in November if we fight hard enough. My ask is this: == I want Democrats to see the results on election night and realize it will be many, many years before they could even dream of taking back Congress again. | | | == | We are proving to more voters every day that Republicans have serious, commonsense policies to protect our southern border, boost domestic energy production, solve our country's healthcare challenges, and preserve our constitutional liberties. That's how we win. And your renewed commitment to the fight today gives me the resources I need to make taking back Congress a reality in November. Thank you again for your continued support. Tara and I are blessed to have you on our side. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | If you prefer to donate by check, please make your check payable to: Dan Crenshaw For Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | | | | Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

body:
Three things you need to know about this race
| | |
---
I know you hear from me lot, friend, so I'll make this quick. Here are the three things you need to know about this race:
| | | | Polling shows me just 2 points behind Marco Rubio, and experts say I have the potential to "flip this seat entirely." |
---|---|---|---
| | | | The last Senate election in Florida was decided by 0.12% of the vote, so there's zero room for error. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | We've made a lot of progress in closing the gap – **but I'm still falling 13% short of my midnight fundraising goal.** |
---|---|---|---
Missing this goal will force me to make budget cuts, cuts that could have catastrophic effects for our campaign. Experts are saying this race could decide Senate control, so I have to ask again:
**[Please, friend, can you rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap, defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42526434/333292489/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2497-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWRkMGQ0Ny0yZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WMLVTNgThaHZIPo082LbpNQTdl7TAuenP5XjmUbGX_s=)**

name: Chairman Jim Banks
subject: More like a State of Disunion
body:
Hold Joe Biden Accountable
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | _**[< < It was the most uninspiring State of the Union Address in my lifetime. >>](http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=2851f52c49c56bd786f0a6f2cd139c7e0752c9fbd692b7163ac9d6d38bf01df401bcc26da962a792b940a5491328f7278ae9c08bf0b1683e "<< It was the most uninspiring State of the Union Address in my lifetime. >>")**_ Fellow Conservative,

This week, **Joe Biden delivered the least inspiring State of the Union speech in my life.** Pelosi, AOC, and other prominent members of the Democrat Party couldn't help but grin. At the same time, he listed off pretend accomplishments and policy victories.

Our country is falling apart at home and has become a **_JOKE_** on the world stage. **The Democrats disagreed as they laughed, smiled, and cheered during Biden 's rambling rhetorical rant.**

Biden talked about how our country is in the middle of a grand economic recovery. **American families don 't see any recovery happening. **

Our country is facing an energy crisis and rampant inflation. name: Team ODP
subject: What's on your mind, team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Hey Ohio Democrats,

Earlier this week, President Joe Biden laid out his message for the future of our country.

And while we know our country is at a pivotal moment, President Biden's message was one of unity. Regardless of where we live or what we believe in -- we have to work together for our future. We're already on the road to recovery with the passage of the American Rescue Plan and the bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. But we still have so much work left to do.

We need to expand access to affordable healthcare, defend our democracy, revitalize the middle class, and work to lower prescription drug prices. But in order to fight for what matters to all of us the most, we want to hear your thoughts. [**We put together a short priorities survey for you to share your thoughts. Will you take two minutes to let us know what issues are on your mind?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527044/333294758/642470254?ms=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=iJbAmNyLgC6SzU6IVGgkjy%2FNjPvs%2FM1I59P2H5bFSFxqDSR6vUG2aXSQC8a84iX7%2BFfaQQwB3d320N%2Bqn9dPz2NHxm7ezI6vstHrdU6HJ3PDnXJAfY8bwUCN8Se%2FURlS9y%2BGvBuvPuGcCWZwpXAsnQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjEzMTc2MS0zMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVPUGb0NZvoZD8PZ_rr0TZ_gwa1qL47-uVmBZS_DAtE=&emci=943c8584-199b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=92131761-319b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25291327) [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527045/333294759/642470254?ms=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&refcode=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&source=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=iJbAmNyLgC6SzU6IVGgkjy%2FNjPvs%2FM1I59P2H5bFSFxqDSR6vUG2aXSQC8a84iX7%2BFfaQQwB3d320N%2Bqn9dPz2NHxm7ezI6vstHrdU6HJ3PDnXJAfY8bwUCN8Se%2FURlS9y%2BGvBuvPuGcCWZwpXAsnQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjEzMTc2MS0zMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVPUGb0NZvoZD8PZ_rr0TZ_gwa1qL47-uVmBZS_DAtE=&emci=943c8584-199b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=92131761-319b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25291327)

\-- Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527046/333294760/1180314303?refcode=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220303_sotu_e1srv_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjEzMTc2MS0zMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVPUGb0NZvoZD8PZ_rr0TZ_gwa1qL47-uVmBZS_DAtE=)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Judicial Watch Fights For the Rule of Law…and Judicial Watch Needs You!
body:
Judicial Watch is one of the most significant public policy groups in America

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch is one of the most significant public policy groups in America.
Right now, our work in the courts _exposing_ taxpayer funding of Marxist, racist **critical race theory** propaganda is shaping the national debate. We're also successfully challenging **illegal immigration and sanctuary policies** , exposing **Big Tech censorship** and investigating **Biden family** corruption.
And we're fighting for **honest elections** ...just two weeks ago, we announced we are settling our lawsuit against the **State of North Carolina** and its **Mecklenburg** and **Guilford** Counties, after they removed over 430,000 ineligible names from their voter rolls.
This is a win for the voters, because clean voter rolls help pave the way for cleaner elections!
**Judicial Watch** is _your_ government watchdog in Washington...the largest and most effective in the country. To fund our essential work we rely on conservatives like you. You see, America needs Judicial Watch... _[but we need you more](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58211&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)_.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58211&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

**It is not just our investigators, attorneys and communications experts in this fight for open government ... _you_ and other patriots standing behind us represent the power, passion and sovereignty of the informed people of the United States of America. **

Judicial Watch is producing federal court victories _for honest elections_ , successfully _challenging unlawful immigration policies_ in local and state courts and _we are exposing Big Tech censorship aimed at silencing conservatives_.

High on our agenda for 2022, our investigators and lawyers are going after school boards, state and federal agency bureaucrats and politicians who are abusing our tax dollars and assaulting our rights by pushing toxic **Critical Race Theory** propaganda in our schools, our government and even our military.

I meet regularly with our Board of Directors to gauge which investigations and lawsuits we are able to fund. We must always be fully prepared to fight corruption and unlawful government secrecy.

That's where your support comes in.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58211&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

[And I ask for your support with a special tax-deductible gift today for us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58211&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) to continue our investigations and lawsuits.

Thank you, as always, for all you do for us!

Sincerely,

Right now, our work in the courts exposing taxpayer funding of Marxist, racist critical race theory propaganda is shaping the national debate. We're also successfully challenging illegal immigration and sanctuary policies , exposing Big Tech censorship and investigating Biden family corruption. And we're fighting for honest elections ...just two weeks ago, we announced we are settling our lawsuit against the State of North Carolina and its Mecklenburg and Guilford Counties, after they removed over 430,000 ineligible names from their voter rolls. This is a win for the voters, because clean voter rolls help pave the way for cleaner elections! Judicial Watch is your government watchdog in Washington...the largest and most effective in the country. To fund our essential work we rely on conservatives like you. You see, America needs Judicial Watch... =. | = It is not just our investigators, attorneys and communications experts in this fight for open government ... you and other patriots standing behind us represent the power, passion and sovereignty of the informed people of the United States of America. High on our agenda for 2022, our investigators and lawyers are going after school boards, state and federal agency bureaucrats and politicians who are abusing our tax dollars and assaulting our rights by pushing toxic Critical Race Theory propaganda in our schools, our government and even our military. I meet regularly with our Board of Directors to gauge which investigations and lawsuits we are able to fund. We must always be fully prepared to fight corruption and unlawful government secrecy. President Trump and Kelly have made it very clear that they DO NOT support her for the nominee. While their opinions are clear, we now have to wonder which way Liberal Lisa Murkowski will vote. *Hint: She was 1 of 3 Republicans who voted to confirm Jackson last year at her current position. Will Liberal Lisa Murkowski support Joe Biden’s nominee for SCOTUS? Make sure to submit your answer before 11:59 PM tonight. We want to know your opinion. -Trump-Tshibaka Polling | | | | ==

Hi Peter, it’s Ryan with Phil Arballo’s grassroots campaign for Congress.

As Campaign Manager, it’s my job to make sure Phil is equipped with the tools he needs to win this ultra‐competitive, open seat for Democrats.

**But sadly, we’re running a deficit on important campaign materials.**
