body:
Dr. Gillian is ready to lead Wisconsin in the right direction.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527449/333296539/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220303Launch3_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_logo_TESTB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWY0NTljYS0zMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMvGlHTYIulo5BYUz-mQu5BjhnrC9zqDwHnP4BLuTPs=) Team,

Gillian has spent the past year traveling across the state and meeting with families who face real problems like limited or no internet, lack of basic healthcare services such as mental health and addiction care, and increasing financial insecurity.

These are problems that Governor Evers has been working on with great results like expanded broadband, grants for healthcare infrastructure, and a proposal to put budget surplus dollars back in the pockets of Wisconsinites. But, there is much more work to be done.

That’s why Gillian is running for Treasurer. _Every challenge and every solution runs through the Treasurer’s office_. She will use her experience as a physician, prior small business owner, state employee and mother of six to support practical solutions to everyday problems that will make life better for ALL our communities.

**[Dr. Gillian is running to represent all Wisconsinites, and she needs your help getting there. Will you become a founding donor with a $20 contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527450/333296540/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220303Launch3_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1_TESTB&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWY0NTljYS0zMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMvGlHTYIulo5BYUz-mQu5BjhnrC9zqDwHnP4BLuTPs=)** [Donate $20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527451/333296541/237656307?refcode=EM_FR_220303Launch3_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_BUTTON&&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWY0NTljYS0zMjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nMvGlHTYIulo5BYUz-mQu5BjhnrC9zqDwHnP4BLuTPs=) Gillian has the determination and integrity to advocate for Wisconsin as our fiscal protector. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The story of a 14 cent microchip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220303&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220303&amount=28]
Friend,
The auto plants in my district are facing a crisis – all because of a 14-cent microchip.
Right now, there is a *massive* shortage of the microchips that power our cars. Microchips that are produced almost entirely overseas. That’s why I’m co-sponsoring the CHIPS Act – now rolled into the America COMPETES Act in the House – which offers incentives to American companies to build expensive microchip plants on U.S. soil.
During my time in Congress, I’ve fought to ensure we are not reliant on foreign powers like China for essential goods. This fight turned into a near-obsession once COVID hit and I found myself negotiating with Chinese middlemen for 78-cent masks for Michigan hospitals. Whether it’s a critical component in our cars or the medical equipment we were so desperate to get our hands on at the beginning of the pandemic, we must make at least some critical products we rely on in the United States.
This shouldn’t be complicated. Michigan has a proud heritage of manufacturing – it’s how we built the auto industry from the ground up. We’ve seen what happens when government works with the private sector and Democrats work with Republicans – it’s how Michigan recently secured a $7 billion investment from GM (the largest in their history) to make us the hub of electric vehicle manufacturing. We are now trying to pass the next leg of the stool: investment in chip manufacturing.
The House and Senate have different versions of the same bill that need to be negotiated into a final bill. I’ve been pushing both parties to come together to get this done and provide American workers with some relief.
Compromise is not a dirty word. Now let's get this done.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220303&amount=28]
Onward, Elissa

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Confirmation should be vigorous and based on merit
body:
A flawed nomination
---
| | | | | | Volume 32 | March 3, 2022
---
|
---
| "...not be judged by the color of their skin..."
---
| | |
---|---
|
Joe Biden has made his selection of a nominee to the Supreme Court--federal appeals court judge Ketanji Brown Jackson.
A graduate of Harvard Law School who clerked for the Supreme Court judge she could potentially replace--Judge Stephen Breyer--Judge Brown seems to be qualified. And as expected, she is a liberal judge.

But the premise of her nomination was flawed from the start as it isn't her qualifications that led to her nomination. It is the color of her skin and her gender. Biden from the start said he would appoint a black woman to the Supreme Court.

Our country has long embraced the principle that success and advancement is based on merit, not appearance. As Martin Luther King Jr. said, a person should be judged not on the color of their skin but by the content of their character. Therefore, Judge Jackson should be vetted just as rigorously as any nominee would be--not on personal matters but on the issues and her understanding and upholding of the Constitution. The sole job of the Supreme Court is to uphold the Constitution.

We will be watching this confirmation as it should meet all the standards of the process. May our elected officials in the Senate have the wisdom to thoroughly challenge any position by this judge that does not agree with the Constitution. Only then will we fully know if this judge is truly qualified to sit on this great bench.
|
---
| | |
---

Radio Radio: Erik was all over the airwaves this past week, making appearances on Patriot State Radio, Jimmy Lakey show on KCOL, The George Brauchler show on KNUS and The Dan Caplis show on KNUS. This week his domination of the air continues with Mandy Connell, Chuck & Julie, Leland Conway, Kim Monson and Randy Corporon. See details below in Upcoming Events.

Erik also spoke at Lake County Assembly on Wednesday, and will be appearing at other county assembly events soon.

clean_body: | | | | Biden’s Border Crisis | Peter Willis, Have you heard about these “Ghost Flights?” All across the nation Joe Biden and his administration have been flying illegal aliens from our Southern Border to airports all across the country. He even sent multiple flights to Scranton, Allentown, and Harrisburg. Why are Gov. Wolf and Attorney General Josh Shapiro turning their heads and letting Biden get away with it?! January of 2022 was the worst January in 22 years at the border. Fentanyl seizures have increased, sex traffickers are taking advantage of the open borders and crime will continue to rise! IT’S TIME TO PUT AN END TO THIS BORDER CRISIS Fifteen years ago, Lou Barletta stood on the national stage against illegal immigration when he was mayor of Hazleton, and as Governor he will do it again! Thank you, Team Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 ==

Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s:
* Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law.
* Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors.
* Let nearly a million COVID-19 tests expire.
* Appointed a quack as Florida’s Surgeon General.
* Jet-setted across America on a fundraising tour while the Delta variant sickened and killed Floridians.
* Proposed setting up his own private police force.
* Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade.
* Signed laws restricting abortion access.
* Said he might support an abortion ban like the one in Texas.
* Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state.
* Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes.
* Ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s scaring off tourists.

... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures!

**One thing is clear: Gov. DeSantis doesn’t care about Floridians. He only cares about his presidential ambitions and satisfying his wealthy donors.

**[We _don’t_ support Gov. DeSantis, and we know you don’t either. If you can, please contribute today to Charlie Crist’s campaign for governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528282/333299780/1828375930?refcode=20220303_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nFg5DJ6IidAGudvcYXS119mZDHE_KH9b_dp_IAcKlVY=)****

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: URGENT SENATE UPDATE: Five Takeaways From the State of the Union
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501157473%2501100574%2b-%2b03-03-2022%2beNewsletter%250115598.32229750.5656578.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501157473%2501100574%2b-%2b03-03-2022%2beNewsletter%250115598.32229750.5656578.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **March 3, 2022** |
---|---|---|---
| | | Last January, President Biden was sworn into office as a nation in disarray looked on - left shocked by the attacks on our democracy and battered by the COVID-19 pandemic and ensuing economic harm. But during his [State of the Union Address](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-statement-on-president-bidens-state-of-the-union&redir_log=194455702271788), President Biden reported that [America is coming back strong](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1499053582477414405&redir_log=951200023621373). Here are five things I took away from his speech:
---
### 1. America Is Well on the Road to Recovery
We've made big strides over the last year, from the deployment of millions of vaccines to defeat the pandemic to record job growth. This progress was made possible by the resilience of people across Maryland and the nation and the passage of the American Rescue Plan. Through the American Rescue Plan, we delivered historic relief to Maryland families, workers, and communities and gave our economy a boost. As President Biden highlighted, [America is seeing the fastest economic growth in nearly 40 years](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498847618889404417&redir_log=264573333418375). Cases are down, businesses are opening up, and a sense of normalcy is returning. And with the passage of the infrastructure modernization law, we've started the historic effort of putting millions of Americans to work building the infrastructure of the 21st century by investing in our roads, bridges, public transit, tunnels, broadband, water and sewer systems, ports, electric vehicle infrastructure, and more. These two achievements, taken together, have brought vital relief to those suffering from the pandemic and will create once-in-a-generation change across Maryland and the country. They are already improving the lives of countless Americans and providing more opportunity to folks across our state.
### 2. We Must Stand Up for Democracy and Stand Against Tyrants
Vladimir Putin's decision to attack Ukraine has already caused grave suffering. Putin has blood on his hands, and he must be held accountable for unleashing this unprovoked violence in the heart of Europe. In his address, President Biden underscored the swift and severe actions our nation has taken - in concert with NATO and other global allies - to stand up to Putin's aggression. Putin's decision to invade Ukraine has already proven to be an epic miscalculation. America has rallied our allies. [We stand united with the people of Ukraine](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498843093126324227&redir_log=6515756679373), and we will continue to deliver military, economic, and humanitarian assistance. [The President has it right: democracy will always triumph over autocracy.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498845766412124160&redir_log=622135317361373)
### 3. We Must Meet This Moment To Lower Costs and Grow Opportunity for All
Even with all of the economic progress we've made, too many families are still struggling to make ends meet. But together with President Biden, we're working to [lower everyday costs for the things that matter most](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498881633491075079&redir_log=759256055284374) - health care, elder care, child care, prescription drugs, and gas. It's time to redouble our efforts to accelerate our economic recovery, grow opportunity, cut costs, and invest in the prosperity of every Marylander and every American. President Biden laid out a vision to do just that. By enacting this plan, we will help ease the strain on Marylanders' pocketbooks and help our communities thrive. I am committed to working with my colleagues in Congress to get this done.
### 4. We Must Come Together on Shared Priorities
We should all be able to agree on solutions to many of the everyday challenges that affect Americans. In his address, President Biden laid out a unity agenda with four areas that are deeply impacting our communities - and where we believe we can find bipartisan consensus. For starters, as far too many Marylanders know, [the opioid epidemic continues to wreak havoc on our communities](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498856483165020160&redir_log=462849556825373). Additionally, we've made incredible medical advances, [but cancer still has a devastating impact on too many families](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498858039067222022&redir_log=547185773236373). And we must do more to help Americans with mental health issues and keep the promises we've made to our veterans. These are priorities that lawmakers on both sides of the aisle know we must address, and I hope my Republican colleagues will join us in our efforts to pass legislation on each of these fronts.
### 5. Our Best Days Lie Ahead
Big challenges remain, from beating COVID-19 once and for all, to continuing our economic recovery, to defending democracy and charting the course of our shared future. It's time to take bold climate action. It's time to [enact gun safety measures to regulate ghost guns and strengthen federal oversight](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498854890168360960&redir_log=839298899022374) so we can protect our families and our communities. It's time to pass comprehensive immigration reform. [It's time to get dark money out of our democracy](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen%2fstatus%2f1498879700407627783&redir_log=029998798911375). President Biden laid out his plan to meet these priorities, and others too - while reiterating his faith that our brightest days are still to come. As the President said in his address: "It is never a good bet to bet against the American people."

In the weeks and months ahead, I will work shoulder-to-shoulder with the White House and my colleagues in Congress to advance the priorities laid out in President Biden's State of the Union Address and build a stronger America for all. We have a duty - but also a unique opportunity - to tackle the challenges facing our communities head-on and to deliver results to the American people. But democracy isn't a spectator sport. We must work together to build a stronger Maryland and a stronger country. I hope you will join me in that cause. Chris Van Hollen
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15598.32229750.5656578.7517223)

We have a duty - but also a unique opportunity - to tackle the challenges facing our communities head-on and to deliver results to the American people. But democracy isn't a spectator sport. We must work together to build a stronger Maryland and a stronger country. I hope you will join me in that cause. Chris Van Hollen "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" |

subject: Tell the Senate: Confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson AT ONCE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Team,
Last week President Biden made history by announcing Federal Appeals Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson as his nominee for the Supreme Court.
While we’re excited, we remember who stonewalled the last Democratically nominated Supreme Court Justice from making their way to the bench – Mitch McConnell. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/confirm-ketanji-brown-jackson]
We need to put the pressure on NOW, that’s why we’re calling on the Senate to confirm Judge Brown Jackson at ONCE – if you agree, add your name to our grassroots petition urging action on this historic nomination >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/confirm-ketanji-brown-jackson]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/confirm-ketanji-brown-jackson]
With a 50-50 tied Senate, we can’t afford to take anything for granted.
We can’t forget Mitch McConnell stealing a Supreme Court seat in 2016, and we can’t let anything like that happen again. [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/confirm-ketanji-brown-jackson]
Add your name at once and call on the Senate to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court NOW! >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/confirm-ketanji-brown-jackson]
ADD MY NAME >>> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/confirm-ketanji-brown-jackson]
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1416%2E878179%2ESoSmgr)
---
**Team, Liz Cheney just made our day:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220303_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1416%2E878179%2ESoSmgr) While we don’t always agree with Liz Cheney, **we LOVE that she isn’t afraid to hold Trump accountable for his role in the January 6th insurrection.**

_But GOP leadership is FURIOUS._ They’re ramping up their attacks on Cheney to FORCE her off the Jan. 6th Commission and to let Trump get off scot-free. [Unless 35,000 good Democrats stand with Liz Cheney by MIDNIGHT, she could fold to far-right MAGA attacks – SIGN NOW TO STAND WITH LIZ CHENEY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220303_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1416%2E878179%2ESoSmgr) | [SIGN NOW: Stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220303_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1416%2E878179%2ESoSmgr)
---
* * *
Team, we’re DISGUSTED by the GOP’s leadership.

**FIRST:** Liz Cheney bravely spoke out and told Trump he’s FULLY RESPONSIBLE for the January 6th attacks on the U.S. Capitol. She’s _AMAZING!_

**THEN:** GOP leadership publicly PUNISHED Cheney in an attempt to silence her.

**NOW:** Liz Cheney is refusing to back down! Instead of bowing down to Trump, she’s following the FACTS!!
[**But she’s still facing brutal attacks – so we need 35,000 signatures to show Liz Cheney that we stand with her. Will you sign?** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/stand_LC_PET_copy/?source=VPP_20220303_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1416%2E878179%2ESoSmgr)

name: Kina Collins
subject: “I haven’t heard from him inyears”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
A phone call, a text, a post card? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6sDfWk6eTtSsuFEQXRxl-a9X9vi6MySMsLw6tqmcu16BqDh7DS_4XBCeiyAkLvS0KstEBxfqwY02fOegoAOLx5NkcA-a5wdEvsEZcmd3AMMbKZ_reV3o8-e72Hmsb7FmEUfxTMzrbU96Hsy3D63K05degqoEmMO2rVRctzspZ4iywEfxowpfxYCTCg1jLfrfoaLQK6hOOczFKe7ccTixoDgFk61QDz4G7P09lzO0kfOTkSbDawzCk4BOvx4wHryJM/3k1/xGkfWnktRmyTX4NCQAPnGg/h0/1Ji8Y-KAK9y47D5kpEsmhplBsLvOh0RAKA5cnGT3xHg) Team, When we reach out to voters, we hear over and over that they are just happy to finally hear from _somebody_. More often than not we hear the same thing, “I haven’t heard from him in years” Our team has already contacted 70,000 voters and most of them are hearing from someone for the first time in their lives. I’m proud of what we’ve achieved already, but the ballot for IL-7 will be finalized in less than 2 weeks, and we have to push this campaign to the next level. [**We will need $12,375 for phone banks, $6,352 for door knocking literature, $525 for text messages, and $1,000 for postcards. That’s 440 donations at our average of $46. Team, can you chip in?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESYt_kE_moHlw3HX7udJ5xIYrkT9kf9pi4HrOMbE7RAPmysPT1J2RrM5X0151BXVYYiFYO8Xkbr3kpmO_SIglmJaaViyNBH8CtCUZ8TrJu7md_UJiHVSmPbDGyBGkOViNqmGFMTBMXCoEeLBXvIM8KeMRezvcCuB6mrlApeLNsyL6P7rAn9ZHcMHuFcnw70hSdkmKlB-I-bFZwdTY9-J-bZBftgq-W3aAy0tF43HLXc6vXy1AAV2q6PDRSgyaGl7vApuVH7_I8qrga86X83PNHoqpmZCcFXFchjPxrJlH_-Sc9IZYnoI7sXI4KBbBWz5vrW8-ugIWC5d_nt_VQUoZxJicDEnBPX-4gPJXdwzgBa58/3k1/xGkfWnktRmyTX4NCQAPnGg/h1/XJbTaBSTJY_ljiRbAGpILq6Eu9be19G4ouvqqOhEjgQ) [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESYt_kE_moHlw3HX7udJ5xIYrkT9kf9pi4HrOMbE7RAPnZTOiOJqkVKuhkkRGbRYj2Dw-NT7yAnPsUhwbfImDc7L2LFBJM-zQzaNH4WdUXAdQs-riMO0z5WOrDRAdwDrHAcKpOTFaqpsaDz_DGSTC_kJE3eyEhINBZV4FeUytS-4ObN5oliwrXKUCeP48tuqfbWOIYixf0kZOMoRlZWxSYL6U5irAJksOj86cPEk-LT-Vo5yQ8Ihrua9ZfY1Ei8IBEim_LSkJz2_BSleOvRO82Kpo8vASh_h0QEc_ba-7K555-fkkl5YVMLcF-3CoOuJ7m0f-JvaW7X-ZyhB3XfA2_HtLoSKA7zkFJfoa9vuQsjIE/3k1/xGkfWnktRmyTX4NCQAPnGg/h2/WdtMf2raRDXovHbVxQ_aYHjrna_sLl7pzxHIJyQuLsc) The truth is, people in our community just want to feel like there is somebody out there listening to what they need and fighting to ease their burden. For 2 decades, nobody has been listening, and nothing has changed. We are a community in the wilderness. Left behind by our City, by our State, by Congress. It has to change, and it has to change now. **The people closest to the pain should be closest to the power.** [**Help me bring the voices of our district to Congress. clean_body: A phone call, a text, a post card? | | | Team, When we reach out to voters, we hear over and over that they are just happy to finally hear from somebody. More often than not we hear the same thing, “I haven’t heard from him in years” Our team has already contacted 70,000 voters and most of them are hearing from someone for the first time in their lives. I’m proud of what we’ve achieved already, but the ballot for IL-7 will be finalized in less than 2 weeks, and we have to push this campaign to the next level. The truth is, people in our community just want to feel like there is somebody out there listening to what they need and fighting to ease their burden. For 2 decades, nobody has been listening, and nothing has changed. We are a community in the wilderness. Left behind by our City, by our State, by Congress. It has to change, and it has to change now. The people closest to the pain should be closest to the power. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Carolyn Rush for Congress
subject: I strongly support unions. Carolyn Rush for Congress in NJs 2nd District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carolyn Rush for Congress209 76th street Sea Isle City, NJ 08243| |
body:
| |
# I'm running for Congress in NJ's 2nd DistrictAnd I respectfully ask for your support
Hello,
[I am a lifelong supporter of unions and I know first-hand how they fight for the fair treatment of their members. ](https://mme.benefitalign.com/ui/rest/campaign/12708073/event/linkClicked/31710/14333378/31712/IamalifelongsupporterofunionsandIknowfirsthandhowtheyfightforthefairtreatmentoftheirmembers?redirUrl=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HJXR4KtdscU%26t=2s "Carolyn Rusn for Congress - Strong Support for Unions")
If we are to close the wage gap, we must allow workers to unionize.
Let’s support the people who make this country great – the people who deserve fair treatment. As your Congressional Representative, unions will have my support.
_I need your vote to make that happen._
But first, I need your financial support!
Every contribution helps.

| **I truly appreciate your financial support.**| | [Please Donate Today! ](https://mme.benefitalign.com/ui/rest/campaign/12708073/event/linkClicked/31710/14333378/31712/PleaseDonateToday?redirUrl=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/carolynrushforcongress "Donate to Carolyn Rush for Congress!")

| Contact us:
[info@CarolynRushForCongress.com ](mailto:info@CarolynRushForCongress.com)Paid for by Carolyn Rush for Congress209 76th street Sea Isle City, NJ 08243| |

subject: PASSED: My bill to end the COVID state of emergency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
96
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/end-covid-hysteria-email-
fr?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march3hf2 Hey
Friend — The U.S. Senate just PASSED my bill to END the COVID
state of emergency!

This follows the Senate passing my plan to END the
CMS vaccine mandate just yesterday. I promised to fight for YOU — and
that’s exactly what I’m doing.

But our work is just beginning. Joe
Biden’s White House has already attacked me today over these bills. If
we’re going to get these bills across the finish line, I need YOU to
stand with me.

longer control our lives.”

If he believes that, he should stand with
me to END the COVID hysteria. But he won’t, because he’s totally
beholden to the woke left and radicals who never want to give up power.
But together, we can fight back.

Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to
defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. And
that's exactly what I'm doing.

But I can't keep up the fight without
your help. We're facing an onslaught from the woke left, and Democrats

I'm not

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Geoff had a really successful weekend at CPAC. Find out where he's going to be later this week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
We wanted to share some news about the great weekend our campaign just had while Geoff was at CPAC in Florida.
Geoff was busy meeting and sharing ideas with governors, elected officials, and candidates from economically-successful states across the nation.
He also had a chance to speak with a series of national media outlets about his race for Governor. For example, check out this interview with RSBN's Grace Saldana, where Geoff talked about his appreciation for Massachusetts, his experience, and what he wants to accomplish as Governor:
---
|
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JDEKcQfOkzp9QMZU9NsZm32SdidTOO3GIFZ5meOg0UyjNgRlI2sTIbqZbTeVf-BnSZBjFteYU24euU2KLwWBmK7gKxD0kG4sVRqxRW_xeKek_ldGOaxWXp9jmNLRlnblb-1n94XmEP4-Fk75agYBcsI6IWMtdyugSn_jfGjDJsuraj6eycASrhrBxfQcxPS7aWhoFRrm7lVsMwtjJ5nEE3efEAxa0rjI74PZQ5a-pPsXrESsTV8jwWdXQ4X1kd-x&c=phLgwmNXBwESrcmiOCmBEYc0pFKlqOlINia6k1ZIPLfSzHwPkb4rYg==&ch=zU4CXambhRM1RfRUPX94AqHw6NF0iWTbKv3cFKFmr762oyil3xiWwA==)
---
| "I'm a parent. I have two daughters. My wife and I own a small business. I served in the Legislature from 2010 to 2018, so I know how government works. But, I'm really a private sector guy at heart. And, the private sector teaches you that individual freedom and the free market, that's what really develops all the great ideas that make America great and give us all the opportunities to innovate and succeed in our country. I'm excited I have a chance to make that voice heard in the Governor's race, and then when I serve, steer the Massachusetts ship in that direction, giving people more freedoms."
\- Geoff Diehl live on RSBN at CPAC
[Click Here to Listen](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JDEKcQfOkzp9QMZU9NsZm32SdidTOO3GIFZ5meOg0UyjNgRlI2sTIbqZbTeVf-BnSZBjFteYU24euU2KLwWBmK7gKxD0kG4sVRqxRW_xeKek_ldGOaxWXp9jmNLRlnblb-1n94XmEP4-Fk75agYBcsI6IWMtdyugSn_jfGjDJsuraj6eycASrhrBxfQcxPS7aWhoFRrm7lVsMwtjJ5nEE3efEAxa0rjI74PZQ5a-pPsXrESsTV8jwWdXQ4X1kd-x&c=phLgwmNXBwESrcmiOCmBEYc0pFKlqOlINia6k1ZIPLfSzHwPkb4rYg==&ch=zU4CXambhRM1RfRUPX94AqHw6NF0iWTbKv3cFKFmr762oyil3xiWwA==)[ to the full interview!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JDEKcQfOkzp9QMZU9NsZm32SdidTOO3GIFZ5meOg0UyjNgRlI2sTIbqZbTeVf-BnSZBjFteYU24euU2KLwWBmK7gKxD0kG4sVRqxRW_xeKek_ldGOaxWXp9jmNLRlnblb-1n94XmEP4-Fk75agYBcsI6IWMtdyugSn_jfGjDJsuraj6eycASrhrBxfQcxPS7aWhoFRrm7lVsMwtjJ5nEE3efEAxa0rjI74PZQ5a-pPsXrESsTV8jwWdXQ4X1kd-x&c=phLgwmNXBwESrcmiOCmBEYc0pFKlqOlINia6k1ZIPLfSzHwPkb4rYg==&ch=zU4CXambhRM1RfRUPX94AqHw6NF0iWTbKv3cFKFmr762oyil3xiWwA==)

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, We wanted to share some news about the great weekend our campaign just had while Geoff was at CPAC in Florida. Geoff was busy meeting and sharing ideas with governors, elected officials, and candidates from economically-successful states across the nation. He also had a chance to speak with a series of national media outlets about his race for Governor. For example, check out this interview with RSBN's Grace Saldana, where Geoff talked about his appreciation for Massachusetts, his experience, and what he wants to accomplish as Governor: | | == | "I'm a parent. I have two daughters. My wife and I own a small business. I served in the Legislature from 2010 to 2018, so I know how government works. But, I'm really a private sector guy at heart. And, the private sector teaches you that individual freedom and the free market, that's what really develops all the great ideas that make America great and give us all the opportunities to innovate and succeed in our country. I'm excited I have a chance to make that voice heard in the Governor's race, and then when I serve, steer the Massachusetts ship in that direction, giving people more freedoms." \- Geoff Diehl live on RSBN at CPAC == | | Geoff Speaking Live to Real America's Voice at CPAC | == == == | | Geoff even had a chance to chat with the UK's Nigel Farage, as well as connect with old and new acquaintances down at CPAC: | | | | Meanwhile, Team Diehl was busy back here at home, reaching out to primary voters across Massachusetts and collecting signatures to get Geoff on the ballot! | | | | | mailto:desireea@charter.net | | This week is another busy week for our campaign. Fellow American,

We're now eight months away from one of the most pivotal elections in recent American history.

* Inflation is the highest it's been since the Carter presidency (1977-1980).
* Violent crime is out of control.
* Illegal border crossings have increased some 325% since January 2020.

_Yet the main newspaper in Atlanta doesn't want to talk about any of that._

So, what in the world are they writing about? The "independent streak" they believe our Democrat opponent is exhibiting in the U.S. Senate in the "battle for a second term."

Yep, they want their readers to believe that our Democrat opponent - who votes a whopping 95% of the time in lockstep with Joe Biden - is somehow _**"the independent."**_

_**You can't make this stuff up.**_

While we're disappointed with the media's glowing coverage of our opponent, we're not surprised.

[** Fight the Media's bias
Send $8 to Team Herschel Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5b0f2afb99284dde8779a621a25c005d&_e=eGUV6b1_HLsy5PvtlXoKVE_6Nin6i7CwGZBLTJuMh-WHNndjWsAByxiOrYvPMQ5escZRcpxAGlNqNV2Lb8YD1kuBliuC1mYjvJvCOqCPM9Yg8G2cP-N9SaP39YpWdZo0JHwLOWgk1sI6T_su0aJlCVgDQgkLDplYQF2r6fRAP4dHlNh3nUnMEwS3SSAdkxqfM5ds-iv9DY5vFIu8m3F9rn8llYQGGytG-S4hmC1Ltx4VMmt0UHnlHpCn8mjr-I-uTLJJElRdlZ3G6gQNuV4bpVSBepvfbkQOwRiyLDgmAXDTfr6hElXjCxZGywacIQScBuXbHr8T90gFzpy3Sz4JpuQLuFGVX6RnJE-gAn47i2jyhFTeOSjJsERzaNwpXBx6GLi7KY8zWjS9nC77jB9e8WL3vqk-Bjk_oPaoth93Ds593zm8hyoZqhu2-pPkvA85s5B8LjqY7sIHZLFEYhOINw%3D%3D)
**For as long as we can recall, there has been an inherent bias when it comes to covering Republicans seeking elected office.** Unfortunately, conservatives across the country have grown accustomed to the mainstream media's skewed coverage, which essentially acts as a massive in-kind contribution to Democrats.

clean_body: Help Team Herschel fight the media’s bias. Chip in $8 or more today! | Fellow American, We're now eight months away from one of the most pivotal elections in recent American history. Inflation is the highest it's been since the Carter presidency (1977-1980). Violent crime is out of control. Illegal border crossings have increased some 325% since January 2020. Yet the main newspaper in Atlanta doesn't want to talk about any of that. So, what in the world are they writing about? The "independent streak" they believe our Democrat opponent is exhibiting in the U.S. Senate in the "battle for a second term." Yep, they want their readers to believe that our Democrat opponent - who votes a whopping 95% of the time in lockstep with Joe Biden - is somehow "the independent." You can't make this stuff up. While we're disappointed with the media's glowing coverage of our opponent, we're not surprised. For as long as we can recall, there has been an inherent bias when it comes to covering Republicans seeking elected office. Unfortunately, conservatives across the country have grown accustomed to the mainstream media's skewed coverage, which essentially acts as a massive in-kind contribution to Democrats. We need your help to offset the media's in-kind donation. We know that someone who votes lockstep with Joe Biden isn't "independent." That's ridiculous. ** -Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Kyle Rittenhouse
subject: Time to hold the corrupt media accountable
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59728333:Jii094E8N:m:1:3298722022:3DE80E1DD4AC8A3ADD5451033ECBCD39:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

Last year I was vindicated in the court of law, and while I'll be forever grateful for my freedom, **deep corruption in our media was exposed** for all to see.

Now that I'm free, I will ensure it does not go unanswered.

**It's time to hold the media accountable in court** for their malicious lies and slander, and their attempts to tear this nation apart and destroy my life.

To do so, **I'm excited to share the launch of The Media Accountability Project**, which will serve as the official fundraising vehicle for the coming wave of defamation lawsuits against the worst offenders in our activist media.

**[Please watch the short launch video here, and become a FOUNDING DONOR by making the largest donation you can afford.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59728333:Jii094E8N:m:1:3298722022:3DE80E1DD4AC8A3ADD5451033ECBCD39:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59728333:Jii094E8N:m:1:3298722022:3DE80E1DD4AC8A3ADD5451033ECBCD39:r)
|
---
Without the support of people all across America, I fully believe I'd be sitting in prison today. It was their generosity which gave me a fighting chance.

Now, as I seek to restore my name and reputation and ensure that the propagandists in our media pay a price for their vicious dishonesty, I hope that I can count on that support once again.

After all, this is not just about me. It's about holding one of our most powerful institutions accountable for seeking to play judge, jury and executioner with everyday citizens who have very limited means to punch back.

There's a ton of work to do, but right now, the number one job is to raise the resources necessary to launch a massive wave of defamation litigation, and win.

**[So please watch the launch video, and become a FOUNDING DONOR by supporting The Media Accountability Project with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59728333:Jii094E8N:m:1:3298722022:3DE80E1DD4AC8A3ADD5451033ECBCD39:r)**

Sincerely,

Kyle Rittenhouse
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59728333:Jii094E8N:m:1:3298722022:3DE80E1DD4AC8A3ADD5451033ECBCD39:r)

body:
March is a critical month for our campaign. The most important so far.
#

[**Friends, March is an FEC DEADLINE MONTH and that means when it ends we’re legally required to report how much money we’ve raised. Everyone will be watching. This goal is absolutely critical. Please, make a $3 donation to help us reach it.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220303-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2255_6688874_X9XPNZ&akid=2255%2E6688874%2EX9XPNZ)
What a campaign...
**FIRST:**
CNN said that our race was one of the most flippable in 2022, Donald Trump said kicking Mark Kelly out of the Senate was the first step to taking America back, and a Mitch McConnell-connected group started spending millions against us.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220303-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2255_6688874_X9XPNZ&akid=2255%2E6688874%2EX9XPNZ)
**THEN:**
We missed our critical fundraising goals for the month of February, setting us back on where we need to be if we’re going to overcome these obstacles to win.
**NOW:**
We’re setting a new audacious goal for the month of March — 150,000 individual donations — because it’s the number we need to get back on track and to WIN.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220303-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2255_6688874_X9XPNZ&akid=2255%2E6688874%2EX9XPNZ)
[**Can you PLEASE make a contribution — $3 or whatever you can afford — to help us reach our goals and give Mark Kelly a chance to defend this seat? name: Eddie Rodriguez
subject: Thank you for everything, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE FOR TEXAS
body:
I'm so proud of the campaign we ran | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42529923/333306245/677377838?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTk2NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTJiZGEyNi0zYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WyRmoB2SoZw6zLw8DfZBjxMMaUwkqX4xddRcG3QZiM=&emci=51269cb5-399b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ee2bda26-3b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=39066839) |
---|---|---
| | Peter,

I wanted to reach out and thank you for everything.

Though the election didn’t turn out as we hoped, I’m so proud of the campaign we ran, and I’m humbled that you saw fit to support our efforts. I want to especially thank my staff, my supporters, my wife Christine, and my amazing kids Jack and Sophie for being there with me in my run for Congress.

Serving as HD-51’s State Representative over the past nineteen years has been the honor of my life. I congratulate Lulu Flores for her victory in the district I love, and I congratulate Greg Casar for his victory as well. I look forward to assisting both of them in any way possible to ensure that Democrats are successful this November.

Thank you again, Peter. Onward!

Best,

Eddie Rodriguez
---

---

body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42529988/333306625/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM0ZDcyYy0zYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdak3-C9LMoXelrSNuulN7K6wMSCSpX3RDG4SpCA2Yk=&emci=20099b78-389b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=e034d72c-3b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

I'm thrilled to fill you in on some _great_ news.

I just got off the phone with our finance director, and our end-of-month fundraising numbers were _through the roof._ Because of grassroots supporters like you, our campaign is in an excellent place to ramp up organizing and voter outreach efforts and get to work doing what it will take to win BIG in November.

**Peter, I can't thank you enough for your generous support.** The momentum I've seen in the past few months reminds me of the sweeping Blue Wave energy I saw in 2018. The energy is building, and our list of grassroots supporters is growing by the day.

**[There is still time to donate to get our campaign in an even better place! Chip in $5 or more today to build an unstoppable campaign that will flip CA-27 red to blue.>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42529989/333306626/946308265?refcode=em22_220303_EOMTY-TestA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM0ZDcyYy0zYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdak3-C9LMoXelrSNuulN7K6wMSCSpX3RDG4SpCA2Yk=)**

I'm so impressed by our fundraising numbers, but we cannot slow down now. **We need to keep up this energy and momentum all the way to the ballot box this November if we're going to defeat Mike Garcia once and for all.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42529990/333306627/946308265?refcode=em22_220303_EOMTY-TestA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM0ZDcyYy0zYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdak3-C9LMoXelrSNuulN7K6wMSCSpX3RDG4SpCA2Yk=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42529991/333306628/946308265?refcode=em22_220303_EOMTY-TestA&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM0ZDcyYy0zYjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rdak3-C9LMoXelrSNuulN7K6wMSCSpX3RDG4SpCA2Yk=) The power of this election and flipping CA-27 cannot be overstated; it's the key to holding our majority and passing urgently-needed policies like paid family leave, voting rights protections, investment in clean energy, and so much more.

**With your support, we're going to make it happen.**

Again, thank you for coming through when we need you, it means so much to me personally and all of us here at Team Christy.

Cheers,

Christy

subject: LOL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This is a liiittle embarrassing for Dr. Oz.
#
**LOL, Derek.**
Dr. Oz is starting to realize that money can’t buy on-the-ground support in PA.
**We’re guessing that’s why he just “challenged” John to a one-on-one debate on Twitter (with Sean Hannity as a moderator).**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45031?refcode=em20220303-4820&t=1&akid=4820%2E434096%2ErOSJjL)
To which we say...
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45031?refcode=em20220303-4820&t=2&akid=4820%2E434096%2ErOSJjL)
Dr. Oz is _sooooooo_ desperate to share a stage with John, because he knows John is the Democratic candidate Pennsylvanians actually know, trust, and like.
**[We’re humbly asking: Can you rush a donation today so that we can make sure our people-powered campaign isn’t drowned out by Republicans like Dr. Oz? He might be acting desperate, but we can’t take our momentum for granted with the fate of Pennsylvania on the line.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45031?refcode=em20220303-4820&t=3&akid=4820%2E434096%2ErOSJjL)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45031?amount=5&refcode=em20220303-4820&t=22&akid=4820%2E434096%2ErOSJjL)**
__
**Every single dollar you donate to this campaign makes a world of difference, Derek.** If we’re going to keep up with the millionaires + their super PACs, we need to increase our momentum NOW and carry it through Election Day.
Whether you can give today or not, thank you, thank you for being on our team. 🙏
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220303-4820-footer&t=23&refcode2=4820_434096_rOSJjL&akid=4820%2E434096%2ErOSJjL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Poll: Should we trust Russia?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
What do you think of Putin? As a veteran who’s fought terrorism both on the battlefield and in my private life, I am an unequivocal advocate for freed I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa2792cfb51c40288c8dbcbbcc75e280&_e=L56Dwv8ZSu_DtPutb9_LcTftuawR7ZhMuxymG8b4X7dP7-2dd9tMmV5CUQgSV9cFoBBXTyVIqXHC84hnsRgGiImgrAA-bFFoT2ARZDW0ivVgM1PG6hyxhhPscF_tABPX9EZnYDwMj4KUIiaF_HuXrOJptmIZgYFl7IuxJizIf41l6hiuoEYTsQUge9I--XH4U_1V4VFA1fpRcZsnt1OAgOG2I7-SGuUqubWbSRQuIm34MYakw3hsJx01TcW34AT0t1bW_0DbAybuHi4bsAfLfvG2IRHz__LOn0hDohjaWbttnT03o74BnGP_asLN5K77wfvsIhhhdSKq10Z9BMPzOI2myda1OiFM3LDzfCGVbMEAUOCzZ23wR5as4XdIC8aXlVJ6wqUttI0PtrVlXvOVpSyuyS-M5gev6knGPv_DhHck17QNX__MlVgiNtPSrQiQy6QP8UoBSu_kpUtSN0WlLelHQsrigEaBip7Qwh_4t4JZ5Os-mGKQQBJIB_-WeoIDcms2A4U3nhXtLELa90p1cvTt-ccN8-wsW6JRwGhyihh-s_zrENSun9cg3f73qS3GT2QjWNsOYoAc-pQdURWmU7gqWROR3G_5J8kNkGhxzXGnPOar6C5WuE9AopKWIEgy)
---

Peter,

Just when we thought we were headed for some sense of normalcy after two years of living during a global pandemic, **Vladimir Putin decides he’d like to invade Ukraine.**

As a veteran who’s fought terrorism both on the battlefield and in my private life, I am an unequivocal advocate for freedom-loving people’s everywhere. The Ukrainian people have given every indication since the fall of the Soviet Union that they value their democracy and are willing to fight to the death to maintain their freedoms.

**h**

I’m aware that not every American holds the same views regarding the events unfolding in Eastern Europe at the moment. As such, **[I’m asking for 1 minute of your time today to take a brief survey](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa2792cfb51c40288c8dbcbbcc75e280&_e=L56Dwv8ZSu_DtPutb9_LcTftuawR7ZhMuxymG8b4X7dP7-2dd9tMmV5CUQgSV9cFoBBXTyVIqXHC84hnsRgGiImgrAA-bFFoT2ARZDW0ivVgM1PG6hyxhhPscF_tABPX9EZnYDwMj4KUIiaF_HuXrOJptmIZgYFl7IuxJizIf41l6hiuoEYTsQUge9I--XH4U_1V4VFA1fpRcZsnt1OAgOG2I7-SGuUqubWbSRQuIm34MYakw3hsJx01TcW34AT0t1bW_0DbAybuHi4bsAfLfvG2IRHz__LOn0hDohjaWbttnT03o74BnGP_asLN5K77wfvsIhhhdSKq10Z9BMPzOI2myda1OiFM3LDzfCGVbMEAUOCzZ23wR5as4XdIC8aXlVJ6wqUttI0PtrVlXvOVpSyuyS-M5gev6knGPv_DhHd_2LWCID3rtcmY5SaYBqlAoxG9i3mwC5XXmF7IDwLefpHhNgLH0iYPHVp1eyGPw3iU-wwLSm8MKVLCKLeF8DUMlEaxGHQ0bQwBz84MKWnMNMm0-kdKO6SSgSIgPidsUCFPWrNP-jwlpvg6ZPzit0dAbUqOCRte-Itg_MPB-kM4G-AvKJEgPg7v0lye7QsGJD3yfrDRI-239MQ-l5C7m8eX)** in order for my campaign to better understand how much support, if any, you’d like to see the United States send in support of the Ukrainian government.

| **NATIONAL SECURITY SURVEY**
RECORD STATUS: _\- empty -_
ID: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

[**WHERE DO YOU STAND ON PUTIN? >> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa2792cfb51c40288c8dbcbbcc75e280&_e=L56Dwv8ZSu_DtPutb9_LcTftuawR7ZhMuxymG8b4X7dP7-2dd9tMmV5CUQgSV9cFoBBXTyVIqXHC84hnsRgGiImgrAA-bFFoT2ARZDW0ivVgM1PG6hyxhhPscF_tABPX9EZnYDwMj4KUIiaF_HuXrOJptmIZgYFl7IuxJizIf41l6hiuoEYTsQUge9I--XH4U_1V4VFA1fpRcZsnt1OAgOG2I7-SGuUqubWbSRQuIm34MYakw3hsJx01TcW34AT0t1bW_0DbAybuHi4bsAfLfvG2IRHz__LOn0hDohjaWbttnT03o74BnGP_asLN5K77wfvsIhhhdSKq10Z9BMPzOI2myda1OiFM3LDzfCGVbMEAUOCzZ23wR5as4XdIC8aXlVJ6wqUttI0PtrVlXvOVpSyuyS-M5gev6knGPv_DhHfTQmv5hTsRv9s_WiXihm-qI3MlnLwtQj4Vcc0pxJXpjMzUwJKVFG1BiS0JZ5EeMzo81Bjjha9pRMfWJ2GGxyhXobUmsmXgjXgJf0Zur3BfJhu6oQ4veo3XbQfxqzs14l-y5Otw5bgT2FJwRLNIw50qQUdvIUM98ynWhOIn_Aw6MmWErdbqvZ4hFdqNRSk54EmNQkEEJ--9pTX13ORf0Cxa)

---

I wish President Biden the best in his “**negotiations** ” with President Putin, but I’m not convinced he’s up to the task. This is a textbook scenario of why “**elections matter.** ” When we cannot rely on the President of the United States to make the best decisions on behalf of the nation, the job falls to the members of Congress, which I hope to be by this time next year – god willing.

We’ve seen one too many foreign policy fumbles in Biden’s short presidency, making it all the more important that a Republican majority in the House is realized this November.

You’d be doing me a great favor by [**participating in our brief survey today**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=aa2792cfb51c40288c8dbcbbcc75e280&_e=L56Dwv8ZSu_DtPutb9_LcTftuawR7ZhMuxymG8b4X7dP7-2dd9tMmV5CUQgSV9cFoBBXTyVIqXHC84hnsRgGiImgrAA-bFFoT2ARZDW0ivVgM1PG6hyxhhPscF_tABPX9EZnYDwMj4KUIiaF_HuXrOJptmIZgYFl7IuxJizIf41l6hiuoEYTsQUge9I--XH4U_1V4VFA1fpRcZsnt1OAgOG2I7-SGuUqubWbSRQuIm34MYakw3hsJx01TcW34AT0t1bW_0DbAybuHi4bsAfLfvG2IRHz__LOn0hDohjaWbttnT03o74BnGP_asLN5K77wfvsIhhhdSKq10Z9BMPzOI2myda1OiFM3LDzfCGVbMEAUOCzZ23wR5as4XdIC8aXlVJ6wqUttI0PtrVlXvOVpSyuyS-M5gev6knGPv_DhHfuVstLCnXJQrt1RJ_tbtIrp3PMAj6k0BINx1KdBEY12oxKhoX6odVNeNmKQc_IVvwo13Zfcp-sVG-VI0rnpJStb7lfRcP1USkW7xH7e2zzyKa8ljG_KdtlA5ZkmEOJUaxB74L6OSuQIMgNIeZWkR-dtRZx-vHMjIzDNIR8erHeM0y6icHZS430NdafhmKCNHoTpYrQBi_0e0SGsVxYzwHr).

Thank you for your time,

As a veteran who’s fought terrorism both on the battlefield and in my private life, I am an unequivocal advocate for freed I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Just when we thought we were headed for some sense of normalcy after two years of living during a global pandemic, Vladimir Putin decides he’d like to invade Ukraine. As a veteran who’s fought terrorism both on the battlefield and in my private life, I am an unequivocal advocate for freedom-loving people’s everywhere. The Ukrainian people have given every indication since the fall of the Soviet Union that they value their democracy and are willing to fight to the death to maintain their freedoms. h I’m aware that not every American holds the same views regarding the events unfolding in Eastern Europe at the moment. As such, in order for my campaign to better understand how much support, if any, you’d like to see the United States send in support of the Ukrainian government. | NATIONAL SECURITY SURVEY RECORD STATUS: \- empty - ID: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> I wish President Biden the best in his “negotiations ” with President Putin, but I’m not convinced he’s up to the task. This is a textbook scenario of why “elections matter. ” When we cannot rely on the President of the United States to make the best decisions on behalf of the nation, the job falls to the members of Congress, which I hope to be by this time next year – god willing. We’ve seen one too many foreign policy fumbles in Biden’s short presidency, making it all the more important that a Republican majority in the House is realized this November. name: Lombardo for Governor
subject: Americans are tired of the hypocrisy.
body:
Despite Steve Sisolak’s best attempts in his State of State address, Nevadans saw right through his taxpayer-funded speech, in which he claimed to be anti-tax, pro-parent, and pro-police, despite three years of policy in direct opposition to that.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HiJ7xnFnVzC-xOHo9iqZevm8DGIciIWMDcknQjzJJSqcl0q2qKUAdp9ijcUdc3Gk--BUm7vZ89Yuh-6XH018McwDA18OVzWMSNme1rt-eMW-Jel6s7i0OZdBbTWbugGQM8XIP5q8Lcs29cBsKrX_mviV6iXRyQiXDS7GQllSGOWqFHmRohEyShQy4NWu0-ceDg4QI9Jyd8gp9Dis_pPpt94u7qUBd3tk&c=TDMhCdhqBEZMzp9cWbDT-81vEPjpi-jlC8TtWh2zci-sbvuk2ZcbuQ==&ch=l5TJRUu1Pvv5pKcXy_J4c1sxOj8u4XXqWRHVtv6_Ut62qaxu0h_Odw==)

|

| Peter,
Despite Steve Sisolak's best attempts in his State of State address, Nevadans saw right through his taxpayer-funded speech, in which he claimed to be anti-tax, pro-parent, and pro-police, despite three years of policy in direct opposition to that.
Even up until very recently, all Nevada residents had been forced to comply with a government mask mandate - even our children in the classroom. All the while, celebrities and even the very politicians who were enforcing these measures violated them at will.
And why did Governor Steve Sisolak finally decide to get rid of mask mandates you ask?
His concern wasn't keeping Nevadans safe - his interests were ultimately for his own personal political gain.
---
| | | [STOP THE HYPOCRISY! STOP SISOLAK!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HiJ7xnFnVzC-xOHo9iqZevm8DGIciIWMDcknQjzJJSqcl0q2qKUAdp9ijcUdc3Gk--BUm7vZ89Yuh-6XH018McwDA18OVzWMSNme1rt-eMW-Jel6s7i0OZdBbTWbugGQM8XIP5q8Lcs29cBsKrX_mviV6iXRyQiXDS7GQllSGOWqFHmRohEyShQy4NWu0-ceDg4QI9Jyd8gp9Dis_pPpt94u7qUBd3tk&c=TDMhCdhqBEZMzp9cWbDT-81vEPjpi-jlC8TtWh2zci-sbvuk2ZcbuQ==&ch=l5TJRUu1Pvv5pKcXy_J4c1sxOj8u4XXqWRHVtv6_Ut62qaxu0h_Odw==)
---
| Folks all across Nevada and America are waking up to this hypocrisy. We're tired of the "rules for thee, not for me," and our leaders making politics their number one priority.
We're seeing this hypocrisy when it comes to rising crime, too - while the elite career politicians brush off these concerns, everyday Americans have to deal with the real-world consequences when they push radical policies like Defunding the Police!
If we want to put these days of hypocritical politicians behind us here in Nevada, it's clear what we have to do this year...
...[support a REAL leader who hasn't been focused on politics, but on KEEPING US SAFE! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HiJ7xnFnVzC-xOHo9iqZevm8DGIciIWMDcknQjzJJSqcl0q2qKUAdp9ijcUdc3Gk--BUm7vZ89Yuh-6XH018McwDA18OVzWMSNme1rt-eMW-Jel6s7i0OZdBbTWbugGQM8XIP5q8Lcs29cBsKrX_mviV6iXRyQiXDS7GQllSGOWqFHmRohEyShQy4NWu0-ceDg4QI9Jyd8gp9Dis_pPpt94u7qUBd3tk&c=TDMhCdhqBEZMzp9cWbDT-81vEPjpi-jlC8TtWh2zci-sbvuk2ZcbuQ==&ch=l5TJRUu1Pvv5pKcXy_J4c1sxOj8u4XXqWRHVtv6_Ut62qaxu0h_Odw==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: Katie Porter Is Vulnerable!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=48a6c68424&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

Crime is rising across our state as liberal politicians and radical district attorneys push an agenda that actually empowers criminals. They are out of control!

As you probably know, I am a staunch supporter of our men and women in blue. Not only that but I helped found Orange County’s Gang Reduction Intervention Program.

This has been a personal mission of mine for many years.

That’s why I thought it would be nice to show our support for California’s police. If you agree, will you sign your name to say just how much you appreciate them?

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Constitutional carry is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www

**Did you see the news? Indiana Republicans in the statehouse are resurrecting the infamous “constitutional carry” bill and plan to send it to Governor Eric Holcomb as soon as possible. ** Let’s make something clear: “constitutional carry” is a senseless culture war that would put firearms in the hands of bad actors. Not only would our communities and families be less safe, but this bill would actually take away resources and funding for law enforcement and lessen their ability to fight crime. Indiana’s law enforcement are against this bill. A large majority of Hoosiers have told Republicans themselves they’re against it too. So why are Republicans trying to make this dangerous policy law? **It’s simple: the Indiana GOP have become the Culture War Party.** They have no plans to create a better or safer future for our families. Instead, they are pursuing bills that fulfill a national agenda – not an Indiana one.
_**Indiana State Police Superintendent Douglas Carter even said: “I never remember a time when outside influence of national associations or political posturing became the driving force behind any legislation in our great state until now.”**_

subject: The first step towards winning this election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531033/333309754/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE3ODc3Mi0zZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIXO98nEeS09074O8oymaZMpZQgnuPI2qH1I1DsEv-Q=)

Friend,

We're in a critical moment of this high-stakes election. The May 17th primary is just a short time away, and in order to do the work we need to do in the Senate to uplift workers and families, **we _first_ need to secure our spot on the ballot.**

Right now, we have just over a week to collect the signatures we need – and our volunteer field team needs all the help we can get.

**[We have until March 15th to collect the thousands of signatures we need to make the ballot – and we could really use your help. Can you volunteer for our petition field program today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531034/333309755/-213501002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE3ODc3Mi0zZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIXO98nEeS09074O8oymaZMpZQgnuPI2qH1I1DsEv-Q=&emci=05ae136d-239b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d1178772-3d9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN UP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531035/333309756/-213501002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE3ODc3Mi0zZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIXO98nEeS09074O8oymaZMpZQgnuPI2qH1I1DsEv-Q=&emci=05ae136d-239b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d1178772-3d9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18516396) Thank you for taking the time, friend. With you by our side, I know we'll reach this critical campaign milestone.

– Conor

\----------Forwarded message----------
From: **Team Lamb**
Date: February 25, 2022 at 1:35 p.m. ET
Subject: Want to see Conor on the ballot?

HUGE news, friend.

The Pennsylvania Supreme Court _just_ announced the date for petition collecting in Pennsylvania — _**and it starts today.**_

In order to get Conor Lamb on the ballot for the primary election, we need to collect _thousands_ of petition signatures throughout Pennsylvania over the next two weeks. **Every day is crucial.**

To make March successful, we have launched our **petition field program** — a program to have volunteers collect signatures so that we can reach every corner of PA and collect the signatures we need.

**[But there is only a short period of time to secure Conor’s spot. We need volunteers like you to help us distribute petitions to get Conor on the ballot. Can we count on you to sign up?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531036/333309757/-213501002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE3ODc3Mi0zZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIXO98nEeS09074O8oymaZMpZQgnuPI2qH1I1DsEv-Q=&emci=05ae136d-239b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d1178772-3d9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN UP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531037/333309758/-213501002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTE3ODc3Mi0zZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIXO98nEeS09074O8oymaZMpZQgnuPI2qH1I1DsEv-Q=&emci=05ae136d-239b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=d1178772-3d9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18516396) Workers’ rights, healthcare, climate change policy cannot wait until the next election cycle. We need to guarantee that Conor’s name is on the ballot friend, and that starts **today.**

clean_body: | = Friend, We're in a critical moment of this high-stakes election. The May 17th primary is just a short time away, and in order to do the work we need to do in the Senate to uplift workers and families, we first need to secure our spot on the ballot. Right now, we have just over a week to collect the signatures we need – and our volunteer field team needs all the help we can get. Thank you for taking the time, friend. With you by our side, I know we'll reach this critical campaign milestone. – Conor \----------Forwarded message---------- From: Team Lamb Date: February 25, 2022 at 1:35 p.m. ET Subject: Want to see Conor on the ballot? HUGE news, friend. The Pennsylvania Supreme Court just announced the date for petition collecting in Pennsylvania — and it starts today. In order to get Conor Lamb on the ballot for the primary election, we need to collect thousands of petition signatures throughout Pennsylvania over the next two weeks. Every day is crucial. To make March successful, we have launched our petition field program — a program to have volunteers collect signatures so that we can reach every corner of PA and collect the signatures we need. Workers’ rights, healthcare, climate change policy cannot wait until the next election cycle. We need to guarantee that Conor’s name is on the ballot friend, and that starts today. Thanks for your help, friend. We can't do this without you. – Team Lamb = = *

body:
Is it “strong” like Biden claims?
| [](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=0d6f273cdb5248ef84664cc3cfc7c830&_e=kCvKnOTgNYSqW0icLTkg_Y9cS6FstAU5ZnQa5n5S9JH7JOFpUvH9AsGnsmqOHJGZVrGIkHxxUN08vaswqHt6wOk1EFa8iZvRM5sfSgJ0E65F8Gmk-kAbIkbwplPB01XwkliCFZDbX2KY-_dJGvoBjiCWJzWJX_0pDkj5uh2Hx1PmpAtQVzpX6lgPr0LYNQ-9-gkrwgCLXgHAZA75_9W3gy3S9SoNW7-qKDz9zyCtPf1auDRoBaWh2Jz2tCGdOFiL5c7zI-G_gmSjf4Rv3rNn6SL5X0MMXrA7fpYVGhS--eL24AbJkX4jO8w5rysnIVNfVO9fN2t21873fyNI-ug-1niZ6lrrrinN_K5i5SBBNFri74ojTjpJxWnBdJc8WIDbltf6-SnwrinY8Wzl39UnVYJzSLJ5o_-kss5io5jlb1Gg5fbuS3jciCzLZ5wgPuI-uiI9EzVp0nm6bTpVEFSp-PLwPCfXCULYR0hWVFkr3nXDNDkqs9nWkLoEM-tyby3R)
---
Peter,
---
During his State of the Union speech, Joe Biden called the state of our union “strong”.
---
Even as inflation spirals out of control, our border remains wide-open, and Russia invades Ukraine, he had the audacity to claim that America is better off after a year of his leadership.
---
_I want to get your input on the TRUE state of our union, and I also want to know what your biggest concerns are so I can continue to prioritize them in Congress._
---
[**Please take my State of the Union Poll today to tell me how you feel about the state of America under the Biden Administration.**](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=0d6f273cdb5248ef84664cc3cfc7c830&_e=kCvKnOTgNYSqW0icLTkg_Y9cS6FstAU5ZnQa5n5S9JH7JOFpUvH9AsGnsmqOHJGZVrGIkHxxUN08vaswqHt6wOk1EFa8iZvRM5sfSgJ0E65F8Gmk-kAbIkbwplPB01XwkliCFZDbX2KY-_dJGvoBjiCWJzWJX_0pDkj5uh2Hx1PmpAtQVzpX6lgPr0LYNQ-9-gkrwgCLXgHAZA75_9W3gy3S9SoNW7-qKDz9zyCtPf1auDRoBaWh2Jz2tCGdOFiL5c7zI-G_gmSjf4Rv3rNn6SL5X0MMXrA7fpYVGhS--eJuKRqCVDfklUib59Wm7bzh-_innXAQDzXML9H980S7CRiANaSnEXDcmUTPFlTq3f4B8uNwEyHSO-SJ-TlXavJeOfHmG11wCftE6BnQCv3M2NrBHkJuOAHj4K7d8Q2jtdireAAbh5S2LyQvjvFjNc62Ojfi9p4Be2mIYoFNKyYKVKjqpLLRakleoE3l7Yp7KU5FzT329c6mqwz6jcQvMt7C)
---
**_Official State of the Union Poll_** **Respondent:** Peter **Response Status: Pending** **[TAKE THE POLL>>](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=0d6f273cdb5248ef84664cc3cfc7c830&_e=kCvKnOTgNYSqW0icLTkg_Y9cS6FstAU5ZnQa5n5S9JH7JOFpUvH9AsGnsmqOHJGZVrGIkHxxUN08vaswqHt6wOk1EFa8iZvRM5sfSgJ0E65F8Gmk-kAbIkbwplPB01XwkliCFZDbX2KY-_dJGvoBjiCWJzWJX_0pDkj5uh2Hx1PmpAtQVzpX6lgPr0LYNQ-9-gkrwgCLXgHAZA75_9W3gy3S9SoNW7-qKDz9zyCtPf1auDRoBaWh2Jz2tCGdOFiL5c7zI-G_gmSjf4Rv3rNn6SL5X0MMXrA7fpYVGhS--eIXhds8vsu5yqoBA_mXdSmoMExoQfThNEL1Tkq1N8wzrn5W54ZDCaMfc5L8ikPZjHd86hkj4poQAoTpQJUD07ISWsdEz03V6Cm4qLwQSIlGLkSb5A2mTFESCsvemE0QOhPPv8PJSlbXQ1mmPMNAIb4gpVkN-P8TDxET2PyBsfNpsCDrOvWtpaA-PF1iXJAfFjuLDjxWCn_v8VGxxwiEW9Uu)**
---
I saw Nancy Pelosi recently claimed Biden’s approval rating is tanking because Americans are “uninformed”.
---
**That kind of rhetoric makes me so angry, Peter. Americans are not “uninformed” about what’s going on in our country.**
---
_The Democrats’ policies are just wildly out of touch with the American people, and instead of accepting that, they try to talk down to us like they’re somehow smarter than we are._
---
Let’s show them we see right through Biden’s LIES and that their radical socialist agenda is dead in the water.
---
[**So please, take my State of the Union Poll today to tell me how you feel about the state of America under the Biden Administration.**](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=0d6f273cdb5248ef84664cc3cfc7c830&_e=kCvKnOTgNYSqW0icLTkg_Y9cS6FstAU5ZnQa5n5S9JH7JOFpUvH9AsGnsmqOHJGZVrGIkHxxUN08vaswqHt6wOk1EFa8iZvRM5sfSgJ0E65F8Gmk-kAbIkbwplPB01XwkliCFZDbX2KY-_dJGvoBjiCWJzWJX_0pDkj5uh2Hx1PmpAtQVzpX6lgPr0LYNQ-9-gkrwgCLXgHAZA75_9W3gy3S9SoNW7-qKDz9zyCtPf1auDRoBaWh2Jz2tCGdOFiL5c7zI-G_gmSjf4Rv3rNn6SL5X0MMXrA7fpYVGhS--eKgBWMc7EFIDhQdhlzxBDL4m_rYXbOBymWkpO7hIbm7KyDlZhdP4fCuDo9F2QqKszDblzBOrDViFgq8Mbvf0LfbzAUgCtKDKMbuuTcJB8LGjh5kPSVNAS1O8xawd8GbrT9pzwi6Xvx7c5sKNO1QFeHGXT3trx_LkmQ8Aba7HdFf1eQEOwYyhJO_mzBFH52B-8e8FicOCapboCgoFfIjB0tT)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=0d6f273cdb5248ef84664cc3cfc7c830&_e=kCvKnOTgNYSqW0icLTkg_Y9cS6FstAU5ZnQa5n5S9JH7JOFpUvH9AsGnsmqOHJGZVrGIkHxxUN08vaswqHt6wOk1EFa8iZvRM5sfSgJ0E65F8Gmk-kAbIkbwplPB01XwkliCFZDbX2KY-_dJGvoBjiCWJzWJX_0pDkj5uh2Hx1PmpAtQVzpX6lgPr0LYNQ-9-gkrwgCLXgHAZA75_9W3gy3S9SoNW7-qKDz9zyCtPf1auDRoBaWh2Jz2tCGdOFiL5c7zI-G_gmSjf4Rv3rNn6SL5X0MMXrA7fpYVGhS--eKPAG8FFcQ7U-uIssiK3xvwxNmJc87A4pKORS74ggh7-Ze5ZIoxA1bc7siD_Av8mGwFgEG0Y0NwDbOLbGLhki69kiMnxzS5lSJwCX4fWhGEdIUHIUnhGy7MGnfrwBmGwSnbSFjgje9XMdKN-dS7S7t73bHqhoxyWX4DzgqJb2F5DgEjwdk-Hu-3gtS35QTsKvuX9UfAQmSAr7pK9wdN8CsL)
---
Maria Elvira Salazar

Donald J. Trump March 2nd, 2022
Mr. President,

I’m proud to tell you that every candidate I asked you to endorse won or is solidly in first place going into a run-off. You were 12-0 last night with your Texas endorsements last night from my list of recommendations.

Your key endorsement of strong conservative candidates, who believe in the MAGA policies, who worked hard every day for months, was a winning combination over their opponents.

_Here are some highlights:

_ 1\. Your endorsement, along with the most conservative session in history last year, helped me receive more votes than any person on the ballot. I ended with over 1.4 million votes. That is 300,00 votes higher than my 2018 primary and it appears to be an all time record for any candidate ever in a Texas contested primary. I used your endorsement in all of our ads, mailers & was pinned to the top of my Facebook page for months.

2\. Ryan Guillen won last night with 54% of the vote in a 3 way race. He is the bold Democrat that changed parties in the border region. That is something you should be very proud of. That was an historic win that will open the door for more conservative Hispanic Democrats to switch parties.

3\. Ken Paxton finished first in a tough 4 way race. He is in a solid first place position going into the run-off.

4\. You scored a big conservative win in Tarrant County for County Judge. Tim O'Hare won with nearly 57% over longtime Fort Worth Mayor who was the early favorite.

_Winners outright last night:

_ Kevin Sparks, the oilman in West Texas, won in a 4 way race with nearly 54% of the vote.

Mayes Middleton won in a 4 way race with 56% of the vote.

Governor Abbott won with 66% in an 8 way race.

I won with 76% of the vote in a 6 way race and as noted had highest vote total of any candidate.

Glen Hegar won easily in a 2 way race.

Angela Paxton won 65% in a 2 way race.

And as noted myself, Tim O'Hare and Ryan Guillen all won in multi-candidate races.

_ Run-Offs Scheduled for May 24th: _

1\. Ken Paxton 42% , George P. Bush 22%

2\. Senator Pete Flores 46% in a 3 way race. He is the 1st Hispanic Republican to be elected to the Texas Senate in history.

3\. Land Commissioner Dawn Buckingham 42% in an 8 way race. Her second place opponent is at 17%.

4\. Tarrant DA Philip Sorrells 41% finished first in a 3 way race.

5\. House candidate Frederick Frazier finished first with 44% in a 3 way race.

What’s also important to remember is that with a few exceptions when you endorsed early on, there were no guarantees. These were hard fought races.

I recommended them because I believed in them and I knew your endorsement along with their work ethic and conservative records would get them into the winners circle. They all thank you for your strong total and complete endorsement as I do.

I know you also had other big wins in Texas last night as well.

No President’s endorsement in history has ever been as powerful as yours.

Dan Patrick

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Women's History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531659/333312270/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTdhOTdhNC0zZjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFIKzzJLxDXhZ9hnr3n4aKcYNRRThzWE2051hjlnL88=&emci=84dd48d8-249b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=217a97a4-3f9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=23594672)
---
| | |
---
Peter, this month is a time to honor and commemorate women's contributions to history, culture, and society. I am continually inspired by the many women in Georgia and across the country who have made strides to get us where we are and the women today that continue to forge new paths. Team Holly is working on empowering women’s voices in GA-14 by holding and attending several in-district events. While we are excited to continue uplifting women across the country,**we still have a lot of work in making up for the gender gap. ** Here in Northwest Georgia, we have 9 hospitals in the district and **only 4 of them have labor and delivery services**. Pregnant women who have to travel more than 40 miles to give birth are at a higher risk of complications. Women in rural communities deserve to have access to proper gynecological and labor delivery services. Here in Northwest Georgia, **we are considered a childcare desert.** That means that we are lacking accessible and affordable day care centers. Many women are forced to stay at home and leave the workforce because they can’t afford to pay for childcare services. Across the country, women are being paid less than a man in the same position. We have to deal with the **“pink tax”** , causing women’s products to be more expensive than mens. We also have to deal with the stigma of being too emotional, too mean, too nice, too girly, too female to be taken seriously. **In the U.S. right now women make up 27.9% of Congress, 24% of the Senate, and there has never been a woman elected to President.** Our history has shown us that women are equally capable, if not more, to take on any given task. So let’s prove it. I’m running not only to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, not only to uplift the voices of Northwest Georgia, but because I want to show girls, mothers, women everywhere that we belong in leadership and nothing can stop us. Take a moment to remember all of the great women before us, and all that are yet to come. Any one of us can make history and break out of the societal bounds set on us. **Our dreams aren’t unattainable, our dreams aren’t stupid, and nothing should hold us back.** Happy Women’s History Month!Holly McCormack.
---
| | |
---

| Friend,

Yesterday, Tina’s opponent decided to spend all day attacking Tina in emails and on social media.

_This is exactly the problem_ : The Virginia Senate is **in session** right now, but instead of working to pass conservative legislation, Tina’s opponent is spending her time on Facebook arguing semantics.

The problem with career politicians that focus more on their own brand than on legislation is that no one, not even other Republicans, will work with them, and so they are **completely ineffective.**

Is that the kind of elected official you want in office, one that goes online and complains, but won’t do the work you’re paying them for? **Because we sure don't!**

[**It’s time to elect officials like Tina Ramirez, who will actually do the work, not just yell and scream. Make a donation of just $5 to help us SHAKE things up in Richmond. >>**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=e92899eaaa&e=ae0ea222da)

clean_body: We are shaking Richmond up. | | | | | Friend, Yesterday, Tina’s opponent decided to spend all day attacking Tina in emails and on social media. This is exactly the problem : The Virginia Senate is in session right now, but instead of working to pass conservative legislation, Tina’s opponent is spending her time on Facebook arguing semantics. The problem with career politicians that focus more on their own brand than on legislation is that no one, not even other Republicans, will work with them, and so they are completely ineffective. Is that the kind of elected official you want in office, one that goes online and complains, but won’t do the work you’re paying them for? Because we sure don't! | When the new Senate Districts were drawn the new 12th district represents different constituents than the old 11th. body:
The most common answer I get... election integrity.

Friend,
---
Election integrity was listed as the #1 issue of concern among conservatives in CPAC’s straw poll...
---
_And I would wager to say that sentiment is shared by grassroots Wisconsinites like YOU._
---
But to prove just how vital of an issue this is here in Wisconsin, I’ve commissioned a brand-new survey of my own.

**[Please take just 30 seconds to complete my “Official Survey: Grassroots Priority #1” to let me know if you agree that election integrity ought to be our TOP concern for 2022.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=ec859b7d8f6e47dda773aea3bbb5bdcf&_e=9gWzxVv3lFuvuyxlKs93j1XhZEctStsnoiPIiNC4Hak1Riq-DedZpt1O9jXvOWIbRgOneAeMIMpr-l6LFkqn87HLqCDmVeHv_P-wgiSxwWL1bjQV6J7v81EAV8zc6Y30TxqMF11oJ1chHliOHtoGfLTRMdlyZayBqTxyhwAh6IKIRk--xHpNbuggHyM3ad4jyq8-5Q7fY1mw0fJmJHnt3Rl0Yu35Ic8xgOrnzCvNd_HZnvQbDSgInUhEq3cyIJfC46f_Gqp_Zx6O8M9M1uzpSZceOcl48CNBEXQlY-AXN9JFxS7MKNYrAvLmAturm2IPl0r85ErzgpQDtxalyWZeARsVT1Xoznoa-zzcDXVjTqIsyCwyHpe0SIn_JG_b0UIaeN2P9qc8mXx0eQaqckvLeRTMQEHE8YhZSWruFdEcOLb5qWsOYRz_Ik9wRDs4HBOWHZx06Ar7YCDp-_oOK2_E_3Ky888pa1l7sfBKTBERyhwGPRfpZRseorDHt5zHIZgOON9jhMHIAdfbhmEvL2pvzw%3D%3D)**

---
There’s no sugarcoating it Friend, 2020 severely eroded the American people’s trust in our elections – and those valid concerns deserve action, not just words.
---
That’s why I SUED the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) for their unlawful guidance in the 2020 election.
---
_And even though the highest court of our state REFUSED to uphold the law and take our case against the WEC, I promised you that I would never stop fighting for what’s right._
---
**_Which is why I announced my plans for a new Office of Election Integrity & Public Trust Unit within the state Department of Justice to ensure YOUR vote counts. _**
---
Time and again on the campaign trail, voters tell me how deeply concerned they are about election integrity after 2020.
---
But now, I need grassroots conservatives like you to take my survey and help me PROVE that election integrity MUST be our primary focus of this historic election year.
---
