---
| **[Do you agree that we must elect leaders who will defend democracy no matter what?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531874/333313453/-20952226?refcode=DW_EM_PT_WL_220303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZlMWE3Ni00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdtmbkYazco_aAD74yJTTDqWQVb9HKg6_h_NI8wzZQY=&emci=ace3f56e-2b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bdfe1a76-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)** | | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531875/333313454/-20952226?refcode=DW_EM_PT_WL_220303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZlMWE3Ni00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdtmbkYazco_aAD74yJTTDqWQVb9HKg6_h_NI8wzZQY=&emci=ace3f56e-2b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bdfe1a76-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)****

During this week’s historic State of the Union address, President Biden opened by proudly declaring, “We, the United States of America, stand with the Ukrainian people.”

I have been so inspired by the American people – and people around the world – who have raised their voices over the last few weeks in opposition to Russia’s oppression and invasion of Ukraine.

One again, the United States is showing itself to be a world leader – rallying NATO, spearheading sanctions against Russia, and ensuring that Russian oligarchs will be held accountable.

President Biden’s leadership on this issue stands in clear opposition to the embarrassment of Trump’s “perfect phone call” with Ukrainian President Zelensky – the same phone call that resulted in Trump’s impeachment.

Instead of threatening foreign leaders to protect his own interests, President Biden is ensuring that the United States supports our allies and keeps our enemies in check.

**The outspoken support I’ve seen from Washingtonians for the Ukrainian people and for democracy itself is a clear condemnation of the unserious, radical “leadership” that Trump and his allies – including Loren Culp – represent.**

[Do you agree with me that we must elect leaders who will take a stand for democracy, both here and abroad?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531877/333313456/-20952226?refcode=DW_EM_PT_WL_220303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZlMWE3Ni00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdtmbkYazco_aAD74yJTTDqWQVb9HKg6_h_NI8wzZQY=&emci=ace3f56e-2b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bdfe1a76-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)
| **[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531878/333313457/-20952226?refcode=DW_EM_PT_WL_220303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZlMWE3Ni00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdtmbkYazco_aAD74yJTTDqWQVb9HKg6_h_NI8wzZQY=&emci=ace3f56e-2b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bdfe1a76-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)**
---
| **[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531879/333313458/-20952226?refcode=DW_EM_PT_WL_220303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGZlMWE3Ni00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdtmbkYazco_aAD74yJTTDqWQVb9HKg6_h_NI8wzZQY=&emci=ace3f56e-2b9b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bdfe1a76-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7651992)**
---
As we support brave Ukrainians fighting for their own democratic freedom, it’s imperative that we also look to our own elected officials in the U.S. who seek to suppress the voices of the people, using voter suppression legislation and other underhanded political tactics to hoard power for themselves.

Washington families here in the Fourth District deserve a representative who will put them first – not someone who’s allegiance has always lain with Trump and his failed leadership.

Thank you for making your voice heard and taking a stand for democracy!

Doug

clean_body: As we support brave Ukrainians fighting for their own democratic freedom, it’s imperative that we also look to our own elected officials in the U.S. who seek to suppress the voices of the people, using voter suppression legislation and other underhanded political tactics to hoard power for themselves. | | | | | ** | During this week’s historic State of the Union address, President Biden opened by proudly declaring, “We, the United States of America, stand with the Ukrainian people.” I have been so inspired by the American people – and people around the world – who have raised their voices over the last few weeks in opposition to Russia’s oppression and invasion of Ukraine. One again, the United States is showing itself to be a world leader – rallying NATO, spearheading sanctions against Russia, and ensuring that Russian oligarchs will be held accountable. President Biden’s leadership on this issue stands in clear opposition to the embarrassment of Trump’s “perfect phone call” with Ukrainian President Zelensky – the same phone call that resulted in Trump’s impeachment. Instead of threatening foreign leaders to protect his own interests, President Biden is ensuring that the United States supports our allies and keeps our enemies in check. The outspoken support I’ve seen from Washingtonians for the Ukrainian people and for democracy itself is a clear condemnation of the unserious, radical “leadership” that Trump and his allies – including Loren Culp – represent. | | As we support brave Ukrainians fighting for their own democratic freedom, it’s imperative that we also look to our own elected officials in the U.S. who seek to suppress the voices of the people, using voter suppression legislation and other underhanded political tactics to hoard power for themselves. Washington families here in the Fourth District deserve a representative who will put them first – not someone who’s allegiance has always lain with Trump and his failed leadership. Thank you for making your voice heard and taking a stand for democracy! Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Big news: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531995/333313762/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20220303_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjliZDNiNS00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToCIE_7A-P-8eDbOtmiyocApqvlVnVKsr_1aUuXEdm4=&emci=b79bd3b5-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=bb9bd3b5-419b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — we did it! Here in New Mexico, access to our rivers and streams is a core part of our birthright and our heritage — so much so that it’s in our state constitution. **That’s why it’s such big news that the New Mexico Supreme Court just reaffirmed that our public waters belong to the public.** This never should have been a question. But back in 2017, under the previous Republican administration, the New Mexico Game Commission passed a loophole that allowed wealthy landowners to bar the public from waters on their property if they are non-navigable — knowing full well that would eliminate all or most of the waters in New Mexico. Since then, so many of you have spoken out and supported my work to make sure wealthy landowners cannot keep the streams, rivers, and watercourses that run through their properties to themselves. I’ve filed an amicus brief before the New Mexico Supreme Court, urged the State Game Commission to deny every landowner application to block public access back in August, and never let anyone get in the way of my work to make sure public waters remain public. Now, wealthy landowners can’t get in the way of folks who simply want to enjoy our state’s wonderful waters, whether they would prefer to fish, boat, or just wade through. This was a years-long battle and it never would have happened without our collective activism. We’ve worked hard to get to this moment — and it’s been worth every effort. Thank you. — Martin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42531996/333313763/-1658023211?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20220303_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjliZDNiNS00MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ToCIE_7A-P-8eDbOtmiyocApqvlVnVKsr_1aUuXEdm4=)
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---

| | Team, My name is Sonia Chang-Díaz. I’m the first Latina and first Asian American State Senator in Massachusetts, and I’m running for governor. I wanted to take a moment to tell you a story about my grandpa. He was a doctor in rural Montana, so a lot of communities in the surrounding area relied on him for their health care. He was also a lifelong small-government Republican. One day, I worked up the courage to ask him what we needed to do to fix our health care system. And he said, “The only way I see to get greed out of health care — where it doesn’t belong — is with a single payer system.” [_**If it’s good enough for my Republican grandfather, we can get it done here in Massachusetts. Add your name if you agree.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42532027/333313910/198811478?refcode=em_20220303_p_s_healthcare&ms=em_20220303_p_s_healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNjNTIyMC00MjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCuM07hYtuOk6Srz-YWh27vZsP1YU7Z4mhZdT53XThY=&emci=0a51999e-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=08cc5220-429b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) Right now, Bay Staters are spending an obscene amount of time and money on the bureaucracy of insurance and the billing and processing of paperwork. All while other countries have figured out how to deliver better health outcomes at much cheaper costs to their people. We deserve the same — and I’m the only candidate in this race who supports single payer health care. [_**I need to know if you’re with me. If you’re ready for single payer health care, add your name and join our campaign right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42532028/333313911/198811478?refcode=em_20220303_p_s_healthcare&ms=em_20220303_p_s_healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNjNTIyMC00MjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCuM07hYtuOk6Srz-YWh27vZsP1YU7Z4mhZdT53XThY=&emci=0a51999e-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=08cc5220-429b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) We have the tools and resources we need to meet this moment and address the rising cost of health care all while building a better future for everyone across Massachusetts. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and build the movement for it — and I hope you’ll join me. [_**Add your name in support of single payer health care, and join us today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42532029/333313912/198811478?refcode=em_20220303_p_s_healthcare&ms=em_20220303_p_s_healthcare&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGNjNTIyMC00MjliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lCuM07hYtuOk6Srz-YWh27vZsP1YU7Z4mhZdT53XThY=&emci=0a51999e-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=08cc5220-429b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684840) Together, we can get this done. Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: Join us to get this done for the Commonwealth. | | | | | Team, My name is Sonia Chang-Díaz. I’m the first Latina and first Asian American State Senator in Massachusetts, and I’m running for governor. I wanted to take a moment to tell you a story about my grandpa. He was a doctor in rural Montana, so a lot of communities in the surrounding area relied on him for their health care. He was also a lifelong small-government Republican. One day, I worked up the courage to ask him what we needed to do to fix our health care system. And he said, “The only way I see to get greed out of health care — where it doesn’t belong — is with a single payer system.” Right now, Bay Staters are spending an obscene amount of time and money on the bureaucracy of insurance and the billing and processing of paperwork. All while other countries have figured out how to deliver better health outcomes at much cheaper costs to their people. We deserve the same — and I’m the only candidate in this race who supports single payer health care. We have the tools and resources we need to meet this moment and address the rising cost of health care all while building a better future for everyone across Massachusetts. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and build the movement for it — and I hope you’ll join me. Together, we can get this done. Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsb2t3j8b0d8iliv2ptbf9q81cttvbpfb2ge1040_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrrepj1cji6cobkmlq3cshicdj38olh6or70t35c9jbaorhmpi77ddmmjgeepr0cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgbbdhnm8r6cc9kmdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5hmcob3cdi66oh5u)

| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv9l9ss380kihbqdfhh7jglbpivt290ngiogojj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb6kkifb0neb84d9au68n6vihvh3auerm6ap6jp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6gnd4mats047ebvkcfdkfh48n88j2icordgkvtg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zh4eosjqb6a5mobevves4i0l8o4v9f0mobij2b7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl70fb22852b051g9dsvv30q0cnovflvpflm7a58_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdrib4teb7lv285bs0pv90tsiljn9r1spdpml8lg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjcqavvutl00mlkk8053a6pr8fuunu9jfr2khltg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2v0hr4h5focdvvbr7off6bb4nq6mr42gn3t2hr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z47jc5p0k7c7bf7cm7cuu0d6en1dftrirrsjuhc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cpgm6or4cdh2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

name: Rep. Val Demings
subject: I don't say this lightly, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
If we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue
| |
---
I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. Every dollar will help this people-powered team defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42532514/333316100/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2484-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZmYjIzZS00NDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EdSKM4-FNSuy8sRbPaCMF7rIgVi-Zs8UEoo7xvBAlMA=)

The timing – and the sheer consequences _–_ of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down _ 2 points _behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in more than $28 million to dismantle our Senate majority.

**If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell.**
With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we _will_ flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. **It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors.**

My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short. clean_body: I’m honored to be the Republican nominee for Texas’ brand-new seat. | Friend, I will never forget the outpouring of support you have shown me and my family during this race – you have helped build a true grassroots movement. And thanks to YOU, we have officially won the Republican primary for Texas’ NEW 38th congressional district – 1 of the 5 seats we need to END Nancy Pelosi’s majority. I could never have made it this far without the help of my family, all those who endorsed us, and of course, the grassroots voters like you who supported me since day one. Friend, Joe Biden refused to admit during his State of the Union Address the other night the failure that is his “woke” progressive presidency. Biden and the Democrats have ravaged our economy, made us look weak on the world stage, and worst of all, put Americans LAST at every turn. But with our resounding victory, we also sent a message the other night to Biden, Pelosi, and the radical Left... ...That we are the tip of the spear in a red wave that will FLIP the House and SWEEP the Democrats out of Congress this year. With our victory comes a whole new shift in momentum to win the 5 crucial seats we need to end Pelosi’s majority once and for all. body:
After President Biden's address, what issues do you most want to see Congress address?
Here’s where we are.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42533406/333320277/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220303SOTU_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZiNGUzMC00NzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rmREHm_svG28jChwfn4nQdTm63vFIbKO0s3sSXL61s=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42533407/333320278/-1392507730?refcode=em_pet_220303SOTU_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZiNGUzMC00NzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rmREHm_svG28jChwfn4nQdTm63vFIbKO0s3sSXL61s=) On Tuesday night, President Biden addressed the nation in a strong State of the Union speech.

He detailed how our work over the past year has grown the economy, put more money in people's pockets, and allowed our country to better address COVID.

He also laid out an ambitious vision for the work that still lies ahead. He spoke of the need to strengthen union rights by passing the PRO Act, to lower drug prices, to make our supply chain more resilient by passing the America COMPETES Act, and to invest in clean and renewable energy.

LBR is committed to building a better America. She has championed all of these causes, and will continue to advocate for the legislation that we need to become law of the land.

The next few weeks will be critical as we seek to pass more legislation in 2022, and we would love to have your input on what the top priorities of Congress should be.

**[Please take a minute to answer our survey: after President Biden's State of the Union address, what issues do you most want to see Congress address?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42533408/333320279/-1957409532?ms=em_pet_220303SOTU_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_L1&refcode=em_pet_220303SOTU_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZiNGUzMC00NzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rmREHm_svG28jChwfn4nQdTm63vFIbKO0s3sSXL61s=&emci=7abf5538-389b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6efb4e30-479b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11913588)** | | **[Add Your Voice](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42533409/333320280/-1957409532?ms=em_pet_220303SOTU_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_B1&refcode=em_pet_220303SOTU_n_tlbr_actives_6_ng_n_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZiNGUzMC00NzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rmREHm_svG28jChwfn4nQdTm63vFIbKO0s3sSXL61s=&emci=7abf5538-389b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=6efb4e30-479b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=11913588)**

\--------Forwarded message--------
Sender: Jessica Cisneros
Date: Wednesday, March 2, 2022
Subject: HUGE NEWS: We’re headed to a runoff

Peter, this is big news!
The votes have been counted and because of the small margin — we’re headed to a runoff election against Henry Cuellar on May 24th. This is a crucial moment, so we just set a goal to raise $50,000 in the next 24 hours to jump-start our campaign to defeat Cuellar in the runoff. [**_I need you to step up right now to help me defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th in the runoff election. Please make a $5 contribution right now – we need all hands on deck._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCT8pyctzvXcgQXaf2tdJQ83_rpOmpuADCd4D9fFqdDTbG9-h0UUelRSLOKb-19YSg/3k1/-ddxOpPNRu-d9sfpq5FPrA/h3/6ahaj-nKTq5pIWqmWZGeQ2JeD-xKiQLrhkj9DUX-ViY) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCT8pyctzvXcgQXaf2tdJQ83_rpOmpuADCd4D9fFqdDTY3NwWZgYv6LL0WRdz7ootA/3k1/-ddxOpPNRu-d9sfpq5FPrA/h4/wizrfGxTP5uAmAwCCui-XTxrTF2JSXeyMXcc57EUYxI) This fight was about South Texans proving that our dreams could take on their corporate money and that a daughter of immigrants could bring working class leadership back to the community that raised her. We proved just how powerful our movement is and are ready to keep fighting for the future we deserve. Together, we will take control back from Big Oil, private prisons, and Wall Street, and put it back where it belongs: with the people. We can defeat Henry Cuellar on May 24th but we need a major influx of grassroots contributions to go up against the support Cuellar receives from corporate PACs, the private prison industry, and the Koch Network. And remember, Henry Cuellar is under FBI investigation. The people of South Texas deserve a representative who will fight for their interests every step of the way. [**_Peter, please chip in any amount that you can afford to jump-start our fundraising for this runoff. We need your support now more than ever._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCT8pyctzvXcgQXaf2tdJQ83_rpOmpuADCd4D9fFqdDTbPSSl4SdoKIObJ0JymrWit/3k1/-ddxOpPNRu-d9sfpq5FPrA/h5/FuVQTnyhS4TK03GSmaP9auHjh7fF6849HqUdiny7qBI) Thank you so much for your support, Jessica Cisneros

name: Team Kilmer
subject: We haven't heard from you in a while
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Are you with Derek in the fight to save the USPS?
Peter,

Americans rely on the United States Postal Service for essential goods, life-saving medications, paying their bills, receiving Social Security, and even exercising their right to vote. But ever since former President Trump appointed Postmaster Louis DeJoy, he's worked to sabotage the USPS at every turn.

DeJoy is still trying to undermine President Biden's agenda and the USPS by implementing policies that slow down delivery times and raise costs -- including in Washington. His actions have interfered with President Biden's plan to send out free at-home COVID-19 tests. Now, Postmaster DeJoy has even moved to replace our aging fleet of USPS vehicles with gas-powered vehicles instead of electric ones against the guidance of the EPA and the White House.

Millions of Americans rely on the USPS, and we have to take action to protect workers and our environment. Derek helped pass the bipartisan Postal Service Reform Act through the House to support the USPS. He's working to ensure the postal service has the financial footing to keep providing essential services for years to come. [**Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Postal Service Reform Act >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nuIGqj4D1MMEmsKGwFztleSWcvFhw3NOnidi8fxz3Ws=/KjzRcSEjaoW_plY1NKUMVdzwefc1UlZnkFfjfWO5s6g=?ms=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&source=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

The USPS is essential to our country's infrastructure, and people can't afford delays in the delivery of their medications, bills, and ballots, especially during a pandemic. We have a responsibility to preserve the USPS for our seniors, veterans, rural communities, and our democracy.

Derek is committed to investing in the USPS and defending this essential service. The Postal Service Reform Act will take necessary steps to save USPS, including boosting investment in frontline workers and the agency and holding the USPS accountable for delivering mail on time.

[**We need to take action to protect the USPS. Sign on if you 're with Derek in the fight to save the USPS and add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Postal Service Reform Act >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/nuIGqj4D1MMEmsKGwFztleSWcvFhw3NOnidi8fxz3Ws=/KjzRcSEjaoW_plY1NKUMVdzwefc1UlZnkFfjfWO5s6g=?ms=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&source=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/nuIGqj4D1MMEmsKGwFztleSWcvFhw3NOnidi8fxz3Ws=/KlCnk9LQHIryci6ea2vCCDn21dd0tq4U3YRh-nHVXHU=?refcode=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220303_USPS_adv_gq_inac___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

He's working to ensure the postal service has the financial footing to keep providing essential services for years to come. ={{ContactData}} The USPS is essential to our country's infrastructure, and people can't afford delays in the delivery of their medications, bills, and ballots, especially during a pandemic. We have a responsibility to preserve the USPS for our seniors, veterans, rural communities, and our democracy. Derek is committed to investing in the USPS and defending this essential service. The Postal Service Reform Act will take necessary steps to save USPS, including boosting investment in frontline workers and the agency and holding the USPS accountable for delivering mail on time. ={{ContactData}} Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = | = ---|--- Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please =.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: a personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
New Hampshire is a solid swing state, and all eyes are going to be glued to Maggie’s race.
| | |

I have to be direct: I’m worried.
We _finally_ have a Democrat in the White House and control of the Senate — with that comes an opportunity to make progress for American families. But I’m worried because all that progress depends on us holding on to the slim one-vote Democratic Senate majority.
Senate control hinges on New Hampshire, where Maggie Hassan is defending a seat she won by just 1,017 votes. Republican extremists have already spent over $7.5 MILLION attacking Maggie, and polling shows New Hampshire **statistically tied.**
**That’s why I’m asking for your help right now:[_Will you please rush $5 or more to give Maggie the resources she needs to win and keep the Senate blue? name: John Lira
subject: This is YOUR victory
body:
Peter, we did it!

I want to take the time to personally thank you for your support.

I am honored to have the opportunity to represent Texans from West to South Texas as the Democratic nominee for TX-23.

I am ready to fight for the legislation that will support you and your family. Legislation that will protect access to healthcare, help small businesses, and build an economy that works for everyone.

Thank you to everyone who has helped us to get to this point — whether you voted, made calls, or donated, your support is what got us to this moment. As a completely grassroots-funded campaign, by the people for the people, we could not have done it without your contributions.

But, Peter, this is just the beginning.

The real work is coming as we go up against our Republican opponent in the coming months and work to share our vision of Texas with even more people across the district. We will be facing fierce opposition from Republicans and we will need to fight back hard if we want to see a win in November.

Winning this seat for TX-23 is about keeping a Democratic majority in the House, it’s about flipping Texas blue, but most of all, it’s about ensuring that ALL Texans have a voice in Washington.

You deserve to have a representative who will fight for meaningful change for you and your family, not for the corporations and special interests. I am ready to get into Congress and fight just as hard for you there as I did as a Marine.

It’s time to keep fighting, Peter. Will you be one of the first donors to fund us for the first stage of the general election so we can see real representation for all Texans? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220303?refcode=em20220303]

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220303?refcode=em20220303]

In solidarity,
John Lira

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

I am ready to get into Congress and fight just as hard for you there as I did as a Marine. It’s time to keep fighting, Peter. Will you be one of the first donors to fund us for the first stage of the general election so we can see real representation for all Texans? [] Donate » [] In solidarity, John Lira [] [] John Lira for Congress 1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120 #8096 San Antonio, TX 78220 United States John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: A heartfelt thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Here's the plan going forward |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4ea20158ae&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
[I wanted to write you today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=14d8cc461f&e=44b8c466b0) as a heartfelt thank you.

**The last year has been one of the most difficult, most revealing, and ultimately one of the most satisfying years of my life.**

While pushing for election integrity, I saw the dark underbelly of Liberal Deep State, the true depths to which they are willing to go to undermine everything our founding fathers fought and died for.

**They are willing to lie, cheat, and steal if it means keeping power.

They are willing to use dead people’s names to win elections. They are willing to override the will of the people.**

_They have slandered me, attacked me, threatened me and my family, while writing countless articles trying desperately to stamp out the fire that this election integrity movement has ignited._

**They have fought me on the page, fought me in court, and fought me in the Arizona Legislature.**

**_And yet they could not prevail._**

Despite all of this, why was this one of the most satisfying years of my life?

**I have seen the union and reunion of proud patriots across the country who refuse to step down, refuse to back up, and adamantly stand on the foundation of America First principles that resulted in the freest nation on Earth.**

This is why I want to thank you. So far, we have been able to ignite audits around the country, develop foolproof currency-grade watermarking on ballots, identify those responsible for the 2020 fraud, draft legislation to decertify Arizona, and establish clear and necessary next steps to make Arizona the gold standard of election integrity.

**So, thank you from the bottom of my heart.**

And I need you to once again back me as I fight a three-front war on behalf of election integrity.
1. I am fighting to establish currency grade ballot protection technology around the country.

**This requires ample funds to push for petitions and media campaigns around the country to make sure that we are able to make ballots make sense again.**

**The left wants to fight against this at all costs. But I am fighting with America First patriots around the country and have confidence and faith that we can get this done with your help.**
1. I am fighting against a subpoena to appear before the sham January 6th committee.

**What you need to know about this is the Left and RINOS like Liz Cheney are using this as an opportunity to put Election Integrity on blast. We cannot let them win here. I am currently fighting back with everything I can to make sure that the movement continues to progress.**
1. I am fighting to decertify the Arizona 2020 election.

**This is perhaps the most important of the three. We have established through extensive auditing that the 2020 election was irredeemably compromised in Arizona. The Legislative has plenary power over elections and we must exercise this power to defend elections in Arizona.**

**The Left wants to silence this and squash this at all costs. And we cannot let them do this. We are pushing for petitions and media campaigns to push for this as hard as we can. And I need your help to push this through before the legislative session is over!**

[Can you please help me as I fight for election integrity? We have won many battles, but the war is just beginning.

_Please help with a generous donation today!_

clean_body: Here's the plan going forward | | | | | Dear , as a heartfelt thank you. The last year has been one of the most difficult, most revealing, and ultimately one of the most satisfying years of my life. While pushing for election integrity, I saw the dark underbelly of Liberal Deep State, the true depths to which they are willing to go to undermine everything our founding fathers fought and died for. They are willing to lie, cheat, and steal if it means keeping power. They are willing to use dead people’s names to win elections. They are willing to override the will of the people. They have slandered me, attacked me, threatened me and my family, while writing countless articles trying desperately to stamp out the fire that this election integrity movement has ignited. They have fought me on the page, fought me in court, and fought me in the Arizona Legislature. And yet they could not prevail. Despite all of this, why was this one of the most satisfying years of my life? I have seen the union and reunion of proud patriots across the country who refuse to step down, refuse to back up, and adamantly stand on the foundation of America First principles that resulted in the freest nation on Earth. This is why I want to thank you. So far, we have been able to ignite audits around the country, develop foolproof currency-grade watermarking on ballots, identify those responsible for the 2020 fraud, draft legislation to decertify Arizona, and establish clear and necessary next steps to make Arizona the gold standard of election integrity. So, thank you from the bottom of my heart. And I need you to once again back me as I fight a three-front war on behalf of election integrity. 1. I am fighting to establish currency grade ballot protection technology around the country. This requires ample funds to push for petitions and media campaigns around the country to make sure that we are able to make ballots make sense again. name: Nan Whaley
subject: Where I come from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Team,
Everything I learned about hard work and strength, I learned from my mom and dad. I grew up in a small Indiana town, where I watched my parents fight every day to make sure I would have a future full of opportunities. When my dad lost his job as a union auto worker, it was tough to make ends meet, but my mom went to work at the laundromat behind our house to help.
Through all of this, I watched my parents keep their dignity intact. I learned a lesson that I know so many families in Ohio have had to learn too: there is no shame in struggle. Working families deserved better then, and they still deserve better now.
**[I’m running for governor of Ohio because I want to help our families who are struggling. I’m the only non-millionaire in this race, so I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you. Can you donate any amount you are able to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42534614/333326093/-2079251220?refcode=nw_em_220303_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJlZDJlNy00ZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpbDZjz_WkO27kEDKD46b7TDsu193CY2T6taH401AHo=)**
I took the lessons from my parents with me when I left Indiana. I moved to Ohio because it was a land of opportunity, and that never felt more true than when I became the first person in my family to graduate college after attending the University of Dayton.
I fell in love with Ohio, and it’s been my home ever since. That little girl from the Midwest became mayor of Dayton, and I couldn’t have done it without witnessing the resilience of my family first hand. But, people shouldn’t have to be so resilient. We should be able to count on our elected officials to make our lives better.
**[I promise you: I will fight every day as governor to build an Ohio where everyone can thrive. But, I can’t get there without you. Pitch in $5 to help bring opportunities back to Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42534615/333326151/-2079251220?refcode=nw_em_220303_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJlZDJlNy00ZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpbDZjz_WkO27kEDKD46b7TDsu193CY2T6taH401AHo=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42534616/333326153/-2079251220?refcode=nw_em_220303_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWJlZDJlNy00ZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpbDZjz_WkO27kEDKD46b7TDsu193CY2T6taH401AHo=)****

name: Jena Tarantin
subject: True Story - Russian War
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
|
---
My Dear Fellow American,

My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, [**James, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=322bd1a3a12440d0840ef1617e1de2e1&_e=JO8VWQSClpV_F_3eFGpEDa-AsE3UBs-NCploDZKgpd7McqaZxrD-DbdsR0OYjr9qI32e2cPjVbTj4FnBu-h8XvuZvOlqP6AN9jbwqjB4MKPIPSw4vj-F-E71RA9H5xwH3y6Ql71MYy2Yl_k80HoozDu2eXu3WneoLeWzrahEiL8IhYBwyU-1K7OC_pdyQ-AU8eDFY6rZ8XLkA8EOGwH2SasC83gFMcrQPqH8O2LwAcbkDVM1yuspEJGkxdQIgTcXsfMOyzUVXY-0cOSU-7cAXh5efeIweuBWbWqggY2ZFFAiyBzj7LqmSUxlJk1GAA3nGTFZK4ycLMHGhB4Ivbmp09xlrjnxJsPLTAm5CN83amG-ZeZ83oY7m95Hu9R90JOHEPzqQ2KZTM1b90Yttxw78I-r4ASFv0V4UUU1Qe_Z2OCJ-OR22bpOKCDiXdAMPHW2_3aurTjPhpUzLhg8HeRJ2dUedS6srlRQx8wk5iXpSkM%3D)

I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation.

My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us.

Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – **the land of opportunity.**

My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free.

However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again!

**As Ronald Reagan once said,** __**“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.”**__

**He wasn’t wrong,** that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried.

I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest.

I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically.

I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote.

I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings.

I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots.

I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all.

I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education.

I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines.

I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing!

_**I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream.**_

**The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.** Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill.

[**We need solutions, not worries.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=322bd1a3a12440d0840ef1617e1de2e1&_e=JO8VWQSClpV_F_3eFGpEDa-AsE3UBs-NCploDZKgpd7McqaZxrD-DbdsR0OYjr9qI32e2cPjVbTj4FnBu-h8XvuZvOlqP6AN9jbwqjB4MKPIPSw4vj-F-E71RA9H5xwH3y6Ql71MYy2Yl_k80HoozDu2eXu3WneoLeWzrahEiL8IhYBwyU-1K7OC_pdyQ-AU8eDFY6rZ8XLkA8EOGwH2SasC83gFMcrQPqH8O2LwAcbkDVM1yuspEJGkxdQIgTcXsfMOyzUVXY-0cOSU-7cAXtJG24hVC-4HrSyY19yhA9cKCYB648uDiWaZm76cgWPZ3hyaYESYZ_nQM2CfQjhrzCY2nuSsEd-9JFyZtS8vNjYxX13VVSwtTxaXTstQShjYFaaxLm2o1ZBRdSC_gSf4L-eAbQ8ZjVNdTSxXdMGsOriLc3p11gRRLGD8rNss-PDEKGXcKNA21d5xcHiSfcLdDyFHYsPwiL_8BKDN5PA5iYg%3D) That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country.

James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here.

Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. So if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in American, [**then please hear my voice and support my husband for the United States Senate.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=322bd1a3a12440d0840ef1617e1de2e1&_e=JO8VWQSClpV_F_3eFGpEDa-AsE3UBs-NCploDZKgpd7McqaZxrD-DbdsR0OYjr9qI32e2cPjVbTj4FnBu-h8XvuZvOlqP6AN9jbwqjB4MKPIPSw4vj-F-E71RA9H5xwH3y6Ql71MYy2Yl_k80HoozDu2eXu3WneoLeWzrahEiL8IhYBwyU-1K7OC_pdyQ-AU8eDFY6rZ8XLkA8EOGwH2SasC83gFMcrQPqH8O2LwAcbkDVM1yuspEJGkxdQIgTcXsfMOyzUVXY-0cOSU-7cAXqt4hHYWGxLhFogw_pnStW3A7j6u56uDhCmM0LGE6NLIwgxeY8SU0_Tam3GvEdVJNtCdYDtPAtQPVwMlUXlVxYq-gkal0wkayMc4G-ANSm1nP0CIjURHPkNMuN-EJDrbap4ueyluYzlMtzR_iy-PVGYevAUtvjYjPGV3bHg4I5Dfb40uKIeUNV5tM9ZkhvVlLbpXiiunXVUGqcovxaJx5j8%3D)

[**We must be a United Front.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=322bd1a3a12440d0840ef1617e1de2e1&_e=JO8VWQSClpV_F_3eFGpEDa-AsE3UBs-NCploDZKgpd7McqaZxrD-DbdsR0OYjr9qI32e2cPjVbTj4FnBu-h8XvuZvOlqP6AN9jbwqjB4MKPIPSw4vj-F-E71RA9H5xwH3y6Ql71MYy2Yl_k80HoozDu2eXu3WneoLeWzrahEiL8IhYBwyU-1K7OC_pdyQ-AU8eDFY6rZ8XLkA8EOGwH2SasC83gFMcrQPqH8O2LwAcbkDVM1yuspEJGkxdQIgTcXsfMOyzUVXY-0cOSU-7cAXoSVnVN9dJhcno_gC8Ce-6e0HFv5viCxvn9-0zXlcSMJX-dHDfjY99Rbpl_Wx9I6NZN_zjGzNSbcNFxwVw64nb1_lv4hEet2fWCTLhJ3RZBObBwE5WBbty5r-55HTJUKP7pltf5E3PzEMFg8q7L8NWLP_6EM3Zfy_WqKE3bYkWNO473hwyr9VFLSJPD_5Glw7opIDaKfjiu7_r_b3PNbrao%3D) Please... if not for me, then for the love of God and our Country.

James is not a career politician. [**He is You. Our story is an America story.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=322bd1a3a12440d0840ef1617e1de2e1&_e=JO8VWQSClpV_F_3eFGpEDa-AsE3UBs-NCploDZKgpd7McqaZxrD-DbdsR0OYjr9qI32e2cPjVbTj4FnBu-h8XvuZvOlqP6AN9jbwqjB4MKPIPSw4vj-F-E71RA9H5xwH3y6Ql71MYy2Yl_k80HoozDu2eXu3WneoLeWzrahEiL8IhYBwyU-1K7OC_pdyQ-AU8eDFY6rZ8XLkA8EOGwH2SasC83gFMcrQPqH8O2LwAcbkDVM1yuspEJGkxdQIgTcXsfMOyzUVXY-0cOSU-7cAXteN0gSqDafxCP7h4wW88YujOIWZmh5x9L5TrYk8rPGo3YH4082iyK4w4RZTcAeoN_kiYOOE-OmVc25oABcBJMuxHtmWVwfL0QrYE51heXbne92XZ6iymWsyHU7C6x5vZbSeEzpiutjKwJmx11FexhTz6SbZSQ3FgEY1hMMkHVgts20p3m8PHLwS_1L-BCnPSh31iP_6zxKs0o1WJNCI1c4%3D)

America’s future is up to us, let’s work together and leave it better than we found it.

Thank you,

**Jena Tarantin**

P.S. I wish to share with you a note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:

May the American People be with you down every road you roam.
And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.
And may you grow to be conservative, kind and true.
And do unto others as you'd have done to you.
Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.
And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores.

America Forever
America Forever

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=322bd1a3a12440d0840ef1617e1de2e1&_e=JO8VWQSClpV_F_3eFGpEDa-AsE3UBs-NCploDZKgpd7McqaZxrD-DbdsR0OYjr9qI32e2cPjVbTj4FnBu-h8XvuZvOlqP6AN9jbwqjB4MKPIPSw4vj-F-E71RA9H5xwH3y6Ql71MYy2Yl_k80HoozDu2eXu3WneoLeWzrahEiL8IhYBwyU-1K7OC_pdyQ-AU8eDFY6rZ8XLkA8EOGwH2SasC83gFMcrQPqH8O2LwAcbkDVM1yuspEJGkxdQIgTcXsfMOyzUVXY-0cOSU-7cAXoEe7BA4g2pA-XW44jJ-4_2tOXBO8Av1IchaSUyaPndSLMm3ZoL54T3z2H9fh_TrBA2lTZDg6MwKzddpSG2bJmtxNvBU3uNgvjMLaQtsZ9iQSLNF6mvHYiUhxpqW2QgWp3D-N0nCkiwOWKMlNoMrkLK9h15XBQjuglXOf3_aexEcaI10JOHq3OYi1HkFqDXXGimubaB1O0JGiUAdDgEJlv4%3D)

| | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
---

body:
What's the REAL State of the Union? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066205?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=700a94e314&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Last night, the **illegitimate senile puppet** who calls himself the President gave his first State of the Union speech.

**__The most disgusting thing about the charade was seeing REPUBLICANS give the Fake President a STANDING OVATION!__**

_What were those RINOs clapping for?_

Was it for our soaring hyperinflation?

Was it for the gas that now costs up to $5 a gallon?

Was it for the empty shelves at the market?

Was it for pushing Russia into the arms of China and creating a deadly alliance through the malicious mismanagement of our foreign policy?

Was it for the prospect of nuclear war?

Was it for skyrocketing crime in our absolutely Third World cities?

Was it for the one million Americans killed by drug overdoses in the last 20 years?

Was it for the controlled demolition of the Dollar and our economy?

Was it for the DESTRUCTION of our Southern Border and the aiding and abetting of an INVASION of millions of criminals into our country?

Was it for the deadly COVID injections or the other tyrannical COVID mandates?

**The REAL State of our Union is horrific.**

__We are losing our country, and the Republicans who are supposed to fighting the Left for us are instead CHEERING for Biden and Pelosi, COLLABORATING with the Enemy!__

They’re all clapping and patting each other on the back, laughing at the same sick joke.

_And we’re the punchline. You and me, We the People._

**It’s time for a new Republican Party.

A REAL Republican Party.**

**You won’t EVER see me clapping for Senile Brandon. You won’t EVER see me work with the Left. The days of compromise are OVER.**

**[_Send a FIGHTER like me to D.C._

_Punish these RINO Traitors by throwing them out on their rear ends so we can finally take the gloves off and DESTROY the Left._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=083239c0ed&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=b89865d916&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=b301ec4c3a&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=dbf8823df5&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

body:

| | I want to reach out to you personally to thank you for all of your support last month. Because of you, my team is able to continue fighting for bipartisan progress.

I also have some exciting news to share: this morning, the League of Conservation Voters announced their endorsement of my campaign!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42524359/333279633/1809150431?amount=20&refcode2=3cfaa1e5-259b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=JG_EM_FR_3MO_20220303_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2ZhYTFlNS0yNTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wX-miiGc4DysV6ez5cneJwDoiJCwY16n5UXD-7jUDFg=)
Last year, we passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill to prove that we’re taking action to combat climate change and keep our air and water clean, but our work isn’t over yet. I’m excited to continue working with the League of Conservation Voters to make sure that the future of our planet remains a top priority in Congress.

[I’m in a tough re-election campaign and I need your support. reaching out personally Hi Peter, Earlier this week, I had the opportunity to share **[an op-ed about my unwavering support for Israel](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=15b9054bacf649b2abbd229ccecbac05&_e=bTZ1NDUA_SPoT9jKJHILDc6yl3_k4t7IXuNRxYEcEtxEbq5eyTTRlBcTRv42R5cmXfTsu7jg4JCyJllHgUr0ka9S80hrBQltKtges6yT0yxDWJKSzAXAm1F7TjGlI_og5DtRUWoY6AogBE4Jizy4pU3ayjrxWKrlDsgVJf7XL6Gv-E85NfoBJ-2_wJFXjXhaqBmELT5L8BUd2hzvqxsluGppOK9VH2I37hTh0y7_A2iCvfor4lRCyN1mY3M0cX0MinalLvVRTPj4WoyzdnrvT-w1NCwlzGW3JvlzgGaOX0mUGFKd1RFC5ucg3F1SYFXxkiSuqwm8mE4Ba_jXPhKKl3LDlZaxbrRzwM-ZOj8B46y9k83wjRAd4V_nMQ6b6ZwAfBT4SlK3PoHd0csH84kyOhCgboxt2djVTSzEoNqnU0kN8UtNh_YGR6OANV-yfPJk)**. I have always strongly and unapologetically stood with Israel, and not just because it’s in America’s and Alabama’s best interests. I stand with Israel because _it’s the right thing to do_ , and as a Christian, I believe God commands it. And right now, it’s imperative that we stand up for our allies in Israel. [**Add Your Name to Stand with Israel**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=15b9054bacf649b2abbd229ccecbac05&_e=bTZ1NDUA_SPoT9jKJHILDf_vBO6ZJT9-1y5QKoDePcLOA7uBx9xgjlzYcioI3Ja3_hlXbskTZZHfziSzqiomF6cyrL9g4hGU8jb10sbSUzWUpWjarsb2T35TKj70FbbcZRwfoQp56Dtke-pBlZhclkRMpgbb3zr8Swt_aZ9MdGHzrA3_Q1XacoF63rkiuIvCFSz2Z9yEJs-CDvLptWflJNq9xt0oICqFebCzEU6wIpog5Fnm6FN5XxqCAl6LM08fRgcOjT0sbKmUhNw5vDvhmnZWfwTrgmfAwu0p_3cCGxyGM3VLXBUbCaNsKEiZVvXNea01kyYfbI8d7bOBp-2xauDXigugWhMBhdGUPW_-1xPo5HVAezjXgfaj7YkWB-bmnMuCUE59pb4QV4eDieBfHYibISnhp_4dsQnHOSaKuMoVzgOJ0WzszxAut7iX4mcT4FpZZFKfG99IkDhG3dvaGQ%3D%3D) Not only is Israel facing **deadly** danger from Iran, Hezbollah, Hamas, and Palestine — they’re facing opposition from the left-wing of the Democratic Party here at home. So though Israel is thousands of miles away from the safety and comfort of Alabama, [_**standing up for Israel NOW**_](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=15b9054bacf649b2abbd229ccecbac05&_e=bTZ1NDUA_SPoT9jKJHILDf_vBO6ZJT9-1y5QKoDePcLOA7uBx9xgjlzYcioI3Ja3_hlXbskTZZHfziSzqiomF6cyrL9g4hGU8jb10sbSUzWUpWjarsb2T35TKj70FbbcZRwfoQp56Dtke-pBlZhclkRMpgbb3zr8Swt_aZ9MdGHzrA3_Q1XacoF63rkiuIvCFSz2Z9yEJs-CDvLptWflJNq9xt0oICqFebCzEU6wIpog5Fnm6FN5XxqCAl6LM08fBoIeJOFNdbVAMjYE-cGcNfz-QDBlzDingRb3Z__vEVppN0-vTDtO2HXkE9PJaZ9aqpXUQaRIDTlbfWHR3tKILEvOWrRgqOl4q3CYQW4s67sx0Fhpe84JFEz0oCfgBj1Qz_XtRAe_lEwhbDOVWY2h6DwalQgnnE-WhIiVZOVZuZbghFgqNPNxZDBe21-2A4mYi5X9aecuYc5mJOhl9LMrHA%3D%3D) is imperative and will make a huge impact. **Will you join me as I stand for Israel as a beacon of freedom in the Middle East?** [**Add Your Name to Stand for Israel**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=15b9054bacf649b2abbd229ccecbac05&_e=bTZ1NDUA_SPoT9jKJHILDf_vBO6ZJT9-1y5QKoDePcLOA7uBx9xgjlzYcioI3Ja3_hlXbskTZZHfziSzqiomF6cyrL9g4hGU8jb10sbSUzWUpWjarsb2T35TKj70FbbcZRwfoQp56Dtke-pBlZhclkRMpgbb3zr8Swt_aZ9MdGHzrA3_Q1XacoF63rkiuIvCFSz2Z9yEJs-CDvLptWflJNq9xt0oICqFebCzEU6wIpog5Fnm6FN5XxqCAl6LM08fK2Hth8OXnzpu2jd7AsJ4JtaVB7v55AmSX5rj9GtmdBh2UxSLLKZUZ-DNhDw3D1rMoEFyagEUWovqfh4yxXJTyOleZT0urwLFaX-joRPU0tHRnJTtMBrPglWZ5NmMKuAp2lD2f4zVvuBU73E0IsY1euwbgRTVMLPm1xVwNdPonNE_CtXisGxqrOtE-hrj7gX0nMPafNgffi_tniRqh-qYsw%3D%3D) I hope I can count on seeing your name on this list! subject: Share your thoughts on child care affordability:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Deb wants to hear from you!

| | **[POLL FOR Peter:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42524719/333281371/1344326410?refcode=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIwMDg4My0yODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBJmJdLv3ekgVukWYS7ixsd9sXOzjBl-KO8oUW2SgMM=&emci=57200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)**

_Do you support Democratic plans to make child care more affordable and accessible for all families?_ | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42524720/333281386/1344326410?refcode=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIwMDg4My0yODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBJmJdLv3ekgVukWYS7ixsd9sXOzjBl-KO8oUW2SgMM=&emci=57200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)**** | ****[NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42524721/333281393/1344326410?refcode=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIwMDg4My0yODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBJmJdLv3ekgVukWYS7ixsd9sXOzjBl-KO8oUW2SgMM=&emci=57200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)****
---|---
Peter —

**America is in a child care crisis, one that has been exacerbated by two years in the pandemic.**

When schools closed and kids had to learn at home, women bore the brunt. Parents, mostly moms, juggled working remotely and facilitating online education for their kids. Those who weren’t lucky enough to be able to work at home had to choose between leaving their job and making sure their children were cared for. Deb, too, gave up working to stay at home with her children because they could not afford child care.

Even now that children are back to school and many of us are back to work in person, the cost of quality, reliable child care is often too high for families to bear. **Deb and Democrats in Congress know that making child care accessible _has_ to be a priority if our communities are going to thrive.

[Peter, Deb wants to hear from you: Do you support Democratic plans to subsidize child care programs for families who need it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42524722/333281398/1344326410?refcode=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ms=ea.64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDIwMDg4My0yODliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jBJmJdLv3ekgVukWYS7ixsd9sXOzjBl-KO8oUW2SgMM=&emci=57200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=64200883-289b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5944225)**

clean_body: Deb wants to hear from you! | | Do you support Democratic plans to make child care more affordable and accessible for all families? | ** | ---|--- Peter — America is in a child care crisis, one that has been exacerbated by two years in the pandemic. When schools closed and kids had to learn at home, women bore the brunt. Parents, mostly moms, juggled working remotely and facilitating online education for their kids. Those who weren’t lucky enough to be able to work at home had to choose between leaving their job and making sure their children were cared for. Deb, too, gave up working to stay at home with her children because they could not afford child care. Even now that children are back to school and many of us are back to work in person, the cost of quality, reliable child care is often too high for families to bear. Deb and Democrats in Congress know that making child care accessible has to be a priority if our communities are going to thrive. | ---|--- Thank you for giving your input, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. ---
Peter,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**" MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." **_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59727379:6037F4EvN:m:1:3253819041:4752C3ECDD9836E9185B759522A712BA:r)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59727379:6037F4EvN:m:1:3253819041:4752C3ECDD9836E9185B759522A712BA:r)**

Peter, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59727379:6037F4EvN:m:1:3253819041:4752C3ECDD9836E9185B759522A712BA:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59727379:6037F4EvN:m:1:3253819041:4752C3ECDD9836E9185B759522A712BA:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

name: Chris Vigliotti
subject: I'm endorsing Doug Gansler for Governor
body:
In an increasingly partisan and divisive world, Doug gets people and he understands what it takes to bring people together. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJno2T_CBchLz9HQahTTJ_zyVHbbjJHSdgb_7v6uC_aAOM30xDe1UVq547WdTzH27za6t7Dcj3CJf4ZuhpLvGgfKlCbjT7MaQTzO8EhRC9_mWxI9NmxqFdJKkoW62JwG5lMvIcpcP5UHSUHpGP1X3Ri6PNj6lKwBmYpjxAaFpSvnymrocDZhlGb4xReP2kEeEfOQH0uMpyamD7S7TCNVyXE19DNuP_BEsvw_wb_wifr62Dq-uuHDpiJOJb1Jg8o9-8/3k1/Od7hjdUvScC9fSEMMxn5CQ/h0/Jqpe4PaT1j6HJ9B_QY18WEQCnNfv8oh2v1bTlbnV488)
---
Hi friends, **I'm endorsing Doug Gansler for Governor because he gets that small towns have their own set of unique needs and issues.**
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJno2T_CBchLz9HQahTTJ_zyVHbbjJHSdgb_7v6uC_aAOM30xDe1UVq547WdTzH27wlboQg1hTFf2nR2sMRv0FPx0nt-Fone9BHyKmXwMB8_CaTpsuW9cZuMkExFgwpaMBtu9hGrL4mUFKj4-aKcOMaTozgOpRwm3DUGBZSh3dKYc4GmEQ2Yzz_8yetfVAFPMzb6iEjXvDNooGSfuxSV7Sfc-LtHwubVHZn36l8oma1qZqqSPDj7IIXoY7c_o71N9I/3k1/Od7hjdUvScC9fSEMMxn5CQ/h1/MMw_Sd5CN8jkUsEQd15e5X9x6UMA_Ur0s8B3cr9Hw0E)
---
_I endorsed the Gansler-Hollingsworth ticket and discussed Brunswick's natural resources and infrastructure with Doug on a recent Zoom call._
---
[ **WATCH & SHARE MY ENDORSEMENT ->**
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJno2T_CBchLz9HQahTTJ_zyVHbbjJHSdgb_7v6uC_aAOM30xDe1UVq547WdTzH27zMNfuXFmC7HP8IhQIk5oD9R-Lwn4wgNf0T5B5Fc-n4hoTqBmPU1bSNLMeaT3jbI5XCw48ylbydVpEraFyf3y-DhT9j-fcVHE8WAlP15UAnop04xGT_q4X72gyvoPqGzq-doY6V5HL7a37zC4cbSqT4zAQbGdnLE77U1b5w7UBm5E1ZNtyp7BxLdFogx3COsG8/3k1/Od7hjdUvScC9fSEMMxn5CQ/h2/qIHnL1w7998_PmMkPjn2XfJRCQnMRVRRRvByENTuz-4)
---
As a member of the Brunswick City Council, I like that Doug not only knows where Brunswick is on a map, he also has space for Brunswick in his heart. **In an increasingly partisan and divisive world, Doug gets people and he understands what it takes to bring people together.** I'm also proud to announce my fellow Brunswick Councilman, Andy St. John, is endorsing the Gansler-Hollingsworth campaign! **[Will you join us in supporting Doug by watching and sharing my endorsement video today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJno2T_CBchLz9HQahTTJ_zyVHbbjJHSdgb_7v6uC_aAOM30xDe1UVq547WdTzH27yDTLJ-XuB5cdEA9tTh-k98lTw_HZjD3YCL1ZfQguN7LUcMn5Mg0ZEvXYDjPBfiqfbuPxa1oacFtL4DQ8YY4Af6iiImyz_QR6svsPB4B2AkElIdNd5W6zEnQ5Q8gVCGT-mnvmDxMRsN75jciRxwzPBwAHsslRljtfNBW1QSDD3gY6q1E_p9dpdwnIoPBok5NlI/3k1/Od7hjdUvScC9fSEMMxn5CQ/h3/8fPnwiFuRPpMmmLe1Lma4TfFoZOR8-Vn_Em2HcyESto)**
---
Thank you, Chris Vigliotti _City Council Member_ _Brunswick, Maryland _

clean_body: In an increasingly partisan and divisive world, Doug gets people and he understands what it takes to bring people together. | | Hi friends, I'm endorsing Doug Gansler for Governor because he gets that small towns have their own set of unique needs and issues. | I endorsed the Gansler-Hollingsworth ticket and discussed Brunswick's natural resources and infrastructure with Doug on a recent Zoom call. As a member of the Brunswick City Council, I like that Doug not only knows where Brunswick is on a map, he also has space for Brunswick in his heart. In an increasingly partisan and divisive world, Doug gets people and he understands what it takes to bring people together. I'm also proud to announce my fellow Brunswick Councilman, Andy St. John, is endorsing the Gansler-Hollingsworth campaign! Thank you, Chris Vigliotti City Council Member Brunswick, Maryland By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

name: Tim Ryan
subject: [image attached]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2576%2E3611125%2E4gRW-L ][IMG]

Hey there—I just couldn’t resist sending around this photo of me
after stumbling upon it the other day.

I mean seriously ... have you ever seen a kid so happy? And just look at
those (missing) teeth!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8356?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2576%2E3611125%2E4gRW-L ]Young Tim Ryan smiling

I won’t lie, running for Senate is tough—like really tough. My GOP
opponents are spending MILLIONS of dollars trying to tear me down.

So sometimes, in between all the campaigning and the fundraising, I have
to take a moment for myself. And when I come across a photo like the one
above, I’m immediately reminded of why I’m in this fight in the first
place.

I’m running for Senate to represent the backbone of Ohio—the working
families like the one that raised me and future generations of Ohioans who
deserve a fair shake. Because right now, the rich are getting richer, and
everyday Ohioans are working harder, making less, and falling further
behind.

Mitch McConnell and my millionaire GOP opponents don’t give a damn about
working families. They’ve proven that time and time again. So I’m running
to represent every young, smiling kid growing up in Ohio who deserves an
equal chance at success.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/8356?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2576%2E3611125%2E4gRW-L ]So, if you’re ready to fight back against business-as-usual politics,
will you chip in
$25 to flip
Ohio blue? Winning this race is the ONLY way to ensure we expand our
Democratic Senate majority and finally deliver for hardworking Ohioans.

Thanks for your support,

Tim Ryan

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Biden has created TWO crises at the border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
| |
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d02941e926ce4a4fafee12d23da408ce&_e=iEkOI85l1JLjN3PD3GUo6LxTKdWCg5noPA2gM9IJ5UM0CZwI9T4vA-zX230102el08AuCm_GAAhv-Ww7knbxWG0J5r-Z58RbpASFigtWS9TJKOeGSfqYiGh0frOriBmRdMEnkGe9Ah7ndPHwd5rocYwNfq_8R1OK5x1C3XklpheKXXUwnjTgVkmgLuEa250-ntQdJ-8SMJqLj0c62JpbusfVXXfpe9AG1rIEDVeQN2u2FEfQXs5UCsfYWVFkq0ApTtPKEiJpVQEOhC-Rwqqmbi66aOFuhZw_RPL4XU12Zb_FBPWZPakcBtnj3gJuRjKQ4Uu0smnnPqcuw2kATbwH4pTpHxvuZBhvjY7uylDjEd9yKzcdLoutCOl4jiMWGUxjuh9e6NOuxUEMX7XHAEbQTA%3D%3D)
Peter,
Joe Biden's State of the Union address was chock full of duplicitous statements, and it's clear that Democrats and the mainstream media accepted it as fact. No statement was more egregiously false than Biden's claim about our southern border.

"Folks, if we are to advance liberty and justice, we need to secure our border and fix the immigration system. And as you might guess, I think we can do both..."

_**Biden made no mention of the fact that HE created the border crisis**_ through reckless and dangerous executive orders, and Kamala Harris failed to visit the border for _**MONTHS**_ after being tapped as "Border Czar." [_**Will you donate $15 today, and help me continue fighting Joe Biden's reckless border policies?**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d02941e926ce4a4fafee12d23da408ce&_e=iEkOI85l1JLjN3PD3GUo6LxTKdWCg5noPA2gM9IJ5UM0CZwI9T4vA-zX230102el08AuCm_GAAhv-Ww7knbxWG0J5r-Z58RbpASFigtWS9TJKOeGSfqYiGh0frOriBmRdMEnkGe9Ah7ndPHwd5rocYwNfq_8R1OK5x1C3XklpheKXXUwnjTgVkmgLuEa250-Pw5OaBCVSHQeuOlrH_C9-OShAvD04amaNMLjqdevFuppFmQqIASskIG9EXQ1RRQYO0U1y8hHW198iXTs937eCLY0SI_aJz-8QCDHSIj7dl8m3E6B-JyBUhGHUxUL6s8Bq-el7xr4yz9FUddBUO-th4i8Mfhsa3ENZTVWimAwb8gjlqpnyWovKMqd7-o9tH8bazt7fW135clr8ZA9NK6njg%3D%3D)

It's obvious to the American people that Biden has gravely bungled the border, but Biden's failure is even more clear to those who see it firsthand. When a reporter asked Border Patrol agents their reaction to Biden's State of the Union, they responded with answers like, "**Fu**ing pandering 101, full of sh*t** ,” “**I laughed** ,” and **“Lmao tbh didn’t even watch it. Figured it would be all lies and smoke. We’re losing so many agents. They’re fed up**.”

**_Because of Biden, there are now TWO CRISES_ at the southern border **— one, of the illegal immigrants flooding into our country, unverified and unchecked — and the other, a crisis of confidence among the brave men and women who are charged with keeping our borders secure. **[Donate today! Every dollar helps in the fight to retake the Senate — I don't have deep pocketed billionaires in my corner, I rely on hardworking patriots to fund my campaign. Will that be you?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d02941e926ce4a4fafee12d23da408ce&_e=iEkOI85l1JLjN3PD3GUo6LxTKdWCg5noPA2gM9IJ5UM0CZwI9T4vA-zX230102el08AuCm_GAAhv-Ww7knbxWG0J5r-Z58RbpASFigtWS9TJKOeGSfqYiGh0frOriBmRdMEnkGe9Ah7ndPHwd5rocYwNfq_8R1OK5x1C3XklpheKXXUwnjTgVkmgLuEa250-96FkYHpNtdqcjTAyAZ438r4t54KuzkQIPRkAZVwlmJbYc-V_Ct4muq2-JFj2yAqau8jyX1BFeaTom4J5vsq8LgqNA3oVEPU-AZ-1rqQB1kxe2OP1YBHp9fVp2VL6a5-DJ1pudxqn38Uu2F7-CWAwXB2EjjGHysz-DI5gY8k3qd8cF9jRYbE_6M1Wd6fndebD3obYpzJzwk1bsuxIMVvvdQ%3D%3D)**

This cannot be allowed to continue. We _**MUST**_ retake the Senate and start holding Biden and his administration _**ACCOUNTABLE**_** ** for the crises they have created.
**[> >DONATE ➲ $5<<](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d02941e926ce4a4fafee12d23da408ce&_e=iEkOI85l1JLjN3PD3GUo6LxTKdWCg5noPA2gM9IJ5UM0CZwI9T4vA-zX230102el08AuCm_GAAhv-Ww7knbxWDXSUZ6LwCtFrUuZSdamla5MfedAXXSW-RiALQ6rQJHsZrBmADeiUMcgfO98HpsuZCCFh4nDfPbxbiXqgbKGp1DTqiBui6MXr8Hkt-awosQHrVq2mViTzvQegJkm-lK4V4yl8C43WUundSOKZPNKl6OOMO8wYNntEbDKC-xpKwnqU35eov-V-FlIBblcqPfL1LUNY7fIrU55hBy-DxnXG9MDdd9N7YTdSKuH8tv2QdxR_WFD7_5JrVT0KfO30ebcPX9StI-0dsc5C6Q5cEz57qiMlZICPgUvxUJF1rY8Jg3AYBe6N41Rd9IZxshYSGkMhDXS-ScN7NMJ_fZLzrmsnsU%3D)**

clean_body: | | Peter, Joe Biden's State of the Union address was chock full of duplicitous statements, and it's clear that Democrats and the mainstream media accepted it as fact. No statement was more egregiously false than Biden's claim about our southern border. "Folks, if we are to advance liberty and justice, we need to secure our border and fix the immigration system. And as you might guess, I think we can do both..." Biden made no mention of the fact that HE created the border crisis through reckless and dangerous executive orders, and Kamala Harris failed to visit the border for MONTHS after being tapped as "Border Czar." It's obvious to the American people that Biden has gravely bungled the border, but Biden's failure is even more clear to those who see it firsthand. When a reporter asked Border Patrol agents their reaction to Biden's State of the Union, they responded with answers like, "Fuing pandering 101, full of sht ,” “I laughed ,” and “Lmao tbh didn’t even watch it. Figured it would be all lies and smoke. We’re losing so many agents. They’re fed up.” Because of Biden, there are now TWO CRISES at the southern border — one, of the illegal immigrants flooding into our country, unverified and unchecked — and the other, a crisis of confidence among the brave men and women who are charged with keeping our borders secure. This cannot be allowed to continue. We MUST retake the Senate and start holding Biden and his administration ACCOUNTABLE for the crises they have created. God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

There was a moment during Joe Biden’s first State of the Union that you may have missed:
#
Derek —
There was a moment during Joe Biden’s first State of the Union that you may have missed:
Joe Biden began to honor dead service members, including his own son Beau who died because of cancer that may very likely be attributed to burn pits he was about to address, and Lauren Boebert thought that was a good time to shout and scream “you put them there.”
Now, no one should have any expectations of Lauren Boebert.
But the response from the rest of the House GOP, including leadership?
Silence.
Well, we can’t be silent. We have to make sure they don’t get control of the House in 2022. We simply must. There’s too much at stake for veterans, military families, and all of us. So please:

# **De Gregorio to Gottheimer: ****Sell Your
Russian Assets & Stop the Day Trading**
---
| _Renews Calls for All CD5 Candidates to
Sign Stock Ban Transparency Pledge_
---
| **FAIR LAWN –** Today, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran who served in both Iraq and Afghanistan, and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, called on incumbent Democrat Josh Gottheimer to sell stock he is [reported](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=632c73d7c6&e=31104c58a7) to own in Russian companies:

“At a time when our democratic allies in Ukraine are being hunted and slaughtered by the Russian army, Josh is personally invested in the oligarchic lifeline that allows Vladimir Putin to engage in this unchecked and unprovoked aggression against a free people. He needs to sell these assets immediately,” said De Gregorio.

He continued, “This is yet another example of why Members of Congress owning stocks is a problem. Conflicts of interest arise constantly, and the public only finds out after the deed is done. These lax restrictions have allowed Josh Gottheimer to become one of the most [prolific day traders](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=6125e50efd&e=31104c58a7) in Congress. The real question is, why are my Republican colleagues, Frank Pallotta and Fred Schneiderman, on the side of Josh Gottheimer and against my [Stock Ban Transparency Pledge](https://nickfornj.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d957ded20397fa5245442e969&id=5d9b0ba2c8&e=31104c58a7) that would restore the public’s trust in our elected representatives?”

But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration.
