subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Veteran Candidate Coalition Endorses Col. Swan for Congress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Veteran Candidate Coalition, founded by Lieutenant Colonel Stu Scheller, Announces Support for Col. Mitchell Swan in the GA-10 Congressional Race **
March 3, 2022

**CONTACT**
Brandon Wear
Press@ColonelSwanForCongress.com
Good Hope, GA – Today, Col. Mitchell Swan (Ret.) is proud to announce that the Veteran Candidate Coalition, formed by Lt. Col. Stu Scheller in the wake of the egregious handling of our Afghanistan withdrawal, is supporting his campaign for Congress in the 10th District of Georgia. The coalition features conservative U.S. Military veterans running for office who believe that their service doesn’t end after their military career. Cam Murphy, spokesman for the Veteran Candidate Coalition, included this statement with the announcement: “America needs leaders not politicians. The Coalition supports Veterans that have invested in the freedom Americans enjoy. For too long, the political class has been receiving the benefits of our investments while sacrificing nothing themselves and taking the American people for granted. We believe Mitch Swan has the integrity, leadership, and humility required to properly fight for We The People. If elected, we believe Georgia’s 10th Congressional District will be well represented. Mitch has our support and prayers.” Mitchell Swan is a 30-year veteran of the United States Marine Corps and Marine Corps Reserve. Retiring as a full-bird Colonel after 30 years of service, Col. Swan has led Marines overseas, helped direct operations in the Pacific, and shaped United States policy in the Middle East.
###

clean_body: | | | | | | | Veteran Candidate Coalition, founded by Lieutenant Colonel Stu Scheller, Announces Support for Col. Mitchell Swan in the GA-10 Congressional Race March 3, 2022 CONTACT Brandon Wear Press@ColonelSwanForCongress.com Good Hope, GA – Today, Col. Mitchell Swan (Ret.) is proud to announce that the Veteran Candidate Coalition, formed by Lt. Col. Stu Scheller in the wake of the egregious handling of our Afghanistan withdrawal, is supporting his campaign for Congress in the 10th District of Georgia. The coalition features conservative U.S. Military veterans running for office who believe that their service doesn’t end after their military career. Cam Murphy, spokesman for the Veteran Candidate Coalition, included this statement with the announcement: “America needs leaders not politicians. The Coalition supports Veterans that have invested in the freedom Americans enjoy. For too long, the political class has been receiving the benefits of our investments while sacrificing nothing themselves and taking the American people for granted. We believe Mitch Swan has the integrity, leadership, and humility required to properly fight for We The People. If elected, we believe Georgia’s 10th Congressional District will be well represented. Mitch has our support and prayers.” Mitchell Swan is a 30-year veteran of the United States Marine Corps and Marine Corps Reserve. Retiring as a full-bird Colonel after 30 years of service, Col. Swan has led Marines overseas, helped direct operations in the Pacific, and shaped United States policy in the Middle East. | | "DONATE" | | Want to know more? Visit our website or any of our social media channels linked below to learn more about Col. Swan for GA-10. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Colonel Swan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Thank you for standing with me as I fight hard for our great nation. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/dd95953f4b26820f/53812d028a03bef2c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
Peter, I’m so grateful to each and every person who puts their time, energy, and resources into my campaign. I work hard to represent Oklahomans, our values, and our way of life on Capitol Hill, but I couldn’t do it without your support. Whether you’ve donated your time, hard-earned dollars, or have opted to stay informed by receiving email updates, you are a vital part of our team. With current global circumstances, it has never been clearer that we need strong leadership at home. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to fight Biden’s agenda of weakness, and make America strong and prosperous again. I thank you kindly for your support, and I hope that you’ll continue to stand with me as I keep fighting for the heart and soul of our great nation. Sincerely,
Kevin Hern [**_P.S. You can help keep our grassroots momentum going strong by becoming one of our first March donors. Please chip in now to make a difference._**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/dd95953f4b26820f/8b017e8bc7f7f5a2c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Chris Evans, Beto for Texas
subject: We need more views on our ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Yesterday, we kicked off our general election race against Greg Abbott by
launching a new "People of Texas Campaign" and releasing a brand new ad.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53642?refcode=ema20220303-178769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=178769%2E444211%2E-ULgJO ]Take a minute to watch our new ad and then chip in $3 to
help us get it in front of as many Texas voters as possible »

A donation of $3 may seem small compared to the $50 million
that Greg Abbott has in the bank, but here's the thing: when we combine
our $5, $10, and
$15
grassroots donations together, we have the power to go toe-to-toe with
Abbott's mega-donors. That's the power of people!

It's
officially Beto vs. Abbott, so I hope we can count on your help to start
the general election off strong and ensure that Texans across the state
see our new ad. Thanks for helping us get our message out!

Let's do this,

Chris Evans
Communications Director, Beto for Texas

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: BetoORourke.com
Date: Wednesday, March 2, 2022
Subject: Will you help make sure that Texans see this?

It’s
official:

After yesterday’s primary night victory, Beto will be facing off against
Greg Abbott in November.

So to mark the start of the general election, we just launched a brand-new
ad as Beto kicks off his statewide “People of Texas Campaign.” Beto will
be back on the road connecting with thousands of Texans across the state
to bring people together around his positive, popular, and unifying vision
for Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53642?refcode=ema20220303-178769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=178769%2E444211%2E-ULgJO ]Will you watch our brand new ad and then chip in $3 to
help make sure that we’re able to get it in front of as many Texans as
possible this week?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53642?refcode=ema20220303-178769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=178769%2E444211%2E-ULgJO ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53642?refcode=ema20220303-178769&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=178769%2E444211%2E-ULgJO ]Contribute $3

Beto is committed to fighting for every vote, connecting with as many
Texans as possible, and championing the big things that we want to
accomplish together.

While Abbott tries to divide and distract us, we are focused on uniting
Texans around a shared vision for great jobs, world-class schools,
affordable health care, and a future where everyone in this state can live
to their full potential.

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Jessica Cisneros
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I want to tell you about our work with Jessica Cisneros. We’ve been with
Jessica since 2019 and we’ll be with her every step of the way towards her
May 24th runoff election against anti-choice corporate Democrat Henry
Cuellar.

In early 2019, Justice Democrats announced our intention to primary
Cuellar because of his conservative voting record on immigration, climate
change, reproductive rights, unions, and much more. We hired organizers
and put a full page ad in the Laredo Morning Times in order to find the
right candidate. Then, we found Jessica.

We helped Jessica build and launch her very first campaign for Congress in
2019. This is Jessica holding her hometown newspaper after launching in
2019:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97038?refcode=em20220303-22250&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f ]Jessica Cisneros smiling holding the Laredo Morning Times with a
frontpage story about her campaign launch in 2019

Jessica was our first endorsed candidate after we helped Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez win her groundbreaking primary against the Democratic
establishment. Jessica is an immigration attorney and community advocate
running unapologetically on Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, canceling
student debt, and protecting abortion rights. She is the kind of leader we
need, unlike the corporate-backed, scandal-ridden, conservative Cuellar.

Justice Democrats made calls to voters, sent texts, organized our
neighbors, and more for Jessica. We’ve raised more than $115,000 for
Jessica this election cycle from thousands of grassroots donors. And now
we have to build it all up again for the runoff.

I have to say, this isn’t going to be easy. The odds were stacked against
us in this primary, going up against a 17-year incumbent with backing from
Wall Street, Big Oil, Republican mega-donors, and corporate PACs. Now, we
have to restart Jessica’s fundraising all over again. It’s going to take a
huge boost from our supporters to power Jessica to victory.

I know we can do this because there’s a movement behind Jessica. AOC,
Bernie, Elizabeth Warren, Working Families Party, Sunrise Movement, and
the list goes on of allies that are with us and Jessica through this
fight. Here’s Jessica speaking at a get out the vote rally just a few
weeks ago with AOC, Greg Casar, and the people of South Texas:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97038?refcode=em20220303-22250&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f ]Jessica speaking on stage at a GOTV rally a few weeks ago

Peter, this is
going to be a tough runoff, but we’re used to tough fights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97038?refcode=em20220303-22250&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f ]Can you split a $3 contribution to Jessica’s campaign
and Justice Democrats today to fuel Jessica’s primary against an
anti-choice corporate-backed incumbent?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97038?refcode=em20220303-22250&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f ]Contribute

We can only win this race with your support. I’m grateful that you’re with
us in this fight.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1005&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1006&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220303-22250-footer&t=1007&refcode2=22250_1203867_34-u4f&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1008&akid=22250%2E1203867%2E34-u4f

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | | | Have you heard the news? The farmworker overtime bill Andrea championed has passed the Oregon House and Senate – and it's headed to the Governor. was the lead sponsor on this bill. In the very near future, farmworkers in Oregon will receive overtime pay when they work more than 40 hours in a week. That's the kind of leader Andrea is. She works hard and stands up for our most vulnerable. Andwith Andrea, real change happens — even in the hardest fights, facing the toughest opposition. name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Did you hear about my Republican opponent?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, did you see my last email?

**Earlier this week, New York Republicans selected someone to run against me for attorney general – and he’s determined to win. **

New Yorkers deserve an attorney general who will fight to hold the powerful and wealthy accountable, even in the face of seemingly insurmountable odds. They deserve an attorney general who will painstakingly root out corruption, not someone who will turn a blind eye toward it. But, Peter, I can’t win re-election without your help.

**I only need to raise $390 to reach my goal of $20,000. Please, will you rush $20 or more before midnight to help me defend New York and defeat my new Republican opponent?**

**Here’s the best link to give: **[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny-22**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527036/333294721/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEzMTc2MS0zMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkmZigvP0_5NIa7im1Au6KTch972JOVLicJdoj3d8EU=)

Thank you for helping me tackle this challenge.

Letitia

**Peter, the GOP is desperate to remove me from office, which is why they officially nominated a Republican to run against me.**
It makes sense why. For generations, the powerful, wealthy, and corrupt got away with whatever they desired in New York. Housing and prescription drug prices skyrocketed, Wall Street misconduct flourished, and corrupt elected officials reaped the rewards.
And then I came along. I vowed to never let myself be bought or intimidated by the powerful forces that ruled New York. I vowed to root out corruption and hold every person involved accountable. Now, Republicans are nervous.

**Peter, New York Republicans’ pick for attorney general is going to do everything he can to defeat me. That’s why I need to raise at least $20,000 before midnight on Thursday to ensure that my campaign has better resources than my GOP opponent.**
[**I refuse to let New York fall into a Republican’s hands. Will you rush in $5 or whatever you can spare to help me defend New York and DEFEAT my new opponent?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527038/333294723/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEzMTc2MS0zMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkmZigvP0_5NIa7im1Au6KTch972JOVLicJdoj3d8EU=)
My opponent is attempting to fearmonger his way into the attorney general’s office. He thinks that he can throw words like “death” and “destruction” around to scare New Yorkers into voting for him, but he seems to have forgotten one crucial thing.

I vow that I will do _everything_ in my power to keep serving as this great state’s attorney general – but elections aren’t won by just one person. [**So please, will you rush $5 or more right now to help keep my campaign for attorney general better funded and better staffed than my GOP opponent’s?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42527039/333294724/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk390-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTEzMTc2MS0zMTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkmZigvP0_5NIa7im1Au6KTch972JOVLicJdoj3d8EU=)

In his first State of the Union address to the nation, he highlighted the bold progress that we've made so far for the American people – including the American Rescue Plan, historic investments in infrastructure, millions of new jobs, and more.
But he also outlined the crucial progress we have yet to make – **progress that Mitch McConnell says he's 100% focused on obstructing**. name: Adam Schiff
subject: We must protect our majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
The GOP is trying to take away our House majority by targeting Marcy Kaptur, and we can’t let them! |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBhA2GhhBCMlcFrCXvHpJ2nx2S_vc_SotbMUhetEWZV56ZHasfGX7E9_r7pMDPrQ9Hjmr57BHMzb9x7EYy1phWKtX6GFZPXQSYQIWWFETon9ADsrCgMD04PuMbY7yEcEfJX5Opp-QFsYf9t-5scrNjlIsb_d1yGqr6YjjqX_zD4aIIqdiQi6SKPnit4jjkJ6Nw1ZMQPlA61XhvmQF5xI2GH1IM57d5fZ2gjX8UCm711vj-5PT8LqXVriAHdI1QoFanWOXaYZs39Ar8ai0Moj-QYDAJvZghdjfsis7r1GzSy9aAJM-ASGz5RP7PrnjXJLBNVm2niODNVfcGx4jI4JMDzNxyeSmlj7ouzEWN97G76Mp/3k1/sAIFHECfQueabSQJdFSgXA/h0/A9uBzWaDnI_agGN-yBqocSTJ_-LFb1pVem1yWo4z4Mw)

| | Team,

I am no stranger to Republican attacks. After I led the first impeachment trial, they came after me. They are ruthless and unapologetic. But now they are turning their attention to my friend Marcy Kaptur.

**Why? Because they need her seat to retake the House and will do everything they can to defeat her.** We can’t let them succeed. We need Marcy’s progressive champion voice in Congress.

**[My friend Marcy has earned her seniority as the _longest-serving woman in Congress_. The GOP wants to take that away. We can’t allow the likes of Kevin McCarthy and Jim Jordan to succeed and take control. So I hope you’ll join me in my fight to protect Marcy’s seat in Congress by making a donation today: ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBhA2GhhBCMlcFrCXvHpJ2nx2S_vc_SotbMUhetEWZV56_UresjffgcTqfcskOrZxd-v6yFIUHn5Zrg4z8NfjYCIj82ZmgIjHMa4b--dVJuYwcIFuK0B2-zfepqET5zc7MYhwJJLqpHfGlXiP8K3b7mPLNG2fyza_CLyVK9Suvlizy5e33piegeo-Q1gVL5QA5olnZQisfHD3zzukHNz0ZDStMUcjrJj7ieQfr8ysajXMFUtIj_2w5yCt54JEdUSu2hH0Old8Ds3mXpWI0w9df7zwvVjLTt3sYL6ND0sl1MStjFlG-yXnxDzDByZBnMRDrfV1txIuqke7qDI0sy3Icvh5gMyg45vHQkZUl7JMuKptXrAL1n9cf6GLgBbdiIFL2A/3k1/sAIFHECfQueabSQJdFSgXA/h1/B6SvP2FoxMlte9SI-4muA0BK2oKePH_9fEz_DPTbv1Q)** **[](https?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-lets-stay-together-4&email_referrer=email_1464034___subject_1920663&email_subject=we-must-protect-our-majority)** | [**Donate $25 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrPlz6FFtVqmSIaDtydOaNTCdmXmRcR4GWEhfS1ujSBhA2GhhBCMlcFrCXvHpJ2nx2S_vc_SotbMUhetEWZV561xQ0jVbBuhKQKngn6nIAlGWy430gS2CdCGjw5fUUiY51Xx11RtWkZymmMeqVmjC5FORQl2HNCU4svxC8MyLuNwckojbn1y2d4GI8aj8nfa63P0J4sOMfYyMmu21fPcyn7HuWZrzXU8VgOWx_s4CtBUR7B0yjiap2PHaysMoRO2Oa_w3swu5RiOsgUc1FEjgXYbW_q9nrXAnG1-Fp4P3WFnh0cwtjPBWiluAnEJMvRRwZvNBe3kNZ_feKrLvfkwK4syFqRtmZ_ugqiovvEpv8zCrAJOl5XGiXGR3Vjy94g-15ivzOZJ4wyA4Gz2MyKYvZgs2qdDLrUTHI_O-7hrV0Vw/3k1/sAIFHECfQueabSQJdFSgXA/h2/QKLawxhLZcAAACCMZGbiea1bLgA5OPFSOrPXnYU08Zw)

The people of Northern Ohio rely on Marcy’s steadfast leadership. She has truly been a tireless advocate for her district’s **seniors, veterans, and the working class.**

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: Edith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
Happy Women’s History Month!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528163/333299436/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220303Edith_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqJ8Qkd-wKhD8RioDdYAWfqhutcbgqPxhF1AipXaFCY=)
Everyone talks about Ellen Wilson – Woodrow Wilson’s wife – and she was indeed an incredible woman, but my favorite woman to uplift during Women’s History Month is Edith Wilson, his second wife.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528167/333299444/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220303Edith_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqJ8Qkd-wKhD8RioDdYAWfqhutcbgqPxhF1AipXaFCY=)
Following President Wilson’s stroke, some historians speculate that she was the acting President of the United States for 17 months. I like a woman who knows how to get things done.
[**So, this Women’s History Month, as we remember those who fought the battles that brought us to where we are today, I want to take a moment for gratitude. I’m incredibly grateful to be a woman who holds office. I don’t take that for granted. It’s an honor to continue fighting for voting rights right here in New Mexico. Will you chip in $10 right now to help move our state forward in this critical election year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528172/333299458/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220303Edith_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqJ8Qkd-wKhD8RioDdYAWfqhutcbgqPxhF1AipXaFCY=)
[Donate!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528175/333299470/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220303Edith_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqJ8Qkd-wKhD8RioDdYAWfqhutcbgqPxhF1AipXaFCY=)
With gratitude,

Maggie Toulouse Oliver
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528178/333299479/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220303Edith_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_G2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqJ8Qkd-wKhD8RioDdYAWfqhutcbgqPxhF1AipXaFCY=)
_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528181/333299490/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220303Edith_H_MTO_90DO_3_G_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjk2YTBkZi0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BqJ8Qkd-wKhD8RioDdYAWfqhutcbgqPxhF1AipXaFCY=)**_

name: Annie Andrews
subject: thank you for helping us make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| This week marks the start of Women’s History Month! With that, I wanted to share my thanks to my supporters like you for standing with me.

Because of your dedication, we’re _making_ women’s history – **for the first time ever, three women pediatricians (including myself) could be elected to Congress this November.**

After seeing how representatives like Nancy Mace ignored and disrespected health officials while innocent families were suffering, it’s clear: achieving this milestone will make an incredible difference for our communities.

With your help, I know we’ll be able to do it and bring caring, thoughtful leadership for our kids.

Thank you so much for everything you’ve done for my campaign,

Dr. Annie

_P.S. If you haven’t given or want to double-down on your support, March kicks off our critical FEC filing push,_[so please click here to give us a head start.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42528180/333299492/69339144?amount=10&refcode=AA_EM_FR_3MO_20220303_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=2LkIQOyC3x0uO4G9wlV9NllMLAxDj7vk6ZyuUk/syUM+WjyUsoMhOJwHtokCJEz7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY0ZGNmOS0zNDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JrH3ucdll4y09k4-9h0MnJsjmy2jQ0X688jyO6Defn8=)

Because of your dedication, we’re making women’s history – for the first time ever, three women pediatricians (including myself) could be elected to Congress this November. After seeing how representatives like Nancy Mace ignored and disrespected health officials while innocent families were suffering, it’s clear: achieving this milestone will make an incredible difference for our communities. With your help, I know we’ll be able to do it and bring caring, thoughtful leadership for our kids. Thank you so much for everything you’ve done for my campaign, Dr. Annie P.S. name: Erica Smith
subject: Exciting news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

We’re off to the races! I
officially filed to run for Congress in North Carolina’s First District!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/42568?t=1001&akid=955%2E3698%2E_7fY9Z ][IMG]

But I’m not the only one filing my paperwork: I already have anti-choice
and far-right insurrectionist opponents I’m up against.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/42568?t=1002&akid=955%2E3698%2E_7fY9Z ]We can win this wide-open, swing seat — but I can’t do it without your
support. Will you donate $5 or anything you can to send a
loud and clear message about the strength of our campaign?

I’m not your typical candidate for Congress. I’m a dirt-road Democrat and
I was born and raised on my family’s farm. I grew up with my five siblings
picking cucumbers and corn and waking up before the sun was up to do
chores around the farm.

I’m an engineer, a minister, and an educator. Years ago I moved back to my
parent's home in Northampton County to take care of my ailing father. I
had to drop out of school because the internet was so bad.

I almost died while I was giving birth to my son. After he was born
prematurely, I had to scramble to pay for his critical breathing equipment
and medical specialists he literally could not live without because our
insurance wouldn’t cover the costs.

Through it all this community has been there for me and I’m fed up with
seeing corporate monopolies hollow out our towns, our roads go unpaved,
and wages stagnate. I’m tired of politicians who aren’t from our community
and don’t understand the stakes of policymaking in D.C.

I’m running for U.S. House in NC-01 to fight for my community and return
power to the people of eastern North Carolina.

Your support is critical to this effort, that’s why I’m asking: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/42568?t=1003&akid=955%2E3698%2E_7fY9Z ]Will
you donate $5, or anything you can, to ensure we aren’t
outspent by our corporate-backed opponents? Even just $5 today makes a
difference as we prepare for a heated primary race.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/42574?refcode=em20220303-955&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=955%2E3698%2E_7fY9Z ]Donate $5

I’ve represented more than half of the counties in NC-01 in the state
senate, and I’ve never lost an election here. I’m the only Democrat in
this race who has the grit, experience, and track record it’ll take to
protect this seat.

So let’s do this!

Onwards,

Erica ❤️

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220303-955-footer&t=1023&refcode2=955_3698__7fY9Z&akid=955%2E3698%2E_7fY9Z

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=955%2E3698%2E_7fY9Z

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

subject: Did you see Pramila’s reactions to President Biden’s speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila spoke to the power of President Biden’s address and how he channeled the energy of the working people of this country.
#
Peter, we’re hoping you caught Pramila on NBC News after President Biden’s State of the Union speech Tuesday night.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10863?refcode=em20220303-1074&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1074%2E420207%2EazHXvz)
Pramila spoke to the power of President Biden’s address and how he channeled the energy of the working people of this country. His speech and Pramila’s reactions show how much Democrats have accomplished after Pres. Biden’s first year and how much potential we have to get more done for the people.
[**If you’re with Pramila and Pres. Biden, can you chip in $3 or any amount to our campaign today to help us deliver for working people, families, and our communities? We need the resources to power critical organizing for our progressive agenda, protect our Democratic majority, and elect more strong progressives to Congress this year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10863?refcode=em20220303-1074&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1074%2E420207%2EazHXvz)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10863?refcode=em20220303-1074&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1074%2E420207%2EazHXvz)**
President Biden spoke to the kitchen table issues of everyday folks. He advocated for legislation to cut the costs of prescription drugs, while prices continue to skyrocket. He addressed the cost burdens of childcare on middle class families, and how we need to reduce those costs.
He called out corporations who were seeking to make profits off the pandemic, and he spoke to the importance of antitrust enforcement, so we don’t allow corporate monopolies to control our economy. He reiterated our call to make the wealthiest pay their fair share in taxes.
The President knows what we can accomplish if we take action. He has significant power to effect immediate, meaningful change for people across America, and he should use it aggressively. Through executive authority, he can bring down the costs of prescription drugs, decrease carbon emissions to fight the climate crisis, cancel student debt, protect workers' rights, raise wages, provide immigration relief, and rebuild our refugee system.
**Pramila knows that if we remain committed to taking action and providing relief our communities need, lowering costs, and making life easier for working people — _we can deliver._**
[**If you're still with Pramila and our movement in this fight, contribute $3 or any amount to our campaign today. We've come too far to let up now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10863?refcode=em20220303-1074&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1074%2E420207%2EazHXvz)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10863?refcode=em20220303-1074&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1074%2E420207%2EazHXvz)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220303-1074-footer&t=24&refcode2=1074_420207_azHXvz&akid=1074%2E420207%2EazHXvz)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: What's next for us in Texas? Read on to find out →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
Help us build the momentum on the ground — from Texas to Arizona — to oust politicians like Henry Cuellar and Kyrsten Sinema. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q8N8HQVdVYgja3bqzWMQJ9gXg-d1W-UxdpQdoxqWJV84gtRfPOZSek0tIjuoV2K2hMwKXmXy_0kNfow00aZdi4Ec4zpBOQwAPd2611iUtO6B6jp0sB6PI3AvkfNhd5yNfd_b30Lsbeb0QVTl8gTOs3zNpXssGE4yV1L8QrmUIwrMV1YteqtMDaMXkO5prS-LHut3R70H2lREBkRL87TE9DBIL3g_yhUF0JoH6npIarOug5TKuXDbXa4JUYal55u9MA8uQewYWAZE9msU--urTwj/3k1/MHePLzJXRx6XIYIorrWw9g/h0/Mn50XTKgA3G2X__W7pcp3AUbuHK6YOqs7Y0ryIVMxFg)
Peter, we have some bad news and good news to share with you from Texas. **We'll start with the bad news:** NBC's Decision Desk officially declared last night that Rep. Henry Cuellar — the Kyrsten Sinema of the House — finished with the most votes in the TX-28 Democratic primary. **But here's the good news:** despite being the incumbent, Cuellar's vote count fell short of 50% — and the difference between his votes and Jessica Cisneros’ votes were less than 1,000. **He will now face a runoff with Jessica Cisneros in May.** **[Will you please split a donation right now between Jessica Cisneros and Primary Sinema Project? name: Team Tobias
subject: Governor Barbara Roberts stands with Tobias
body:
Governor Roberts was the first female Governor of Oregon, and we’re proud to stand with her for a better future for our state.
---
| | Dear Peter, Exciting news for the campaign today: former **Governor Barbara Roberts is endorsing Tobias for Governor!** Governor Roberts was the first female Governor of Oregon, and we’re proud to stand with her for a better future for our state. Don’t just take it from us. Here’s what Governor Roberts has to say: “Oregon needs a Governor with a statewide record of tackling tough issues, delivering results, and fighting for Oregonians living in every corner of this great state. Tobias has shown he can bring people together, and he will continue his work to build economic opportunity and a better future for all. That’s why I’m supporting Tobias. Oregon needs his proven and steady leadership.” Governor Roberts has spent her life committed to serving the people of Oregon. She’s been a fierce advocate for children with disabilities, standing up for LGBTQ rights, and she’s paved the way for a generation of Oregon women to lead our state at all levels of government. She’s on team Tobias. [**Will you join her by making a $25 contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42537037/333359382/1542981758?refcode=em030322&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODFjOWU0Yi02MTliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2pDcgP9mW9OaUG78LYaGCcEqqMo0kWybjjQFRrCfeJI=) Thank you, Team Tobias

I cannot believe what I'm seeing.

First, Trump threatened to run for President if Republicans retake the House.

Now, his House Republicans have $82 MILLION in their war chest to unload during the midterms.

**[I will stop this one-term President and his Republicans from taking back the House -- no matter what it takes. Here's my plan: I'm calling for 820 Democratic Member gifts before my End of Week deadline to make Trump's plot completely BACKFIRE. If you could rush a gift before my deadline expires, it'd help my Democrats HOLD our House Majority and hand Trump and his Republicans the most EMBARRASSING rebuke yet. Can I count on your $3 to defeat House Republicans? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)** | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)
2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBERSHIP STATUS: **PENDING**
[Suggested Support: $3](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Hear me:

Trump has hinged his entire run for President on my Democrats losing the House.

subject: This is the most extreme voter suppression tactic the AZ GOP has tried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | From Trump’s big lie to this | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3LNGdjjp_6L5R-butU81DC_GBshmIF8mx9OFUrjz3asOS_WZoiwP7JvVA8cOzIbeGxinqudHt6KyxKbBCrUQ9-RGOd2hDdHE7ghYYhQhF5J5wGGApIJnOG8MVvI-4gS5y7cRTqHadjuyRXSspdfkimElIDJPIBOAq_zRqSXLf7Q/3k1/my8N1pKbQYGlxKfCW2tGug/h0/1Iq8tMkXzyYPYlYPCNdNQ0b5ELBwuy6ad8yEI7S_9zU)

| Team, the AZ GOP recently filed a lawsuit with the Arizona Supreme Court to **_end all early voting and voting by mail in our state, including PEVL!_**

Since November 2020, the AZ GOP has tried every voter suppression tactic in the book. But after their fake audit failed, they are now desperately trying to end all early voting and all vote by mail on a legal technicality.

This is an insane voter suppression tactic that will undo three decades' worth of voting by mail and early voting here in Arizona. We have to push back!

**[Team, we need to mobilize opposition to this lawsuit and push back on the AZ GOP’s extreme voter suppression! Can you make a $10 donation right now to our Voting Rights Fund so we can help fight back against this extreme lawsuit?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z3LNGdjjp_6L5R-butU81DC_GBshmIF8mx9OFUrjz3asOS_WZoiwP7JvVA8cOzIbeGxinqudHt6KyxKbBCrUQ9-RGOd2hDdHE7ghYYhQhF5H2Fccym-1nA6NURDezZ5EfXys9w2GKCl2FtNGxjPGhi/3k1/my8N1pKbQYGlxKfCW2tGug/h1/XVT_TwM-OdeDTAnIdBlChCOdnCejWTegRJh4uRVhzVE)** [

Since November 2020, the AZ GOP has taken more and more extreme measures to reduce voting rights. It started with their fake audit and initial voter suppression legislation.

Now, they are suing so that all voting happens on election day only – **which would disenfranchise millions of voters in Arizona!**

Voting early and by mail is extremely popular in Arizona and has been successful for three decades. But now that Trump lost, the AZ GOP is going to extreme measures to try to take away our voting rights.

_We have to fight back now – and flip Arizona completely blue in November – to stop this assault._

When I announced this campaign, I made a promise that I would always be fully transparent with voters and supporters.

So here's the truth:

**Central Valley voters _know_ that McCarthy has been horrible, but our biggest obstacle is that many don't know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. **

**The good news is that we recently earned 100% of the vote from local Democratic delegates to be pre-endorsed by the California Democratic Party. This is a huge momentum boost, and it's a clear sign that Democrats are consolidating behind my campaign.**

We are coming up $13,141 short of where we need to be to stay on track for our weekly fundraising goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $10 right now, we'd meet our goal _instantly_. I know we can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team:

**[Can you chip in $3 before 11:59 PM tonight to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42537425/333360497/-217444029?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmI5MTFlYS02MzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVcsdcyLRPDf8u7c-z0F9gK-3Cln3v4v4B9Od_OLBmY=)**

McCarthy repulses voters here in CA-20. He's defined by how much groveling he does to Trump and how he refuses to hold the furthest-right wing of his party accountable. But to win this race, we have to talk about what WE are offering. We have to talk about real issues that matter to the Central Valley and find solutions.

That's exactly what we're doing, and it’s why we need your help.

**[Chip in $3 to help us reach more undecided voters>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42537426/333360498/-217444029?refcode=em-3.3.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmI5MTFlYS02MzliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HVcsdcyLRPDf8u7c-z0F9gK-3Cln3v4v4B9Od_OLBmY=)**

Yours,

Marisa
Teacher for Congress

name: Team Ronchetti
subject: FWD: About Biden’s Speech…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
We’ll be very brief here... Mark asked us to check in with you. If you watched Biden’s State of the Union address earlier this week, we think you’ll agr Peter, We’ll be very brief here... Mark asked us to check in with you. If you watched Biden’s State of the Union address earlier this week, we think you’ll agree: He got it wrong. Biden is leading us down the wrong path as a nation, and we in New Mexico are getting hit the hardest, as a result. body:
| | | Hi there, [**Just a couple hours ago, I finished a press conference with five other candidates on the West Coast who are advocating for peace in Ukraine. We had reporters from TV stations and national outlets there. Can you rush a small $3 donation now to show that our movement for peace is growing?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42537525/333360800/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjViZWY5OC02NDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OG9kdGUpmDST1wrey6n3sKV3TgNfPgPUBZSC4_ZRV40=) Those five candidates and I have formed what we call the Left Coast Alliance: an alliance of working-class candidates who will work together to fight for the issues. In Congress, it will be important to have a principled caucus of committed, working-class representatives who will fight for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, and housing for all. None of us can do it alone, and together we’ll be stronger in Congress. But first things first: I need to win in August. August is coming up fast, with only five months left until the primary election. Last election, I won 35,000 votes. Now I need to build on that and win the primary. [**Please chip in $3 now to help me win, so I can help start the Left Coast Alliance in Congress and fight for Medicare for All and ending the fossil fuel industry. Thank subject: Did Ronny Forget?
body:
I’m wondering if Ronny Jackson forgot why... | |
---
| | | [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=6eb6913dbe&e=4712f71bea)
---
| **Fellow Democrats, ** **I’m wondering if Ronny Jackson forgot why his idol, Donald Trump, was impeached the first time? I ask because my opponent keeps spouting off about how Mr. Trump would have stopped this invasion and stood up to Putin.** **Uh, Ronny, did you forget that Trump was IMPEACHED for extorting President Zelensky in for nonexistent dirt on Hunter Biden in exchange for critical defense assistance?

I think we all know that Trump would have cheered Putin’s forces on as they invaded a democratic neighbor.

I’m running because I understand the difference between Ronny’s bravado and President Biden’s bravery as they contend with this moment; I understand that Texas a little more bravery in Washington and a lot less bravado.

[Can you chip in $5 to help us bring Joe Biden another ally in Congress?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=ea6c484fd1&e=4712f71bea) **
**Thanks so much, ** **Kathleen Brown ** **Democrat** **TX-13**

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: Our grassroots progressive movement vs. their pro-Trump, hateful ideology
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Madison Cawthorn is hoping people like Josh Mandel will join him in Congress to continue to spread their false rhetoric of a stolen 2020 presidential election.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220303-743-footer-ak&t=2&akid=743%2E90090%2EYs0fas)
**Our opponent Josh Mandel was just endorsed by Madison Cawthorn.**
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29127?refcode=em20220303-743&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=743%2E90090%2EYs0fas)
Yes, our opponent who:
* called Morgan “angry” and “dumber than AOC;”
* believes that the actions of the January 6th attack on our Capitol do not amount to an “insurrection” on our government;
* whose entire campaign is “focused on advancing President Trump’s America First agenda;”
* and doesn’t believe in the separation of Church and State!?!

[Can you rush a donation of $5 to our campaign right now to help us send a clear message to Josh Mandel and Madison Cawthorn that Ohio stands firmly against their dangerous far-right agenda?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29127?refcode=em20220303-743&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=743%2E90090%2EYs0fas)
**[Contribute »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29127?refcode=em20220303-743&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=743%2E90090%2EYs0fas)**
Cawthorn is a budding pro-Trump star of the far-right, and he is hoping people like Josh Mandel will join him in Congress to continue to spread their false rhetoric of a stolen 2020 presidential election and promote their radicalized ideology.
We can’t let that happen. We’re working hard to fight back against their hateful rhetoric and harmful policies.
But we need your help to flip Ohio blue and expand our razor-thin Democratic majority with a Senator who will fight for working Ohioans and their families every day. **That’s Morgan.** [Can you donate $5 today to help us send her to the Senate and fight back against pro-Trump rhetoric here in Ohio?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29127?refcode=em20220303-743&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=743%2E90090%2EYs0fas)
Thank you,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220303-743-footer&t=25&refcode2=743_90090_Ys0fas&akid=743%2E90090%2EYs0fas)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: We need a military veteran in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
The times call for it |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=feae58bd59&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

You know, I've been around a lot of leaders. Some good, some bad.

And what is now clear to me, after a disastrous year of Joe Biden, is this: there is a desperate need for a military veteran in Congress. You just can't replace vets and the knowledge we bring!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am an America First Christian and combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1dd4ae119d&e=afa21b7626), the targeted swing district south of Orlando. **

I spent decades in the military. My expertise in warfighting logistics is vast.

With the incompetence and fecklessness on display from Joe Biden's regime right now, think about how important it would be to have more America First vets in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=aca1ff01e3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Here's the reality.**

_Biden: NOT a vet. Totally incompetent withdrawal from Afghanistan, 13 Marines killed.

Nancy Pelosi: NOT a vet. Also possibly drunk and led around by the hand by AOC.

Rep. Darren Soto: NOT a vet. Blindly voted for every Biden program or bill that weakened America. _

There are too few vets. A vet could have told Biden that the weakness shown in Afghanistan would embolden Putin. Peace through strength is important!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8e398506bc&e=afa21b7626)
---
| We have seen what weakness gets us: humiliation and war.

**It's time for America First. Impeach Biden and make America strong again!**

[I will bring America First back to Congress so we can be strong and have peace again](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cef0635940&e=afa21b7626). Will you help me?

Help me stand up to Biden and his blundering incompetence! [We need to build up America's strength again!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=eb20946e41&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c368e1d42b&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=15be0d5e93&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3c94df84ea&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

body:

**Houston, TX** - This morning, Wesley Hunt, Army combat veteran and Houston native, running to represent Texas' 38th Congressional district, joined Fox and Friends to discuss his remarkable primary election victory after avoiding a run-off against 9 other candidates in the race! name: Cheerio
subject: Happy Birthday, Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Will you help me wish him a paw-some birthday by signing his card and typing a few words of support? Will you help me wish him a paw-some birthday by signing his card and typing a few words of support? |
---
Peter,

It's Cheerio again - your favorite four-legged friend! 🐾

I am emailing you for a very special reason. **Today is my dad's 60th birthday!**

Will you help me wish him a paw-some birthday by signing his card and typing a few words of support?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sarah=20Pritchard?=
subject: Join Us This Month for Phone Banking!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1a751db82fa/join-us-this-month-for-phone-banking?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,
Kelvin is continuing to work hard by campaigning all over the state of Georgia. In fact, he’s made almost 300 public appearances since announcing his US Senate campaign. There is no doubt that this race is critical and we are dedicated to electing a qualified candidate to represent Georgia who can defeat Raphael Warnock and take back the Senate. Kelvin King can and will #WinforAmerica, but he can't do it without our help!
---
|
---
| With that in mind, we are asking all volunteers to commit to one Day of Action at Campaign HQ (1640 Powers Ferry Rd. Bldg 26, Marietta, GA 30067) during the month of March!

SATURDAY, MARCH 5 from 10AM to 1PM TUESDAY, MARCH 8 from 4PM to 7PM THURSDAY, MARCH 17 from 4PM to 7PM SATURDAY, MARCH 19 from 10AM to 1PM TUESDAY, MARCH 22 from 4PM to 7PM THURSDAY MARCH 24 from 4PM to 7PM
Join us in spreading Kelvin’s #WinForAmerica message to voters across Georgia. We will be making phone calls and writing postcards. Bring a Friend! We'll have snacks!
---
| Can't make it to HQ during these times? Don't worry! We would still love to have you on the team and we can work around your schedule or set you up remotely. Just let me know how you would like to be involved!

---
| [RSVP HERE](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=807190db8f&e=7bbb93570f "RSVP HERE")
---
| Thank you, **Sarah Pritchard**
Director of Operations
Kelvin King for U.S. Senate
(404) 401-5500 (cell)
---
| | | | | | | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=8c98e3354c&e=7bbb93570f)

---
| | [](mailto:kelvin@kelvinking.com)
---
|
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Kelvin King for Georgia, Inc.
2900 Delk Rd, Ste 700, PMB 268
Marietta, GA 30067

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e90c927666&e=7bbb93570f&c=486ffa4616) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e90c927666&e=7bbb93570f&c=486ffa4616).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Timothy?=
subject: Check Out Our Latest Ad "The Authentic Conservative!"
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df90d2295cab/check-out-our-latest-ad-the-authentic-conservative?e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

I'm not running for Congress because I want to go to Washington. I am running because we are in the fight of our lives for the heart and soul of our country, and we can't afford to replace conservative fighters with RINOs.

Check out our latest ad, "The Authentic Conservative" featuring the endorsements of both Congressman Jody Hice (GA-10) and Congressman Andrew Clyde (GA-09).
---
| [ ](https://VoteBarr.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0aae7015df298a880b9f30703&id=0730503b4e&e=061a1ea0d5)
---
| As a co-sponsor of the Heartbeat Bill, co-sponsor of Constitutional Carry, and strong supporter of Georgia's Election Integrity Act - I have a proven record as an authentic conservative in the State House.

In Congress, I won't cave to the radical left or establishment Republicans.

For Freedom,
---
|

House conservatives and I need your help NOW to stop the Democrats from driving America into the ground.

**So far they’ve:**
* Allowed our adversaries like Russia and China to get stronger every day with America LAST policies.
* Raised taxes on hard-working middle-class Americans.
* Destroyed our economy by forcing us to wear masks and keeping us locked indoors.

**We only have ONE CHANCE to save America, and we need to act quickly before it’s too late.**

[**Pitch in before 11:59 PM TOMORROW NIGHT so we can meet our EXTENDED end-of-month goal and SAVE AMERICA. clean_body: Peter, Our end-of-month deadline has been extended to . We still need 200 patriots to pitch in if we are going to meet our goal. House conservatives and I need your help NOW to stop the Democrats from driving America into the ground. So far they’ve: Allowed our adversaries like Russia and China to get stronger every day with America LAST policies. Raised taxes on hard-working middle-class Americans. Destroyed our economy by forcing us to wear masks and keeping us locked indoors. We only have ONE CHANCE to save America, and we need to act quickly before it’s too late.** Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Did you see the news?

Even if you
missed it, by now you may have seen the ads.

Protect Our Future – a
political action committee funded by a tax-dodging crypto billionaire
based in the Bahamas – has hit the airwaves with a $500,000+ TV ad buy,
along with an $800,000+ digital ad buy, to back a far-left Democrat in
this race.

You know what’s going on here. This guy thinks he can BUY
THIS SEAT, as he attempts to influence future federal regulation of
virtual currencies.

We need to send a strong message today. I’m
counting on every supporter to step up.

This early ad buy is likely just

raising critical campaign funds from local residents who share my
concerns and want to save our state and our country.

# _**Mitesh Gaur **_
Mitesh Gaur is an artist, singing: Filmi, Classical, Semi-classical, devotional and light music. Right from the age of 4, he has been performing in various stage-shows and competitions. Here are some highlights of his achievements –
\- He was the winner of national level singing competition “Sangam”, organized in Rajasthan, India in 2005
\- He participated in Golden Voice of Rajasthan reality television singing competition in year 2005 and reached till quarterfinal rounds.
\- He won “Navi-Mumbai Idol", in 2009
\- He won “Mumbai-Idol”, in 2010
\- He made it to top 25 in “Indian Idol” season 5
\- He was the winner of “Denver Sur-Sargam” singing competition organized in Denver, CO (USA).

clean_body: It’s hard to believe, but our primary election is just a few months away! And with the new maps confirming that our race is ONE HUNDRED PERCENT WINNAB Peter, It’s hard to believe, but our primary election is just a few months away! And with the new maps confirming that our race is ONE HUNDRED PERCENT WINNABLE, it’s never been more important to make sure that people show up to vote for Lisa on May 17th! We’re already seeing record-breaking momentum behind our campaign to elect Lisa Scheller as our next representative in Congress... AND use our district to deliver a NEW GOP MAJORITY in the House. Today, we’re launching an easy way for you to show your support for Lisa AND help out our team’s efforts: Team Scheller is proud to unveil the 2022 Pennsylvania Yard Sign Victory Fund! This victory fund will ensure that homes all across the Lehigh Valley are covered with yard signs that promote Lisa’s name. It’ll be a great way to remind folks about the upcoming primary election and to let Pennsylvania’s top patriots show their neighbors that they’re proud to be on Team Scheller. We know the support is there, but we can’t make it happen without proper funding. We need to raise at least $7,500 in order to meet the minimum for a first order. This is where we need YOUR help, Peter. We have to act quickly! We need to get our order placed before the end of the week if we want to ensure these are printed in time to really make a difference. Thanks, Team Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: More volunteer opportunities this weekend!
body:
Help us in Novi at the Michigan Golf Show!

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_golf_show&n=1)
---
Friend -- We were able to get hundreds of signatures at Outdoorama in Novi last weekend thanks to our amazing volunteers! The Michigan Golf Show is this weekend and we are looking for people who would be willing to help at our booth. The hours are **Friday 2-8pm, Saturday 9am-7pm** , and **Sunday 10am-5pm**. Send an email to Adam at adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com if you are able to join us for a few hours! Sandy, one of our amazing volunteers last weekend, wrote a little bit about her experience at Outdoorama, **_”Last Saturday I worked at the booth for Ralph at Outdoorama. It was heartening to see the enthusiasm of the several people already working the booth and who were contacting people as they passed by. “Business was steady” throughout the two hours that I was there and people were generally very inclined to stop long enough to sign once they learned that Ralph was a conservative Republican. I served as support staff at the table, assisting staff and signers with finding the appropriate county petitions and doing anything else that might be helpful, answering questions, providing written materials, etc. The vast majority of people seemed fed up with our current governor and willing to sign for anyone willing to run against her. Most of them seemed uninformed about current candidates, so it was a good opportunity to provide information.”_** Thank you for helping us make Michigan a lighthouse to the nation! Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_golf_show&n=2)
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_golf_show&n=3).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_golf_show&n=4) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_golf_show&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volunteer_golf_show&n=6), software for leaders.

Peter,

While the world watches the unfolding war that is a direct result of Biden's weak leadership, Barack Obama just jumped into our race to salvage my opponent’s campaign.

In a late night letter to supporters Obama pleaded for support by begging, **"... if we lose [Nevada], Democrats will lose our razor-thin Senate majority."**

Peter, Obama’s donor network is the largest in the Country, and my opponent just tapped into his donors to save her struggling campaign. If we can’t keep pace with the money flowing in, we’re finished.

We hope you will join us for an afternoon of live music, food and beverages. This event is being presented by Mitesh Gaur of Indian Idol fame and will include a wide variety of performers.

The money raised at this event will go directly to supporting Neal Walia's Campaign for Congress. So don't wait to get your tickets to be a part of this live music event supporting a people powered campaign!
**When:** Sunday March 27, 2022 - Doors Open at 2pm
**Where:** Holiday Inn Express at 14200 E Colfax Ave Aurora Colorado

Limited Availability so please [purchase your tickets](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=c4dd7a792c&e=e67cbb3f92) prior to arriving!

---
|
---
|
# _**Mitesh Gaur **_
Mitesh Gaur is an artist, singing: Filmi, Classical, Semi-classical, devotional and light music. Right from the age of 4, he has been performing in various stage-shows and competitions. Here are some highlights of his achievements –
\- He was the winner of national level singing competition “Sangam”, organized in Rajasthan, India in 2005
\- He participated in Golden Voice of Rajasthan reality television singing competition in year 2005 and reached till quarterfinal rounds.
\- He won “Navi-Mumbai Idol", in 2009
\- He won “Mumbai-Idol”, in 2010
\- He made it to top 25 in “Indian Idol” season 5
\- He was the winner of “Denver Sur-Sargam” singing competition organized in Denver, CO (USA).

[](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=a1dba2f301&e=e67cbb3f92)

clean_body: | | | | | Democrats forced our kids to wear masks for two years. Now, they want us to forget that it’s an election year. We won’t let them. It's pretty simple: parents know what is best for their kids. For the past two years, "leaders" have been telling us that they know better than we do. Now that it's an election year, the science has magically changed. The only science they're following is political science. Our kids have lost out on years of development and normalcy because liberals want to control us and dictate how we live our lives. I will NEVER let that happen when I am in Congress. | | | | | | | Paid for by Harbin for Georgia

clean_body: | | | | Mark Your Calendar to come and dine with Marc at McNary’s! Mark Your Calendar to come dine with Marc at McNary’s! We will meet and mingle together with Candidate for Oregon Governor Marc Thielman and his wife Brenda as Marc shares important updates on Oregon issues and how he plans to bring his action and results-driven approach to the governor’s office! | This event is on Wednesday, March 9th, from 6:00-9:00 PM , and includes a delicious three-course meal and dessert at the beautiful McNary Golf Club in Marion County! A no-host bar will also be available. | Tickets are limited and cost $125 per person. Registration is required in advance, please RSVP by March 4th. Tickets include dinner (beef or chicken) and dessert. Marc will share in a discussion about his personal and professional background, policy solutions and how he has been successful at facing off against Governor Brown, OHA, ODE and OSHA through clear and decisive action. His presentation will be followed by a live question and answer session, where you can ask your direct questions and get direct and honest responses! Get your tickets today! | | JOIN US | | | | PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Cheerio Walker
subject: Wish my dad a “Paw-some Birthday”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Will you help me wish him a paw-some birthday by signing his card and typing a few words of support? Will you help me wish him a paw-some birthday by signing his card and typing a few words of support? |
---
Peter,

It's Cheerio again - your favorite four-legged friend! 🐾

I am emailing you for a very special reason. **Today is my dad's 60th birthday!**

Will you help me wish him a paw-some birthday by signing his card and typing a few words of support?

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16b22be5ee304d4e9b0181d2aae06a3a&_e=_eKFDpwu2dkQOVLlxvFmtPsz05r2Vndl9xCI9e9kJ3nm1-yC4GmJxYIiPrKiWchqR9kLLc4eS23mrLb3dXmgQmnckLEO0cg-zDJ43Uwip0vfzRflyPpmTT7Vaw3pAWYzVMYLvrpsxaG95N_5MC2--_1WJG2AKUwjDFxhkSYuDRrewOySF8FXwDfv5W7BG1J7oAl0NV920WIeUwebZJNybsgbmre9tpBXOl7GSiwV9hpiUG80xhS1GvhTRpeutrELggushPpKYK5bNUXtaJl28OqFobEg19Uu0tBkYboZNVUA6FsAt_cGTR16gA8CWqiyDpnsTFijJTsgZzgtCU4Lo3M_ALD2GCvpf6A_SAN0PTZmu6gdDxIdYOFLhYSV8WRIbq4daBByEt9pVB4q1kI52mPBmw9E2d1CaiMNB0rj174lpN8S5NV7PmM3EwqZXBgAv7R5EX_EJVxMLWxGSyd80LF5-ZCJ3AbpaLU90TIZsymnuZQdyWYRlqDxenuFsYWgZqle3XfD6MXfbrgpptotb2MoE27g2lUQiO-QHckACRPPdjn7fGI5pBQcOmt_9WkW)
Herschel has been working non-stop to help the people of Georgia. He's so busy on the campaign trail that we don't have time this year to throw him a big paw-ty.

_**Instead, we hope to show him a huge stack of cards and paw-sitive notes from his friends and top supporters, Peter.**_

**[So, before Herschel's birthday is over, would you please take 30 seconds to sign his card?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16b22be5ee304d4e9b0181d2aae06a3a&_e=_eKFDpwu2dkQOVLlxvFmtPsz05r2Vndl9xCI9e9kJ3nm1-yC4GmJxYIiPrKiWchqR9kLLc4eS23mrLb3dXmgQmnckLEO0cg-zDJ43Uwip0vfzRflyPpmTT7Vaw3pAWYzVMYLvrpsxaG95N_5MC2--_1WJG2AKUwjDFxhkSYuDRrewOySF8FXwDfv5W7BG1J7oAl0NV920WIeUwebZJNybsgbmre9tpBXOl7GSiwV9hpiUG80xhS1GvhTRpeutrELggushPpKYK5bNUXtaJl28OqFobEg19Uu0tBkYboZNVUA6FsAt_cGTR16gA8CWqiyDpnsTFijJTsgZzgtCU4Lo3M_ALD2GCvpf6A_SAN0PTY52mild9QGYVOgfLzX_nUm99UBElwWkVXFByRNqutkxpeV8BXAeumhuNUhVeH45Pjq-Q0f2KekP9HgJvgaVeoj175SYqXA7SfeANE0K45HjsHP193xLW9JYuTT3fMo6BK56t8sbDhB8wqbgt0dRZutCa_eY2Qe1Np6AuKEm4h4ClgqdpjYo4iadDGsnbDnejoQHxHJ4IN3X49ApLL8GE5V) **

I am so proud of my dad fur taking on this campaign. I want to make sure he gets all the tail-waggin' love he deserves on his birthday!

Thanks,

subject: 3 big advantages:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We have three big advantages in this race right now.
#

We have three big advantages in this race right now.
1. **Republicans are slinging mud** in a divisive and nasty primary. And while they race to the right, we’re focused on bringing people together and building a winning general election campaign.

2. **We have a fighter** in Cheri Beasley. She’s a public servant who has dedicated her life to fighting for justice for the people, and she’s the only one we can trust to fight for the issues that matter to our families — like climate change, voting rights, and a living wage.

3. **And — most importantly — we have YOU.** Republicans cannot keep up with us and the outpouring of grassroots support. Instead, they are relying on corporate PAC money and super PACs.

But with special interests already dumping millions into ads in North Carolina, there’s no time to delay — a penny now is worth a pound later.
[**Can you help us keep our foot on the gas by rushing a $3 donation to our campaign? Flipping North Carolina’s seat would be a game-changer in Washington, so we need you with us.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220303-1-t1&refcode2=483.357359.h06mTW&t=1&akid=483%2E357359%2Eh06mTW)

Friend,

I can’t believe it. _**We did not make it.**_ We missed our goal.

I was disappointed when I heard the numbers this morning. It’s not looking good for the mid-term elections. **Haven’t we had enough of the**government’s overreach?** Don’t you want to keep **Critical Race Theory** out of our classrooms?**

**If you truly want to help me reset America, ****[I really need you to show your support.](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=e344140e439c428d8aff6634f9c13725&_e=AZQuOzLbayEgow4socEh3Lfz0IKhmYeZ2vMG8EzT-q0B29mQ88cqi4sIrAzVRLjIbl3RN-PFs8fJ3aGWL6ZP68-Q64uhcw0RyNn5bospkA3tGYbDV2QseeIry74CO6SgOg5O8S1mTLh0swmFu8Qzg3O3AK1U3evlApTy9KCjTOOSd-gbP8jHPzmj99JNYY9Xnq-ymRnwdoiLi9KS6VjgBmewD7I1C75_wXxAuILC1RRwwr6ocjO-txmuj5A9mVcf_xhxfBKVJr9cZjcwTwWUo5dH7zR-6lDNCYiq4n4wTMhhbGOBLMHgXSSGpj3scxJ1u2bOqR1-IYutTRw75htf-1CaWiFlcYc_fzyxyVtXVijrPiCkbzZu89ZeeZLUVb568BUioFzYFuS_4ezjiefYtKvXvxWFXWEWrloNh6p12caFKaOo2-hA1EvRyHGyfwJsqH95HkWs76os4dheRxPK9lV1buSE_YAsJfQ0oExFVHihfzWk5-44FG1oKlGHbxgfLpx5FoR8YvrXS6KOeg0OIANF4ZswaUA-itzxluGHf4w%3D)**

I am reaching out because you are at the top of the list of our most dedicated supporters. We need people like you to push for change and support grassroots campaigns throughout the country. **[Will you help me out so we can deliver positive results for Virginia and American families?](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=e344140e439c428d8aff6634f9c13725&_e=AZQuOzLbayEgow4socEh3Lfz0IKhmYeZ2vMG8EzT-q0B29mQ88cqi4sIrAzVRLjIbl3RN-PFs8fJ3aGWL6ZP68-Q64uhcw0RyNn5bospkA3tGYbDV2QseeIry74CO6SgOg5O8S1mTLh0swmFu8Qzg3O3AK1U3evlApTy9KCjTOOSd-gbP8jHPzmj99JNYY9Xnq-ymRnwdoiLi9KS6VjgBmewD7I1C75_wXxAuILC1RRwwr6ocjO-txmuj5A9mVcf_xhxfBKVJr9cZjcwTwWUo5dH7zR-6lDNCYiq4n4wTMhhbGOBLMHgXSSGpj3scxJ1u2bOqR1-IYutTRw75htf-xAHcovJZTiTWffHA_687Dls-QgEya-QAZTjAC-qU0yoitPxDJCs8kDw-Bl2lLfEJ0lHzDEiT3KqGykbNUI0ArEyomhS3WPdz6DFP5AlHLlXGC0Tue1ISr63P4jK3EhFhNGenTJLYIGQ4NrR7Y3DJxbY6m1nE9cOkHJnK0oLO_gp4jTQjeA_w8M9V1EjmgVjtFsdHDe7ERhU3D_0xXO_nOk%3D)**
**Please - I’m humbly asking. Help me get a head start on my fundraising efforts for the rest of March.**
| [**HELP ME GET A HEAD START** ](http://links.yeslivegaforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=876a4969a9724ab8bc814d84bfee8268&_m=e344140e439c428d8aff6634f9c13725&_e=AZQuOzLbayEgow4socEh3Lfz0IKhmYeZ2vMG8EzT-q0B29mQ88cqi4sIrAzVRLjIbl3RN-PFs8fJ3aGWL6ZP68-Q64uhcw0RyNn5bospkA3tGYbDV2QseeIry74CO6SgOg5O8S1mTLh0swmFu8Qzg3O3AK1U3evlApTy9KCjTOOSd-gbP8jHPzmj99JNYY9Xnq-ymRnwdoiLi9KS6VjgBmewD7I1C75_wXxAuILC1RRwwr6ocjO-txmuj5A9mVcf_xhxfBKVJr9cZjcwTwWUo5dH7zR-6lDNCYiq4n4wTMhhbGOBLMHgXSSGpj3scxJ1u2bOqR1-IYutTRw75htf-7K0bvGCz15LZtbCH20LkRVOsHR98JIYbUIOZFksQPAyFBhyQF0eckw7jv855buWIk2Qu6YD3wLpLIx54jrmlgeOM_oMxHhou8sHl0bKIyHhkpWbCXfohFewSdKL5bI5hQxPCf8ugdDblHtbFtumkXOBPU6RRqwaCxY62DoWOcZbWuUNlMIJzPgxlN31fn_PrqpxR27111uF0RjPmHFZb20%3D)

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=017fd3c932cd4320bb370c877c07c4f1&_e=OQUfH-WutfxU6d8jTyRg3dDPgiXSthGN6zQTM25hnx5zTuX3fucP8xjeVv6YmdK84k-Pju0zBLj170dszidgf0Ju0VvDTN_BfE5PfjkUqtJIWKrfTjoFUQB6aQnBSDrJ8WnMGOJymE8U9qBAqr8E7YfG44grPTbfXBxrLx0pSWoGbN1J_jiRZIaSGO6RmigGhfS4ZvMywckxlrTkiVq5SzpZ8ptP9yH_kpFArMZYBQEpXXjmh6m-y-0LZNK8X1qJP-ty77hUcTlS6dEK7vlOyK1sEO1PH8f_X649DzoEnoZF9HlMWoxGvp6JCcXnuGBNQEeZV1zcJWlojdQMWX_TN0ZAORV3_8lJzmtdAfV9dIUZ8iOm5RUs2xSq3GKfBNIHSpq2nPXsn0WfgYPedNQFwqXkQcoow1SnhqzsG6SHVnlce-mNlCss9xI63qqNLqb6uzr1R7EU3kI0WUIQu9jHEA%3D%3D)**

1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State

If you know anything about Colorado politics in the last 25 years, I don’t have to tell you what a powerhouse Rep. DeGette is. She has served the people of Denver in Congress since 1997, and has won re-election _eleven times_ — so let’s just say she knows a thing or two about running a winning campaign.
[_**Join Rep. DeGette in supporting our campaign: pitch in a contribution now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42534574/333325434/573003782?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220303degette_YC_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTExMTNkMC00ZDliLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTMid2ai7eTXj8UjT8B06aB6xiacDcPXLTXGTozd2R4=)
Rep. DeGette knows how critical this race is to Democrats’ chances of holding the House in November. She also knows how important that goal is, because she spends every day witnessing extreme, far-right figures push the Republican Party further and further into intolerance, voter suppression, and the denial of basic rights.
**The stakes are all too real, and our future — our children’s future — is on the line.**

clean_body: | = Our movement just keeps growing, Peter — Rep. Diana DeGette endorsed our campaign! I’m humbled to have her support in our campaign for the working families of Colorado’s 8th District. | = If you know anything about Colorado politics in the last 25 years, I don’t have to tell you what a powerhouse Rep. DeGette is. She has served the people of Denver in Congress since 1997, and has won re-election eleven times — so let’s just say she knows a thing or two about running a winning campaign. = Rep. DeGette knows how critical this race is to Democrats’ chances of holding the House in November. She also knows how important that goal is, because she spends every day witnessing extreme, far-right figures push the Republican Party further and further into intolerance, voter suppression, and the denial of basic rights. The stakes are all too real, and our future — our children’s future — is on the line. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support, Peter.
